ext_equipment_kit_templatesA named collection of equipment types that make up a full season kit for an activity (e.g. 'U14 Football Home Kit' = Jersey + Shorts + Socks + Shin Guards). id UUID PK(v7), activity_id UUID FK(ext_activities) NOT NULL, name TEXT NOT NULL (e.g. '2026 Season Home Kit', 'Training Kit'), academic_year_id UUID FK NOT NULL, is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true, created_by UUID FK(hr_employees) NOT NULL. UNIQUE(activity_id, name, academic_year_id).
ext_equipment_kit_template_itemsLine items within a kit template — specifies which equipment types and quantities make up the kit. id UUID PK(v7), kit_template_id UUID FK(ext_equipment_kit_templates) NOT NULL, equipment_type_id UUID FK(ext_equipment_types) NOT NULL, quantity_per_person INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, size_selection_method ENUM(BY_PROFILE,BY_COACH,STANDARD) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'BY_PROFILE' (BY_PROFILE: system uses student profile size preference if recorded; BY_COACH: coach selects size manually at assignment; STANDARD: one-size item, no selection needed). UNIQUE(kit_template_id, equipment_type_id).
ext_equipment_assignment_batchesBulk equipment assignment event — the coach assigns a full kit to all team members at season start. Enables bulk return processing at season end. id UUID PK(v7), activity_id UUID FK(ext_activities) NOT NULL, kit_template_id UUID FK(ext_equipment_kit_templates) nullable (the template used for bulk assignment — null for ad-hoc single item assignments), academic_year_id UUID FK NOT NULL, season_return_date DATE NOT NULL (expected date all items are due back), assigned_by UUID FK(hr_employees) NOT NULL, batch_date DATE NOT NULL, notes TEXT nullable, total_items_assigned INT nullable, total_items_returned INT nullable (updated on each return), status ENUM(OPEN,PARTIALLY_RETURNED,FULLY_RETURNED,CLOSED) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'OPEN'. INDEX(activity_id, academic_year_id, status).
ext_equipment_assignmentsIndividual equipment item assigned to a specific person for a season. One row per physical item per person. id UUID PK(v7), batch_id UUID FK(ext_equipment_assignment_batches) nullable (null for ad-hoc single item assignments outside a batch), item_id UUID FK(ext_equipment_items) NOT NULL, assigned_to_id UUID FK(iam_person) NOT NULL (the human receiving the equipment — iam_person covers students and staff uniformly per ADR-055), assigned_by UUID FK(hr_employees) NOT NULL, assigned_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, expected_return_date DATE NOT NULL, condition_at_assign ENUM(NEW,GOOD,FAIR,POOR) NOT NULL, returned_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable (null = not yet returned), condition_at_return ENUM(GOOD,FAIR,POOR,DAMAGED,LOST) nullable, return_accepted_by UUID FK(hr_employees) nullable, return_notes TEXT nullable, status ENUM(ASSIGNED,RETURNED,OVERDUE,LOST,CHARGED) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ASSIGNED'. UNIQUE(item_id) WHERE status = 'ASSIGNED' — one active assignment per item at a time. INDEX(assigned_to_id, status). INDEX(batch_id, status). INDEX(expected_return_date, status) WHERE status = 'ASSIGNED' — overdue reminder query. On status = OVERDUE: Task Worker creates task for coach and notification to guardian. On condition_at_return IN (DAMAGED, LOST): coach is prompted to create ext_equipment_damage_charges.
ext_equipment_damage_chargesDamage or loss charge raised against a family when equipment is returned in damaged condition or not returned. Integrates with M81 Payments. id UUID PK(v7), assignment_id UUID FK(ext_equipment_assignments) NOT NULL UNIQUE (one charge decision per assignment — may be zero if damage is waived), school_id UUID NOT NULL, charge_type ENUM(DAMAGE,LOSS,LATE_RETURN_FEE) NOT NULL, damage_description TEXT nullable (required for DAMAGE type), charge_amount NUMERIC(8,2) NOT NULL (0.00 if charge is waived — record still created to document the decision), is_waived BOOLEAN DEFAULT false (coach or AD decision to not charge despite damage — must record reason), waiver_reason TEXT nullable (required when is_waived=true), decided_by UUID FK(hr_employees) NOT NULL, decided_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, invoice_line_item_id UUID (SOFT INTEGRITY to pay_invoice_line_items.id nullable — populated when charge_amount > 0 and invoice line item created; null when waived or pending billing). On INSERT with charge_amount > 0 and is_waived=false: emit ext.equipment.damage_charge.raised Kafka event → Payments Worker creates pay_invoice_line_item on the student family account with description and amount.
M65Facilities Managementprefix: fac_37 tablesWave 3

Module 65 (ADR-034). Buildings, spaces, assets, preventive maintenance, work orders, custodial zone management, supply inventory, compliance inspections.

M65 Scope Boundary (ADR-034) IN SCOPE: building & space registry, facilities asset lifecycle, preventive maintenance scheduling and checklists, proactive work orders, custodial zone assignments, supply inventory, compliance inspections and violation tracking. OUT OF SCOPE: custodian shift scheduling (owned by M80 HR — HR owns when, Facilities owns where), district-level space sharing, automated maintenance AI scheduling, classroom scheduling (M22), technology assets (M62). Cross-module links: fac_work_orders.tkt_ticket_id DISPLAY-ONLY → tkt_tickets (reactive Helpdesk tickets that escalate to formal work orders). fac_spaces.sch_room_id DISPLAY-ONLY → sch_rooms (overlapping classroom spaces). fac_zone_assignments and fac_assets reference hr_employees via SOFT INTEGRITY.

### Domain 1 — Buildings & Spaces (3 tables)

TableDefinition
ext_medical_clearancesPre-participation physical examination clearance required before a student may compete in any athletic activity. Mandatory in most US states. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, student_id UUID FK(sis_students) NOT NULL, academic_year_id UUID FK NOT NULL, cleared_by_physician BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT false, clearance_date DATE nullable, expiry_date DATE nullable (typically one academic year from clearance date), physician_name TEXT nullable, physician_contact TEXT nullable, physician_note_s3_key TEXT nullable (scanned clearance form), cleared_for_contact_sports BOOLEAN DEFAULT true (some students may be cleared for non-contact only due to injury or condition), restrictions TEXT nullable (e.g. 'No heading in football — post-concussion protocol'), status ENUM(NOT_SUBMITTED,PENDING_REVIEW,CLEARED,CLEARED_WITH_RESTRICTIONS,NOT_CLEARED,EXPIRED) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'NOT_SUBMITTED', reviewed_by UUID FK(hr_employees) nullable. UNIQUE(school_id, student_id, academic_year_id). INDEX(school_id, academic_year_id, status). On status=EXPIRED: Task Worker notifies student, parent, and AD. Student excluded from ext_eligibility_checks until renewed.
ext_leaguesAn inter-school competition league or tournament that an activity participates in. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, name TEXT NOT NULL (e.g. 'County U14 Football League', 'Regional Swimming Championships'), organising_body TEXT nullable (e.g. 'County Schools Sports Partnership'), season_start DATE NOT NULL, season_end DATE NOT NULL, activity_id UUID FK(ext_activities) NOT NULL, is_home_and_away BOOLEAN DEFAULT true, notes TEXT nullable. INDEX(school_id, activity_id, season_start DESC).
ext_fixturesIndividual scheduled match or competition within a league or as a standalone event. id UUID PK(v7), activity_id UUID FK(ext_activities) NOT NULL, league_id UUID FK(ext_leagues) nullable (null for friendly or standalone fixtures), fixture_date DATE NOT NULL, fixture_time TIME nullable, fixture_type ENUM(LEAGUE,FRIENDLY,CUP,TOURNAMENT,CHAMPIONSHIP) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'LEAGUE', is_home BOOLEAN NOT NULL (true = our school is the home team), opponent_school_name TEXT NOT NULL, venue_name TEXT nullable (for away fixtures or neutral venues), venue_address TEXT nullable, transport_required BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, adhoc_trip_id UUID (SOFT INTEGRITY to trn_adhoc_trips.id nullable — links to transport booking when away), official_required BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, official_confirmed BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, result_id UUID FK(ext_activity_results) nullable (linked after the fixture is played), notes TEXT nullable. INDEX(activity_id, fixture_date). INDEX(league_id, fixture_date) WHERE league_id IS NOT NULL.
ext_activity_expensesPer-activity expense tracking for the Athletic Director and coach. Feeds programme cost reporting. id UUID PK(v7), activity_id UUID FK(ext_activities) NOT NULL, academic_year_id UUID FK NOT NULL, expense_date DATE NOT NULL, expense_type ENUM(EQUIPMENT_PURCHASE,REFEREE_FEE,TOURNAMENT_REGISTRATION,TRANSPORT,VENUE_HIRE,KIT_PRINTING,FIRST_AID_SUPPLIES,OTHER) NOT NULL, description TEXT NOT NULL, amount NUMERIC(10,2) NOT NULL, paid_by ENUM(SCHOOL_BUDGET,BOOSTER_CLUB,STUDENT_FEES,DONATION,OTHER) NOT NULL, receipt_s3_key TEXT nullable, recorded_by UUID FK(hr_employees) NOT NULL, supplier_id UUID FK(fin_suppliers) nullable (links to supplier master for financial reconciliation in Wave 4), notes TEXT nullable. INDEX(activity_id, academic_year_id, expense_date DESC).
ext_participation_limitsPer-school rules limiting how many activities a student can join simultaneously or per season. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, academic_year_id UUID FK NOT NULL, max_concurrent_activities INT nullable (maximum number of ext_activities a student can be ACTIVE in simultaneously), max_activities_per_season INT nullable (maximum over the full academic year), applies_to_activity_categories TEXT[] nullable (e.g. {'SPORT'} — limit applies only to sports, not arts or academic clubs; null = applies to all), override_permission TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ADMIN_ONLY' (who can override the limit when a student applies for one more — ADMIN_ONLY or DEPARTMENT_HEAD). UNIQUE(school_id, academic_year_id).
fac_space_bookingsFacility space reservation for scheduled events — fills the gap left by ADR-034 which excluded room booking from the Facilities v1 scope. Enables coaches booking the gym, SENCOs booking quiet assessment rooms, teachers booking the hall. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, space_id UUID FK(fac_spaces) NOT NULL, booked_by UUID FK(iam_person) NOT NULL (the person who holds the booking — iam_person is consistent with all human identity references per ADR-055), booking_purpose TEXT NOT NULL, starts_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, ends_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, booking_type ENUM(SPORTS_TRAINING,SPORTS_FIXTURE,EXAM_INVIGILATION,ASSESSMENT,MEETING,PERFORMANCE,GENERAL) NOT NULL, activity_id UUID (SOFT INTEGRITY to ext_activities.id nullable), status ENUM(PENDING,CONFIRMED,CANCELLED) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'CONFIRMED', requires_approval BOOLEAN DEFAULT false (for high-demand spaces like the main gym — admin must confirm before booking is active), approved_by UUID FK nullable. EXCLUSION CONSTRAINT: EXCLUDE USING gist (space_id WITH =, tstzrange(starts_at, ends_at, '[)') WITH &&) WHERE status != 'CANCELLED' — prevents double-booking. INDEX(space_id, starts_at). INDEX(booked_by, starts_at DESC).
grp_groupsA named community group spanning one or multiple schools. id UUID PK(v7), name TEXT NOT NULL (editable by OWNER or ADMIN), description TEXT nullable, group_type ENUM(EXTRACURRICULAR_TEAM,ACADEMIC_CLUB,PARENT_COMMITTEE,VOLUNTEER_GROUP,STAFF_COMMITTEE,DISTRICT_TEAM,COMMUNITY,OTHER) NOT NULL, scope_type ENUM(SCHOOL,ORGANISATION) NOT NULL, scope_id UUID NOT NULL (SOFT INTEGRITY to schools.id when scope_type=SCHOOL or organisations.id when scope_type=ORGANISATION), school_restriction ENUM(ANY_SCHOOL,SAME_SCHOOL_ONLY,SPECIFIC_SCHOOLS) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'SAME_SCHOOL_ONLY', allowed_school_ids UUID[] nullable (for SPECIFIC_SCHOOLS restriction), allowed_person_types TEXT[] NOT NULL DEFAULT '{STUDENT,STAFF,GUARDIAN,VOLUNTEER}', membership_approval_required BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, max_members INT nullable, is_public BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, status ENUM(ACTIVE,CLOSED,DISSOLVED) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ACTIVE', closed_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable, closed_by UUID FK(platform_users) nullable, closure_reason TEXT nullable, auto_dissolve_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable (background job sets status=DISSOLVED at this time), created_by UUID FK(platform_users) NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ. INDEX(scope_type, scope_id, status). INDEX(status, auto_dissolve_at) WHERE auto_dissolve_at IS NOT NULL AND status = 'ACTIVE'.
grp_membersPer-person membership record within a group. id UUID PK(v7), group_id UUID FK(grp_groups) NOT NULL, person_id UUID FK(platform_users) NOT NULL, member_role ENUM(OWNER,ADMIN,MEMBER) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'MEMBER' (exactly one OWNER per active group enforced by application layer), status ENUM(ACTIVE,INVITED,PENDING_APPROVAL,SUSPENDED,LEFT,REMOVED) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ACTIVE', joined_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable, invited_by UUID FK(platform_users) nullable, left_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable, suspension_reason TEXT nullable. UNIQUE(group_id, person_id) WHERE status != 'LEFT'. INDEX(person_id, status) WHERE status = 'ACTIVE'. INDEX(group_id, member_role) WHERE member_role IN ('OWNER','ADMIN').
grp_member_notification_prefsPer-member per-group notification preferences. id UUID PK(v7), membership_id UUID FK(grp_members) NOT NULL UNIQUE, notify_announcements BOOLEAN DEFAULT true, notify_events BOOLEAN DEFAULT true, notify_membership_changes BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, notify_results BOOLEAN DEFAULT true, preferred_channel ENUM(IN_APP,EMAIL,PUSH,ALL,NONE) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'IN_APP', quiet_hours_override BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ.
grp_ownership_transfersTwo-party ownership handshake. id UUID PK(v7), group_id UUID FK(grp_groups) NOT NULL, from_member_id UUID FK(grp_members) NOT NULL (current owner initiating transfer), to_member_id UUID FK(grp_members) NOT NULL (incoming owner — must be existing ACTIVE member), transfer_reason TEXT nullable, status ENUM(PENDING,ACCEPTED,DECLINED,EXPIRED,CANCELLED) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDING', initiated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, expires_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL (default: initiated_at + 7 days), responded_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable. UNIQUE(group_id) WHERE status = 'PENDING'. On ACCEPTED: from_member becomes ADMIN, to_member becomes OWNER. INDEX(to_member_id, status) WHERE status = 'PENDING'.
grp_announcementsGroup-scoped announcement visible to all active members. id UUID PK(v7), group_id UUID FK(grp_groups) NOT NULL, author_id UUID FK(iam_person) NOT NULL (the human who authored this announcement — must be OWNER or ADMIN of the group; application layer validates via grp_members), title TEXT NOT NULL, body TEXT NOT NULL, pinned BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, attachments JSONB nullable, publish_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, expires_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ. INDEX(group_id, publish_at DESC). INDEX(group_id, pinned) WHERE pinned = true. On INSERT: NotificationWorker fans out per grp_member_notification_prefs.
grp_announcement_readsRead receipt tracking for group announcements. Append-only. id UUID PK(v7), announcement_id UUID FK(grp_announcements) NOT NULL, reader_id UUID FK(iam_person) NOT NULL (the human who read the announcement), read_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL. UNIQUE(announcement_id, reader_id). INDEX(announcement_id, read_at). INDEX(reader_id, announcement_id).
grp_eventsGroup-scoped event visible to members. id UUID PK(v7), group_id UUID FK(grp_groups) NOT NULL, created_by UUID FK(iam_person) NOT NULL (the human who created the event — identity reference per ADR-055), title TEXT NOT NULL, description TEXT nullable, location TEXT nullable, starts_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, ends_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable, event_type ENUM(PRACTICE,MATCH,MEETING,SOCIAL,PERFORMANCE,COMPETITION,OTHER) NOT NULL, requires_rsvp BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, rsvp_deadline TIMESTAMPTZ nullable, max_attendees INT nullable, is_public BOOLEAN DEFAULT false. INDEX(group_id, starts_at DESC). On INSERT: NotificationWorker fans out per grp_member_notification_prefs.notify_events.
fac_buildingsid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID, name TEXT NOT NULL, code TEXT, year_built INT, total_floors INT, is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true. UNIQUE(school_id, name).
fac_spacesid UUID PK(v7), building_id UUID FK, name TEXT NOT NULL, floor TEXT, space_type ENUM(BATHROOM,CORRIDOR,STAIRWELL,MECHANICAL,STORAGE,OFFICE,GROUNDS,COMMON_AREA,GYM,CAFETERIA,OTHER), area_sqft NUMERIC(8,1), is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true, sch_room_id UUID (DISPLAY-ONLY → sch_rooms.id — advisory reference for overlapping classroom spaces; RELATIONSHIP NOTE: sch_rooms is the scheduling-optimised room view used by the timetabling engine; fac_spaces is the facilities management view used for maintenance, inspections, and cleaning routes; a classroom exists in both with fac_spaces.sch_room_id linking them; sch_rooms is authoritative for scheduling; fac_spaces is authoritative for physical facilities management). UNIQUE(building_id, name).
fac_space_documentsid UUID PK(v7), space_id UUID FK, document_type ENUM(FLOOR_PLAN,PHOTO,PERMIT,CERTIFICATE), s3_key TEXT NOT NULL, uploaded_by UUID FK, uploaded_at TIMESTAMPTZ. Signed S3 URLs with 60 min expiry.

### Domain 2 — Facilities Assets (3 tables)

TableDefinition
fac_asset_categoriesid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID, name TEXT NOT NULL, depreciation_years INT, maintenance_interval_months INT. Categories: HVAC, Plumbing, Electrical, Elevator, Fire Safety, Boiler, Grounds Equipment, Furniture, Appliance, Other. UNIQUE(school_id, name).
fac_assetsid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID, category_id UUID FK, building_id UUID FK, space_id UUID FK nullable, name TEXT NOT NULL, make TEXT, model TEXT, serial_number TEXT, install_date DATE, warranty_expiry DATE, expected_lifespan_years INT, replacement_cost_estimate NUMERIC(10,2) nullable (current estimated replacement cost — used for capital planning and insurance valuation), replacement_priority ENUM(LOW,MEDIUM,HIGH,CRITICAL) nullable (set by FM when asset is approaching end of life — CRITICAL means replacement required within current budget year), status ENUM(ACTIVE,UNDER_MAINTENANCE,DECOMMISSIONED). UNIQUE(school_id, serial_number) WHERE serial_number IS NOT NULL. INDEX(school_id, status). INDEX(school_id, replacement_priority) WHERE replacement_priority IS NOT NULL — capital planning query.
fac_asset_documentsid UUID PK(v7), asset_id UUID FK, document_type ENUM(INVOICE,WARRANTY,MANUAL,INSPECTION_CERTIFICATE,INSURANCE), s3_key TEXT NOT NULL, uploaded_at TIMESTAMPTZ. Mirrors tech_asset_documents pattern.

### Domain 3 — Preventive Maintenance (4 tables)

TableDefinition
fac_maintenance_plansid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID, target_type ENUM(ASSET,SPACE), target_id UUID (SOFT INTEGRITY → fac_assets or fac_spaces), name TEXT NOT NULL, frequency ENUM(DAILY,WEEKLY,MONTHLY,QUARTERLY,ANNUALLY), estimated_duration_minutes INT, instructions TEXT, is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true, seasonal_months INT[] nullable (when set: task generation worker only creates tasks for months in this array — e.g. {11,12,1,2} for boiler servicing Nov-Feb only; null means year-round). INDEX(school_id, target_type, target_id).
fac_maintenance_tasksid UUID PK(v7), plan_id UUID FK, assigned_to_id UUID (SOFT INTEGRITY → hr_employees.id), scheduled_date DATE NOT NULL, completed_at TIMESTAMPTZ, status ENUM(SCHEDULED,IN_PROGRESS,COMPLETED,SKIPPED,OVERDUE), notes TEXT, skip_reason TEXT nullable (required when status = SKIPPED — auditable reason e.g. 'Asset under external repair', 'School closed — public holiday'). CHECK: NOT (status = 'SKIPPED' AND skip_reason IS NULL). RANGE partition by scheduled_date annually. INDEX(assigned_to_id, status) WHERE status != 'COMPLETED'. On status → OVERDUE: emit fac.maintenance_task.overdue Kafka event.
fac_maintenance_checklistsid UUID PK(v7), plan_id UUID FK, description TEXT NOT NULL, expected_result TEXT, sort_order INT. INDEX(plan_id, sort_order).
fac_maintenance_checklist_resultsid UUID PK(v7), task_id UUID FK, checklist_item_id UUID FK, passed BOOLEAN NOT NULL, notes TEXT, photo_s3_keys TEXT[]. UNIQUE(task_id, checklist_item_id). IMMUTABLE once submitted — no UPDATE or DELETE.

### Domain 4 — Work Orders (2 tables)

TableDefinition
fac_work_ordersid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID, work_order_type ENUM(REPAIR,INSTALLATION,INSPECTION_PREP,DEEP_CLEAN,RENOVATION), priority ENUM(LOW,MEDIUM,HIGH,CRITICAL), asset_id UUID FK nullable, space_id UUID FK nullable, building_id UUID FK nullable, assigned_to_id UUID (SOFT INTEGRITY → hr_employees.id — internal staff assignee), vendor_id UUID FK(tkt_vendors) nullable (external vendor assignee — when set, status moves to VENDOR_ASSIGNED; CHECK: NOT (assigned_to_id IS NOT NULL AND vendor_id IS NOT NULL)), vendor_reference TEXT nullable (vendor's job reference number), vendor_assigned_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable, scheduled_date DATE, completed_at TIMESTAMPTZ, status ENUM(OPEN,IN_PROGRESS,VENDOR_ASSIGNED,ON_HOLD,COMPLETED,CANCELLED) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'OPEN', tkt_ticket_id UUID (DISPLAY-ONLY → tkt_tickets.id — for reactive Helpdesk-originated jobs, ADR-033), cost NUMERIC(8,2), cost_approval_required BOOLEAN DEFAULT false (auto-set to true when estimated cost exceeds school-configured threshold — triggers wsk_approval_requests before work proceeds), cost_approval_threshold NUMERIC(8,2) nullable (the threshold that triggered approval — denormalised at creation time so historical records remain accurate if the school policy changes), linked_cost_approval_id UUID FK(wsk_approval_requests) nullable, notes TEXT. INDEX(school_id, status, scheduled_date). INDEX(vendor_id, status) WHERE vendor_id IS NOT NULL. On creation: emit fac.work_order.created Kafka event.
fac_work_order_activityid UUID PK(v7), work_order_id UUID FK, actor_id UUID FK, activity_type ENUM(STATUS_CHANGE,REASSIGNMENT,COMMENT,ATTACHMENT), metadata JSONB, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ. IMMUTABLE — no UPDATE or DELETE. Mirrors inc_incident_timeline pattern (ADR-016). INDEX(work_order_id, created_at ASC).

### Domain 5 — Custodial Zone Management (2 tables)

TableDefinition
fac_zonesid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID, name TEXT NOT NULL, description TEXT, color TEXT (UI display). UNIQUE(school_id, name).
fac_zone_assignmentsid UUID PK(v7), zone_id UUID FK, employee_id UUID (SOFT INTEGRITY → hr_employees.id), effective_from DATE NOT NULL, effective_to DATE nullable, shift ENUM(MORNING,AFTERNOON,EVENING,OVERNIGHT). UNIQUE(zone_id, employee_id, effective_from). HR owns when the custodian works (hr_timekeeping_records). Facilities owns where they are assigned (this table). INDEX(zone_id, effective_from).

### Domain 6 — Compliance Inspections (3 tables)

TableDefinition
fac_cleaning_routesCustodial cleaning route definition — an ordered sequence of spaces a custodian covers in a single shift. Routes are optional: a school may use zones only, routes only, both, or neither. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, name TEXT NOT NULL (e.g. 'North Wing Evening', 'Gymnasium AM'), shift ENUM(MORNING,AFTERNOON,EVENING,OVERNIGHT) NOT NULL, zone_id UUID FK(fac_zones) nullable (optional — a route can belong to a zone but is not required to), estimated_duration_minutes INT nullable, is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true, notes TEXT. UNIQUE(school_id, name). INDEX(school_id, is_active).
fac_cleaning_route_stopsOrdered stops within a cleaning route. Each stop is one space with a defined task list. id UUID PK(v7), route_id UUID FK(fac_cleaning_routes) NOT NULL, space_id UUID FK(fac_spaces) NOT NULL, stop_order INT NOT NULL, estimated_minutes INT nullable, cleaning_tasks TEXT[] NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}' (ordered list of tasks to perform at this stop — e.g. {'Mop floor','Empty bins','Wipe surfaces','Check soap dispensers'}), notes TEXT nullable. UNIQUE(route_id, stop_order). UNIQUE(route_id, space_id) — a space appears only once per route. INDEX(route_id, stop_order).
fac_cleaning_route_assignmentsAssigns a custodian to a route for a specific date or on a recurring schedule. id UUID PK(v7), route_id UUID FK(fac_cleaning_routes) NOT NULL, employee_id UUID (SOFT INTEGRITY → hr_employees.id) NOT NULL, assignment_date DATE nullable (set for one-off assignments; null when is_recurring=true), is_recurring BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, recurrence_days INT[] nullable (ISO day numbers for recurring assignments — e.g. {1,2,3,4,5} for weekdays), effective_from DATE nullable (start of recurring assignment window), effective_to DATE nullable (end of recurring assignment window — null = indefinite), assigned_by UUID FK(platform_users) NOT NULL, notes TEXT. UNIQUE(route_id, assignment_date) WHERE is_recurring = false AND assignment_date IS NOT NULL — one custodian per route per day. INDEX(employee_id, assignment_date). INDEX(route_id, is_recurring).
fac_cleaning_route_completionsRecords a custodian's run through a route on a specific date. Created when the custodian starts their route; updated as they work through stops. id UUID PK(v7), route_id UUID FK(fac_cleaning_routes) NOT NULL, assignment_id UUID FK(fac_cleaning_route_assignments) NOT NULL, employee_id UUID (SOFT INTEGRITY → hr_employees.id) NOT NULL, completion_date DATE NOT NULL, started_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable, completed_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable, overall_status ENUM(NOT_STARTED,IN_PROGRESS,COMPLETED,PARTIAL) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'NOT_STARTED' (PARTIAL: custodian finished but not all stops were completed — partial completion still closes the run), supervisor_notes TEXT nullable. UNIQUE(route_id, employee_id, completion_date). INDEX(route_id, completion_date). INDEX(employee_id, completion_date).
fac_cleaning_route_stop_completionsPer-stop completion record within a route run. id UUID PK(v7), completion_id UUID FK(fac_cleaning_route_completions) NOT NULL, stop_id UUID FK(fac_cleaning_route_stops) NOT NULL, status ENUM(PENDING,COMPLETED,SKIPPED) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDING', completed_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable, skip_reason TEXT nullable, tasks_completed TEXT[] nullable (which tasks from the stop cleaning_tasks list were completed — allows partial task completion within a stop), photo_s3_keys TEXT[] nullable (photographic evidence of cleaned space — optional), issues_noted TEXT nullable (issue observed at stop — e.g. broken tile, water leak). UNIQUE(completion_id, stop_id). INDEX(completion_id, status). On issues_noted IS NOT NULL: emit fac.route_stop.issue_noted Kafka event → Task Worker creates tkt_ticket in Facilities category with space_id and issue description.
fac_space_closuresTemporary dated closure of a space — e.g. classroom under renovation, flood damage, pest control. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, space_id UUID FK(fac_spaces) NOT NULL, closure_reason TEXT NOT NULL, starts_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, ends_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable (null = indefinite — remains closed until manually reopened), affects_scheduling BOOLEAN DEFAULT true (when true: scheduling module treats this space as unavailable during the closure period — advisory, enforced at application layer), linked_work_order_id UUID (SOFT INTEGRITY → fac_work_orders.id nullable — the work order causing the closure), created_by UUID FK(platform_users) NOT NULL. INDEX(space_id, starts_at). INDEX(school_id, ends_at) WHERE ends_at IS NOT NULL — active closure query.
fac_zone_inspectionsCustodial quality spot checks on a zone — supervisor verifying cleaning standards. id UUID PK(v7), zone_id UUID FK(fac_zones) NOT NULL, inspector_id UUID (SOFT INTEGRITY → hr_employees.id) NOT NULL, inspection_date DATE NOT NULL, overall_rating ENUM(PASS,NEEDS_IMPROVEMENT,FAIL) NOT NULL, notes TEXT nullable, follow_up_required BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, follow_up_work_order_id UUID (SOFT INTEGRITY → fac_work_orders.id nullable — remedial work order raised if FAIL). INDEX(zone_id, inspection_date DESC).
fac_asset_disposalsDisposal record for a decommissioned facilities asset. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, asset_id UUID FK(fac_assets) NOT NULL UNIQUE (one disposal record per asset), disposal_method ENUM(AUCTION,DONATION,SKIP,TRADE_IN,SCRAP,TRANSFER) NOT NULL, disposal_date DATE NOT NULL, value_recovered NUMERIC(10,2) nullable (proceeds from auction or trade-in — null for skip/scrap/donation), recipient_name TEXT nullable (donee organisation or auction house), disposed_by UUID FK(hr_employees) NOT NULL, authorised_by UUID FK(platform_users) NOT NULL, notes TEXT. On INSERT: fac_assets.status verified = DECOMMISSIONED (application-layer check).
fac_work_order_attachmentsPhotos and documents attached to a work order — before/after photos, quotes, reports. id UUID PK(v7), work_order_id UUID FK(fac_work_orders) NOT NULL, s3_key TEXT NOT NULL, filename TEXT NOT NULL, attachment_type ENUM(PHOTO_BEFORE,PHOTO_AFTER,QUOTE,INVOICE,REPORT,OTHER) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'OTHER', uploaded_by UUID FK(platform_users) NOT NULL, uploaded_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL. INDEX(work_order_id, attachment_type).
fac_work_order_partsMaterials and parts consumed during a work order. id UUID PK(v7), work_order_id UUID FK(fac_work_orders) NOT NULL, part_name TEXT NOT NULL, quantity NUMERIC(8,2) NOT NULL, unit TEXT nullable (e.g. 'litres', 'units', 'metres'), unit_cost NUMERIC(8,2) nullable, total_cost NUMERIC(10,2) nullable, supplier TEXT nullable. INDEX(work_order_id).
fac_supply_stocktakesFormal periodic physical supply count. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, building_id UUID FK(fac_buildings) NOT NULL, conducted_by UUID FK(hr_employees) NOT NULL, stocktake_date DATE NOT NULL, status ENUM(IN_PROGRESS,COMPLETED) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'IN_PROGRESS', completed_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable, notes TEXT. INDEX(building_id, stocktake_date DESC).
fac_supply_stocktake_itemsPer-item count within a supply stocktake. id UUID PK(v7), stocktake_id UUID FK(fac_supply_stocktakes) NOT NULL, inventory_id UUID FK(fac_supply_inventory) NOT NULL, expected_quantity NUMERIC(8,2) NOT NULL (current_quantity at time stocktake began — snapshot), actual_quantity NUMERIC(8,2) NOT NULL (physically counted quantity), discrepancy_notes TEXT nullable. UNIQUE(stocktake_id, inventory_id). On stocktake COMPLETED: application layer creates fac_supply_transactions ADJUSTMENT rows for any items where actual_quantity != expected_quantity, updating fac_supply_inventory.current_quantity to actual.
fac_fire_drillsFire drill compliance log. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, building_id UUID FK(fac_buildings) NOT NULL, drill_date DATE NOT NULL, drill_time TIME NOT NULL, duration_seconds INT NOT NULL (total time from alarm to all-clear), total_occupants INT NOT NULL (headcount at time of drill), evacuation_time_seconds INT NOT NULL (time for last person to exit building), issues_noted TEXT nullable (any issues observed during the drill — non-compliance, slow evacuation routes, etc.), all_clear_given_by UUID FK(hr_employees) NOT NULL, conducted_by UUID FK(hr_employees) NOT NULL. INDEX(school_id, drill_date DESC). Most jurisdictions require minimum frequency — alert job can query for schools with no drill in the last 90 days.
fac_hazardous_materialsAsbestos and hazardous materials register. Legal compliance requirement in most jurisdictions. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, building_id UUID FK(fac_buildings) NOT NULL, space_id UUID FK(fac_spaces) nullable (null if material spans multiple spaces or is building-wide), material_type ENUM(ASBESTOS,LEAD_PAINT,MOULD,CHEMICAL_STORAGE,RADON,PCB,OTHER) NOT NULL, location_description TEXT NOT NULL (precise location within building/space), survey_date DATE NOT NULL, surveyor_name TEXT, survey_document_s3_key TEXT nullable, condition ENUM(GOOD,FAIR,POOR,DETERIORATING) NOT NULL, management_action ENUM(ENCAPSULATED,REMOVED,MONITORING,PLANNED_REMOVAL) NOT NULL, next_inspection_date DATE nullable, notes TEXT. INDEX(school_id, management_action). INDEX(building_id).
fac_building_insuranceBuilding insurance policy records. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, building_id UUID FK(fac_buildings) NOT NULL, insurer TEXT NOT NULL, policy_number TEXT NOT NULL, policy_type ENUM(BUILDINGS,CONTENTS,LIABILITY,ALL_RISKS,COMBINED) NOT NULL, coverage_amount NUMERIC(12,2) nullable, annual_premium NUMERIC(10,2) nullable, effective_from DATE NOT NULL, expiry_date DATE NOT NULL, renewal_reminder_days INT DEFAULT 60 (days before expiry to trigger renewal alert task), document_s3_key TEXT nullable (policy document), broker_contact TEXT nullable. INDEX(building_id, expiry_date). Alert job: renewal_reminder_days before expiry_date.
rpt_facilities_conditionMaterialised asset and space condition report for FM dashboard. One row per asset, updated nightly. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, asset_id UUID FK(fac_assets) NOT NULL UNIQUE, building_id UUID FK NOT NULL, space_id UUID FK nullable, asset_name TEXT NOT NULL, asset_status TEXT NOT NULL, open_work_orders_count INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, overdue_maintenance_count INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, last_inspection_outcome TEXT nullable, last_inspection_date DATE nullable, days_since_last_maintenance INT nullable, replacement_priority TEXT nullable. INDEX(school_id, replacement_priority). INDEX(school_id, open_work_orders_count) WHERE open_work_orders_count > 0.
rpt_facilities_kpiMaterialised facilities KPI read model for FM reporting. One row per school per week. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, week_starting DATE NOT NULL, work_orders_opened INT NOT NULL, work_orders_completed INT NOT NULL, work_orders_overdue INT NOT NULL, avg_resolution_days NUMERIC(5,1), total_maintenance_cost NUMERIC(10,2), pct_maintenance_tasks_on_schedule NUMERIC(5,4), vendor_work_order_count INT NOT NULL, internal_work_order_count INT NOT NULL. UNIQUE(school_id, week_starting). INDEX(school_id, week_starting DESC).
fac_inspection_typesid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID nullable (null = platform-seeded type), name TEXT NOT NULL, issuing_authority TEXT (e.g. 'Fire Marshal', 'County Health Dept', 'State Elevator Board'), frequency_months INT NOT NULL, is_mandatory BOOLEAN DEFAULT true, failure_escalation_days INT (days to resolve violation before escalation alert). UNIQUE(COALESCE(school_id,'00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000'), name).
fac_inspectionsid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID, inspection_type_id UUID FK, building_id UUID FK, asset_id UUID FK nullable, scheduled_date DATE, conducted_date DATE, inspector_name TEXT, inspector_agency TEXT, outcome ENUM(PASSED,PASSED_WITH_CONDITIONS,FAILED,PENDING) NOT NULL, certificate_s3_key TEXT, next_due_date DATE, notes TEXT. IMMUTABLE once outcome is set — no UPDATE on outcome or conducted_date after submission. INDEX(school_id, inspection_type_id, next_due_date). On outcome = FAILED or PASSED_WITH_CONDITIONS: emit fac.inspection.failed Kafka event.
fac_inspection_violationsid UUID PK(v7), inspection_id UUID FK, description TEXT NOT NULL, severity ENUM(MINOR,MAJOR,CRITICAL), due_date DATE NOT NULL, resolved_at TIMESTAMPTZ, resolved_by UUID (SOFT INTEGRITY → hr_employees.id), resolution_notes TEXT, linked_work_order_id UUID (SOFT INTEGRITY → fac_work_orders.id). INDEX(inspection_id, resolved_at) WHERE resolved_at IS NULL — active violations query instantaneous. On violation overdue: emit fac.inspection_violation.overdue Kafka event.

### Supply Inventory (2 tables)

TableDefinition
fac_supply_inventoryid UUID PK(v7), building_id UUID FK, item_name TEXT NOT NULL, unit TEXT NOT NULL (e.g. 'bottles', 'rolls', 'boxes'), current_quantity NUMERIC(8,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, reorder_threshold NUMERIC(8,2) NOT NULL, preferred_vendor_id UUID FK(tkt_vendors) nullable (registered vendor from tkt_vendors — preferred for structured procurement), preferred_vendor_text TEXT nullable (free-text vendor name for suppliers not in tkt_vendors registry — one of preferred_vendor_id or preferred_vendor_text should be set but neither is mandatory). CHECK(current_quantity >= 0). When current_quantity drops below reorder_threshold: emit fac.supply.reorder_needed Kafka event → Task Worker (M1) auto-creates procurement task. UNIQUE(building_id, item_name).
fac_supply_transactionsid UUID PK(v7), inventory_id UUID FK, transaction_type ENUM(USAGE,RESTOCK,ADJUSTMENT,WRITEOFF), quantity_delta NUMERIC(8,2) NOT NULL, performed_by UUID FK, notes TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ. Append-only — no UPDATE or DELETE. RANGE partition by created_at monthly. INDEX(inventory_id, created_at DESC).

### Kafka Events — M65 Facilities Management

EventConsumersNotes
fac.work_order.createdCommunications (M40), Calendar (M3)Notifies assigned custodian; creates calendar item via delta-update worker
fac.maintenance_task.overdueTask Worker (M1)Auto-creates follow-up task; alerts facilities manager
fac.supply.reorder_neededTask Worker (M1)Auto-creates procurement task
fac.inspection.failedTask Worker (M1), Communications (M40)Creates urgent resolution tasks; notifies principal and facilities manager
fac.inspection_violation.overdueTask Worker (M1), Communications (M40)Escalation alert when violation due_date passes unresolved
fac.space.createdFacilities (M65)Scheduling (M22)
fac.space.deactivatedFacilities (M65)Scheduling (M22)
M80HR / Workforceprefix: hr_48 tablesWave 1
TableDefinition
hr_employeesid UUID PK(v7), person_id UUID FK(iam_person) NOT NULL UNIQUE (the employee's human identity — per ADR-055; name/DOB/NI from iam_person), account_id UUID FK(platform_users) NOT NULL UNIQUE (their portal login account), school_id UUID, employee_number TEXT, position_id UUID FK, employment_type ENUM(FULL_TIME,PART_TIME,CASUAL,SUBSTITUTE), employment_status ENUM(ACTIVE,ON_LEAVE,TERMINATED), hire_date DATE, termination_date DATE, notice_given_date DATE nullable (date the employee or employer gave notice of termination), notice_period_days INT nullable (contractual notice period in days), last_working_day DATE nullable (actual final day — may differ from termination_date if notice is paid in lieu). INDEX(school_id, employment_status).
hr_positionsid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID, title TEXT NOT NULL, department_id UUID FK, is_teaching_role BOOLEAN. UNIQUE(school_id, title).
hr_employee_positionsid UUID PK(v7), employee_id UUID FK, position_id UUID FK, effective_from DATE, effective_to DATE. INDEX(employee_id, effective_from DESC).
hr_leave_typesid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID, name TEXT NOT NULL, is_paid BOOLEAN, accrual_rate NUMERIC(5,2), max_balance NUMERIC(5,2).
hr_leave_balancesUNIQUE(employee_id, leave_type_id, academic_year_id). accrued NUMERIC(5,2), used NUMERIC(5,2), pending NUMERIC(5,2).
hr_leave_requestsid UUID PK(v7), employee_id UUID FK, leave_type_id UUID FK, start_date DATE, end_date DATE, days_requested NUMERIC(4,1), status ENUM(PENDING,APPROVED,REJECTED,CANCELLED), reason TEXT, linked_approval_id UUID FK(wsk_approval_requests), is_hr_initiated BOOLEAN DEFAULT false (when true: leave was placed by HR admin on behalf of employee, e.g. administrative leave, suspension with pay — employee does not initiate; auto-approved), hr_initiated_by UUID FK(platform_users) nullable (the HR admin who initiated the leave), hr_initiated_reason TEXT nullable. INDEX(employee_id, status).
hr_pay_periodsid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID, start_date DATE, end_date DATE, pay_date DATE, status ENUM(OPEN,PROCESSING,PAID,CLOSED). UNIQUE(school_id, start_date).
hr_payroll_recordsUNIQUE(employee_id, pay_period_id). gross_pay NUMERIC(10,2), net_pay NUMERIC(10,2), tax_withheld NUMERIC(10,2), deductions JSONB, paystub_s3_key TEXT.
hr_benefit_plansid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID, name TEXT, benefit_type ENUM(HEALTH,DENTAL,VISION,RETIREMENT,LIFE), provider TEXT, employee_cost NUMERIC(8,2), employer_cost NUMERIC(8,2), plan_year_start MONTH_DAY TEXT nullable (e.g. '01-01' for Jan 1 — defines the plan year for open enrolment), summary_plan_description_s3_key TEXT nullable (SPD document for compliance), is_cobra_eligible BOOLEAN DEFAULT true.
hr_employee_benefitsUNIQUE(employee_id, benefit_plan_id). enrolled_at DATE, waiver_reason TEXT.
hr_pd_eventsid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID, title TEXT NOT NULL, pd_type ENUM(WORKSHOP,CONFERENCE,ONLINE,COACHING,PEER_OBSERVATION), date DATE, duration_hours NUMERIC(4,1), credit_hours NUMERIC(4,1), facilitator TEXT.
hr_pd_attendanceUNIQUE(employee_id, pd_event_id). attendance_status ENUM(ATTENDED,ABSENT,PARTIAL), certificate_s3_key TEXT.
hr_contractsid UUID PK(v7), employee_id UUID FK, contract_type ENUM(PERMANENT,FIXED_TERM,PROBATIONARY), start_date DATE, end_date DATE, salary NUMERIC(10,2), contract_s3_key TEXT, signature_request_id UUID FK(platform_signature_requests), probation_end_date DATE nullable (populated for PROBATIONARY contracts — expected end of probationary period), probation_review_date DATE nullable (date set for formal probation review meeting), probation_outcome ENUM(PASSED,EXTENDED,FAILED) nullable (set when probation period concludes — EXTENDED creates a new probation period; FAILED triggers termination workflow), probation_extension_reason TEXT nullable.
hr_discipline_categoriesid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID, name TEXT, severity ENUM(MINOR,MODERATE,SERIOUS,GROSS_MISCONDUCT).
hr_discipline_action_typesid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID, name TEXT, requires_hr_approval BOOLEAN.
hr_staff_discipline_recordsid UUID PK(v7), employee_id UUID FK, category_id UUID FK, action_type_id UUID FK, incident_date DATE, description TEXT, outcome TEXT, status ENUM(OPEN,UNDER_REVIEW,CLOSED), linked_approval_id UUID FK. INDEX(employee_id, incident_date DESC).
hr_timekeeping_recordsid UUID PK(v7), employee_id UUID FK, pay_period_id UUID FK, work_date DATE, clock_in TIMESTAMPTZ, clock_out TIMESTAMPTZ, hours_worked NUMERIC(5,2), notes TEXT. INDEX(employee_id, work_date DESC).
M84HR Appraisalsprefix: hr_appraisal_0 tablesWave 4 — future scope
TableDefinition
hr_appraisal_cyclesid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID, name TEXT NOT NULL, academic_year_id UUID FK, cycle_type ENUM(ANNUAL,MID_YEAR,PROBATIONARY,INFORMAL), status ENUM(PLANNING,ACTIVE,COMPLETED). UNIQUE(school_id, academic_year_id, cycle_type).
hr_appraisalsUNIQUE(cycle_id, employee_id). id UUID PK(v7), appraiser_id UUID FK(hr_employees), overall_rating ENUM(OUTSTANDING,GOOD,REQUIRES_IMPROVEMENT,INADEQUATE), status ENUM(DRAFT,IN_REVIEW,SIGNED_OFF), linked_approval_id UUID FK. Appraisal locked to edits when linked_approval_id is set until wsk_approval_requests resolves.
hr_appraisal_goalsid UUID PK(v7), appraisal_id UUID FK, goal_text TEXT NOT NULL, target_date DATE, progress ENUM(NOT_STARTED,IN_PROGRESS,ACHIEVED,NOT_ACHIEVED).
hr_lesson_observationsid UUID PK(v7), appraisal_id UUID FK, observer_id UUID FK(hr_employees), observed_employee_id UUID FK(hr_employees), observation_date DATE NOT NULL, observed_class_label TEXT NOT NULL (denormalised snapshot — captured at observation time, never changes — ADR-022-A), observed_class_id UUID (SOFT INTEGRITY → sis_classes.id — application-layer resolution only, no DB FK), duration_minutes INT, overall_grade ENUM(OUTSTANDING,GOOD,REQUIRES_IMPROVEMENT,INADEQUATE), notes TEXT. INDEX(appraisal_id). Observer must hold lesson_observation:write permission. Teachers cannot observe themselves.
hr_appraisal_commentsid UUID PK(v7), appraisal_id UUID FK, author_id UUID FK, comment_text TEXT NOT NULL, is_visible_to_employee BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ. INDEX(appraisal_id, created_at).
hr_expense_claimsEmployee expense claim for reimbursement. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, employee_id UUID FK(hr_employees) NOT NULL, claim_title TEXT NOT NULL (e.g. 'Classroom supplies — October 2026'), claim_period_start DATE NOT NULL, claim_period_end DATE NOT NULL, total_amount NUMERIC(10,2) NOT NULL (computed from sum of hr_expense_claim_items — denormalised for display), status ENUM(DRAFT,SUBMITTED,UNDER_REVIEW,APPROVED,REJECTED,PAID) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'DRAFT', submitted_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable, linked_approval_id UUID FK(wsk_approval_requests) nullable (populated on SUBMITTED — Approval Workflow routes to line manager), reviewed_by UUID FK(platform_users) nullable, reviewed_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable, reviewer_notes TEXT nullable, paid_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable, payment_reference TEXT nullable. INDEX(employee_id, status). INDEX(school_id, status) WHERE status IN ('SUBMITTED','UNDER_REVIEW') — manager review queue. On SUBMITTED: WorkflowEngineService creates approval request; Task Worker creates review task for line manager.
hr_expense_claim_itemsIndividual line item within an expense claim. id UUID PK(v7), claim_id UUID FK(hr_expense_claims) NOT NULL, expense_date DATE NOT NULL, category ENUM(CLASSROOM_SUPPLIES,TRAVEL,ACCOMMODATION,MEALS,PROFESSIONAL_DEVELOPMENT,TECHNOLOGY,OTHER) NOT NULL, description TEXT NOT NULL, amount NUMERIC(8,2) NOT NULL, receipt_s3_key TEXT nullable (scanned or photographed receipt — signed S3 URL; required for items over school-configured threshold), vat_amount NUMERIC(8,2) nullable (VAT/tax component — for schools in VAT-registered jurisdictions), is_mileage_claim BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, mileage_distance_km NUMERIC(6,1) nullable, mileage_rate_per_km NUMERIC(5,4) nullable. INDEX(claim_id).
hr_appraisal_responsesTeacher self-assessment response within their appraisal. id UUID PK(v7), appraisal_id UUID FK(hr_appraisals) NOT NULL, employee_id UUID FK(hr_employees) NOT NULL, response_type ENUM(SELF_ASSESSMENT,GOAL_REFLECTION,OVERALL_COMMENT) NOT NULL, response_text TEXT NOT NULL, submitted_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, is_locked BOOLEAN DEFAULT false (locked once appraiser marks appraisal IN_REVIEW). UNIQUE(appraisal_id, employee_id, response_type). INDEX(appraisal_id, employee_id).
hr_staff_certificationsProfessional certifications, licences, and mandatory training records for employees. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, employee_id UUID FK(hr_employees) NOT NULL, certification_type ENUM(TEACHING_LICENCE,FIRST_AID,SAFEGUARDING_LEVEL1,SAFEGUARDING_LEVEL2,DBS_BASIC,DBS_ENHANCED,FOOD_HYGIENE,FIRE_SAFETY_WARDEN,SPECIALIST_SUBJECT,CUSTOM) NOT NULL, certification_name TEXT NOT NULL, issuing_body TEXT, reference_number TEXT nullable, issued_date DATE NOT NULL, expiry_date DATE nullable (null = does not expire), verification_status ENUM(PENDING,VERIFIED,EXPIRED,REVOKED) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDING', document_s3_key TEXT nullable (scanned certificate), verified_by UUID FK(platform_users) nullable, verified_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable, notes TEXT. INDEX(employee_id, expiry_date). INDEX(school_id, verification_status, expiry_date) WHERE expiry_date IS NOT NULL. Alert job: 90 days and 30 days and 7 days before expiry_date — notifies employee and HR admin. Follows ADR-015 pattern for DBS: store reference_number + verification_status only, never store raw DBS certificate data.
hr_cpd_requirementsid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID, position_id UUID FK, academic_year_id UUID FK, required_pd_hours NUMERIC(4,1), required_credit_hours NUMERIC(4,1). UNIQUE(school_id, position_id, academic_year_id).
hr_training_requirementsMandatory training obligations per position or school-wide. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, position_id UUID FK nullable (null = applies to all staff at the school), training_name TEXT NOT NULL, certification_type ENUM(TEACHING_LICENCE,FIRST_AID,SAFEGUARDING_LEVEL1,SAFEGUARDING_LEVEL2,DBS_BASIC,DBS_ENHANCED,FOOD_HYGIENE,FIRE_SAFETY_WARDEN,SPECIALIST_SUBJECT,CUSTOM) nullable (links to hr_staff_certifications.certification_type for automatic compliance tracking), frequency ENUM(ONE_TIME,ANNUAL,BIENNIAL,TRIENNIAL,CUSTOM) NOT NULL, custom_interval_days INT nullable (for CUSTOM frequency), deadline_month INT nullable (month by which renewal must be completed each cycle), is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true, created_by UUID FK NOT NULL. UNIQUE(school_id, COALESCE(position_id,'00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000'), training_name).
hr_training_complianceMaterialised per-employee per-requirement compliance status. Updated nightly by TrainingComplianceWorker. id UUID PK(v7), employee_id UUID FK(hr_employees) NOT NULL, requirement_id UUID FK(hr_training_requirements) NOT NULL, is_compliant BOOLEAN NOT NULL, last_completed_date DATE nullable, next_due_date DATE nullable, linked_certification_id UUID FK(hr_staff_certifications) nullable (the specific certification record satisfying this requirement), days_until_due INT nullable. UNIQUE(employee_id, requirement_id). INDEX(employee_id, is_compliant). INDEX(school_id, is_compliant, next_due_date) WHERE is_compliant = false — HR compliance dashboard.
hr_benefit_enrolment_periodsAnnual open enrolment window during which employees may change benefit elections. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, name TEXT NOT NULL (e.g. '2027 Open Enrolment'), plan_year_start DATE NOT NULL, plan_year_end DATE NOT NULL, enrolment_opens_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, enrolment_closes_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, status ENUM(UPCOMING,OPEN,CLOSED) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'UPCOMING', notes TEXT. UNIQUE(school_id, plan_year_start). On status → OPEN: Task Worker creates ADMINISTRATIVE task for all active employees to review their benefit elections.
hr_cobra_electionsCOBRA continuation coverage tracking for terminated employees. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, employee_id UUID FK(hr_employees) NOT NULL, benefit_plan_id UUID FK(hr_benefit_plans) NOT NULL, qualifying_event ENUM(TERMINATION,REDUCTION_IN_HOURS,DIVORCE,DEPENDENT_AGE_OUT,DEATH_OF_EMPLOYEE,MEDICARE_ENTITLEMENT) NOT NULL, qualifying_event_date DATE NOT NULL, election_deadline DATE NOT NULL (qualifying_event_date + 60 days), elected BOOLEAN nullable (null = not yet decided), elected_at DATE nullable, coverage_start DATE nullable, coverage_end DATE nullable (max 18 months from qualifying event for most events; 36 months for others), monthly_premium NUMERIC(8,2), payment_status ENUM(CURRENT,OVERDUE,TERMINATED) nullable. INDEX(employee_id). INDEX(school_id, payment_status) WHERE elected = true.
hr_pay_gradesPay band/grade framework. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, grade_name TEXT NOT NULL (e.g. 'Teacher Grade 1', 'M1', 'UPS3'), min_salary NUMERIC(10,2) NOT NULL, max_salary NUMERIC(10,2) NOT NULL, increment_value NUMERIC(8,2) nullable (annual increment amount within the grade), applicable_to TEXT[] nullable (position titles or employment types this grade applies to). UNIQUE(school_id, grade_name).
hr_payroll_adjustmentsOne-off payroll adjustments outside normal payroll: retroactive pay, bonuses, back pay, recovery of overpayments. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, employee_id UUID FK(hr_employees) NOT NULL, adjustment_type ENUM(RETROACTIVE_PAY,BONUS,BACK_PAY,OVERPAYMENT_RECOVERY,SIGNING_BONUS,SEVERANCE,OTHER) NOT NULL, amount NUMERIC(10,2) NOT NULL (positive = additional payment; negative = recovery), effective_pay_period_id UUID FK(hr_pay_periods) NOT NULL (the pay period in which this adjustment will be processed), reason TEXT NOT NULL, approved_by UUID FK(platform_users) NOT NULL, approved_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, processed_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable. INDEX(employee_id, effective_pay_period_id). INDEX(school_id, processed_at) WHERE processed_at IS NULL — pending adjustment queue.
hr_salary_review_requestsDepartment Head formal recommendation for a salary review or increment for a department staff member. Routes to HR admin and principal via approval workflow. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, requested_by UUID FK(hr_employees) NOT NULL (the DH making the recommendation), employee_id UUID FK(hr_employees) NOT NULL (the staff member being recommended), review_type ENUM(ANNUAL_INCREMENT,PROMOTION,MARKET_ADJUSTMENT,PERFORMANCE_BONUS,RETENTION) NOT NULL, current_salary NUMERIC(10,2) NOT NULL (snapshot at time of request), recommended_salary NUMERIC(10,2) nullable (for increment/adjustment — null for bonus requests), recommended_bonus_amount NUMERIC(10,2) nullable (for PERFORMANCE_BONUS type), justification TEXT NOT NULL, supporting_evidence TEXT nullable (e.g. appraisal rating, exam results, additional responsibilities), status ENUM(DRAFT,SUBMITTED,UNDER_REVIEW,APPROVED,REJECTED,WITHDRAWN) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'DRAFT', linked_approval_id UUID FK(wsk_approval_requests) nullable, reviewed_by UUID FK(platform_users) nullable, reviewed_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable, reviewer_notes TEXT nullable, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ. INDEX(school_id, status). INDEX(requested_by, created_at DESC). INDEX(employee_id).
hr_return_to_work_plansPhased return-to-work plan for employees recovering from extended illness or injury. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, employee_id UUID FK(hr_employees) NOT NULL, leave_request_id UUID FK(hr_leave_requests) NOT NULL, plan_start_date DATE NOT NULL, plan_end_date DATE nullable, phase_details JSONB NOT NULL (array of {phase_number, start_date, end_date, hours_per_day, duties_adjustment, notes}), occupational_health_clearance_date DATE nullable, gp_fit_note_s3_key TEXT nullable, status ENUM(DRAFT,ACTIVE,COMPLETED,ABANDONED) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'DRAFT', created_by UUID FK(platform_users) NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ. INDEX(employee_id, status).
hr_work_authorisationEmployee right-to-work and work authorisation documentation (I-9 / UK Right to Work). id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, employee_id UUID FK(hr_employees) NOT NULL UNIQUE, document_type ENUM(US_PASSPORT,US_PASSPORT_CARD,PERMANENT_RESIDENT_CARD,EMPLOYMENT_AUTHORISATION,FOREIGN_PASSPORT_WITH_VISA,UK_PASSPORT,UK_BRP,OTHER) NOT NULL, document_reference TEXT nullable (document number — stored securely, encrypted at rest), expiry_date DATE nullable (null for non-expiring documents), verified_by UUID FK(platform_users) NOT NULL, verified_at DATE NOT NULL, reverification_due_date DATE nullable (for time-limited authorisation), document_s3_key TEXT nullable (scanned document). INDEX(school_id, reverification_due_date) WHERE reverification_due_date IS NOT NULL. Alert job: 90 days and 30 days before reverification_due_date.
hr_grievancesFormal employee grievance records. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, raised_by UUID FK(hr_employees) NOT NULL, raised_against_id UUID FK(hr_employees) nullable (the individual the grievance is raised against — null for policy/process grievances), grievance_type ENUM(BULLYING,HARASSMENT,DISCRIMINATION,UNFAIR_TREATMENT,HEALTH_AND_SAFETY,PAY_DISPUTE,WORKING_CONDITIONS,OTHER) NOT NULL, description TEXT NOT NULL, date_raised DATE NOT NULL, status ENUM(RECEIVED,INFORMAL_RESOLUTION,FORMAL_INVESTIGATION,HEARING_SCHEDULED,OUTCOME_ISSUED,APPEAL_PENDING,CLOSED) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'RECEIVED', assigned_to UUID FK(hr_employees) nullable (the HR admin or manager handling the grievance), outcome TEXT nullable, outcome_date DATE nullable, appeal_deadline DATE nullable, is_anonymous BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ. INDEX(school_id, status). INDEX(raised_by, created_at DESC).
hr_investigationsFormal HR investigation process — witness statements, findings, and outcomes. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, subject_employee_id UUID FK(hr_employees) NOT NULL (employee under investigation), investigation_type ENUM(DISCIPLINE,GRIEVANCE,SAFEGUARDING,CONDUCT,CAPABILITY) NOT NULL, linked_discipline_id UUID FK(hr_staff_discipline_records) nullable, linked_grievance_id UUID FK(hr_grievances) nullable, investigator_id UUID FK(hr_employees) NOT NULL, investigation_start DATE NOT NULL, investigation_end DATE nullable, status ENUM(PLANNING,ACTIVE,SUSPENDED,CONCLUDED) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PLANNING', findings_summary TEXT nullable, outcome ENUM(NO_CASE_TO_ANSWER,INFORMAL_ACTION,FORMAL_WARNING,FINAL_WARNING,DISMISSAL,REFERRED_EXTERNALLY) nullable, outcome_date DATE nullable, investigation_report_s3_key TEXT nullable. INDEX(school_id, status). INDEX(subject_employee_id).
hr_employee_demographicsEEO/diversity data for workforce reporting compliance. id UUID PK(v7), employee_id UUID FK(hr_employees) NOT NULL UNIQUE, gender ENUM(MALE,FEMALE,NON_BINARY,PREFER_NOT_TO_SAY) nullable, ethnicity TEXT nullable (free text or school-configured categories — jurisdiction-dependent), veteran_status ENUM(NOT_A_VETERAN,VETERAN,DISABLED_VETERAN,RECENTLY_SEPARATED_VETERAN,PREFER_NOT_TO_SAY) nullable, disability_status ENUM(NO_DISABILITY,HAS_DISABILITY,PREFER_NOT_TO_SAY) nullable, date_of_birth DATE nullable. All fields nullable — employee self-reports; no field is mandatory. Separate encryption key from hr_employees. Access restricted to HR_ADMIN role with demographics:read permission. Never included in general employee exports. Retention: retained for 3 years after termination (EEO-1 requirement).
hr_appraisal_peer_feedback360-degree peer feedback collected during an appraisal cycle. id UUID PK(v7), appraisal_id UUID FK(hr_appraisals) NOT NULL, requested_by UUID FK(hr_employees) NOT NULL (typically the appraisee or HR admin), respondent_id UUID FK(hr_employees) NOT NULL (the colleague providing feedback), relationship ENUM(PEER,DIRECT_REPORT,LINE_MANAGER,EXTERNAL) NOT NULL, feedback_text TEXT nullable, rating_overall SMALLINT nullable (1-5 scale), submitted_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable, is_anonymous BOOLEAN DEFAULT false. UNIQUE(appraisal_id, respondent_id). INDEX(appraisal_id, submitted_at) WHERE submitted_at IS NOT NULL.
M81Enrollment & Payments + M83 GLprefix: pay_ / enr_ / fin_62 tablesWave 1
TableDefinition
enr_enrollment_periodsid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID, academic_year_id UUID FK, name TEXT, opens_at TIMESTAMPTZ, closes_at TIMESTAMPTZ, status ENUM(UPCOMING,OPEN,CLOSED), allows_mid_year_applications BOOLEAN DEFAULT false (when true: applications can be submitted to this period outside the opens_at/closes_at window with admission_type=MID_YEAR_ADMISSION). INDEX(school_id, opens_at).
enr_applicationsid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, enrollment_period_id UUID FK(enr_enrollment_periods) nullable (NULL for out-of-cycle admissions — mid-year, transfers, returning students), stream_id UUID FK(enr_admission_streams) nullable (the admission stream this application is for — null for standard intake), student_id UUID FK(sis_students) nullable (null until a sis_students record is created on acceptance), applicant_platform_student_id UUID FK(platform_students) nullable (the platform-level student identity if already known — e.g. sibling already at school), guardian_id UUID FK(sis_guardians) NOT NULL, admission_type ENUM(STANDARD_INTAKE,MID_YEAR_ADMISSION,TRANSFER_IN,RETURNING_STUDENT,INTERNATIONAL,RE_ENROLLMENT) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'STANDARD_INTAKE', applying_for_grade_level TEXT NOT NULL, status ENUM(DRAFT,SUBMITTED,UNDER_REVIEW,ACCEPTED,REJECTED,WAITLISTED,OFFER_ISSUED,OFFER_ACCEPTED,OFFER_DECLINED,WITHDRAWN_BY_FAMILY) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'DRAFT', rejection_reason_category ENUM(CAPACITY,ELIGIBILITY_CRITERIA,INCOMPLETE_APPLICATION,BEHAVIOUR_HISTORY,FEE_DEFAULT,OTHER) nullable (required when status=REJECTED — provides the documented basis for the decision), rejection_notes TEXT nullable, submitted_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable, reviewed_by UUID FK(platform_users) nullable, reviewed_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable, priority_score NUMERIC(8,2) nullable (computed from enr_application_scores — cached here for ranking display), sibling_at_school BOOLEAN DEFAULT false (set automatically when family_id links to an existing enrolled student — used for sibling priority). INDEX(school_id, status). INDEX(school_id, enrollment_period_id, applying_for_grade_level, priority_score DESC) — ranking query. INDEX(guardian_id, school_id).
enr_application_form_responsesUNIQUE(application_id, field_definition_id). response_value JSONB.
enr_application_documentsid UUID PK(v7), application_id UUID FK, document_type TEXT, s3_key TEXT NOT NULL, uploaded_at TIMESTAMPTZ. Signed S3 URLs only.
enr_admission_streamsA named parallel intake stream within an enrollment period — standard intake, music scholarship, SEND specialist, faith criteria stream. id UUID PK(v7), enrollment_period_id UUID FK(enr_enrollment_periods) NOT NULL, name TEXT NOT NULL (e.g. 'Standard Intake', 'Music Scholarship', 'SEND Specialist Provision'), description TEXT nullable, grade_level TEXT nullable (null = stream applies to all grade levels), opens_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable (can have different open/close dates from the main period), closes_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable, is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true. UNIQUE(enrollment_period_id, name).
enr_intake_capacitiesPlaces available per grade level per enrollment period. id UUID PK(v7), enrollment_period_id UUID FK(enr_enrollment_periods) NOT NULL, stream_id UUID FK(enr_admission_streams) nullable (null = applies to the general intake; set for stream-specific capacities), grade_level TEXT NOT NULL, total_places INT NOT NULL, reserved_places INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 (reserved for specific categories — e.g. looked-after children, EHCP holders — not included in general offer pool), notes TEXT nullable. UNIQUE(enrollment_period_id, COALESCE(stream_id, '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000'), grade_level).
enr_capacity_summaryMaterialised capacity dashboard per grade per enrollment period. Updated on every application status change. id UUID PK(v7), enrollment_period_id UUID FK(enr_enrollment_periods) NOT NULL, grade_level TEXT NOT NULL, total_places INT NOT NULL, offers_issued INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, offers_accepted INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, offers_declined INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, offers_pending_response INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, waitlist_length INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, places_remaining INT NOT NULL (computed: total_places - offers_accepted), last_updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL. UNIQUE(enrollment_period_id, grade_level). INDEX(enrollment_period_id, places_remaining).
enr_admissions_policiesPublished admissions policy document per enrollment period. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, academic_year_id UUID FK NOT NULL, policy_document_s3_key TEXT NOT NULL (the published admissions policy PDF), published_at DATE NOT NULL, consultation_deadline DATE nullable (for schools required to consult on admissions policies), appeals_process_description TEXT nullable, version TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '1.0'. UNIQUE(school_id, academic_year_id).
enr_admission_criteriaStructured admissions selection criteria with weighting — used for priority scoring when oversubscribed. id UUID PK(v7), enrollment_period_id UUID FK(enr_enrollment_periods) NOT NULL, stream_id UUID FK(enr_admission_streams) nullable, criterion_name TEXT NOT NULL (e.g. 'Sibling at school', 'Catchment area', 'Faith criteria', 'Distance from school'), criterion_type ENUM(SIBLING_PRIORITY,CATCHMENT_AREA,FAITH,DISTANCE,LOOKED_AFTER_CHILD,EHCP,STAFF_CHILD,CUSTOM) NOT NULL, weight NUMERIC(5,2) NOT NULL (points awarded when this criterion is met), scoring_method ENUM(AUTOMATIC,MANUAL) NOT NULL (AUTOMATIC: system computes from data — e.g. sibling flag, distance; MANUAL: EO scores each application against this criterion), sort_order INT NOT NULL (display and evaluation order). UNIQUE(enrollment_period_id, criterion_name).
enr_application_scoresPer-application score against each admission criterion. id UUID PK(v7), application_id UUID FK(enr_applications) NOT NULL, criterion_id UUID FK(enr_admission_criteria) NOT NULL, score NUMERIC(5,2) NOT NULL (actual points awarded — may be full weight or partial), scored_by UUID FK(platform_users) nullable (null for AUTOMATIC criteria), scored_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, notes TEXT nullable. UNIQUE(application_id, criterion_id). On INSERT or UPDATE: trigger recompute of enr_applications.priority_score = SUM(score) for application.
enr_catchment_zonesGeographic catchment area definition. Students outside the zone may be deprioritised or excluded per admissions policy. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, zone_name TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Primary Catchment', zone_type ENUM(RADIUS_KM,POSTCODE_LIST,POLYGON) NOT NULL, radius_km NUMERIC(6,2) nullable (for RADIUS_KM type), postcode_prefixes TEXT[] nullable (for POSTCODE_LIST type — e.g. {'SW1','SW2'}), polygon_geojson JSONB nullable (for POLYGON type — GeoJSON polygon defining the zone boundary), academic_year_id UUID FK nullable (null = permanent zone), is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true. UNIQUE(school_id, zone_name).
enr_application_notesEO interview notes, assessment results, and staff observations about a specific application. id UUID PK(v7), application_id UUID FK(enr_applications) NOT NULL, note_type ENUM(INTERVIEW_NOTES,ASSESSMENT_RESULT,STAFF_OBSERVATION,REFERENCE_CHECK,VISIT_NOTES,GENERAL) NOT NULL, note_text TEXT NOT NULL, is_confidential BOOLEAN DEFAULT false (when true: visible to EO and admin only, not shared with other staff), created_by UUID FK(platform_users) NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ. INDEX(application_id, created_at DESC).
enr_offersFormal offer of a school place issued to an accepted family. Separate from application status — models the offer lifecycle independently. id UUID PK(v7), application_id UUID FK(enr_applications) NOT NULL UNIQUE, school_id UUID NOT NULL, offer_type ENUM(UNCONDITIONAL,CONDITIONAL) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'UNCONDITIONAL', offer_conditions TEXT[] nullable (for CONDITIONAL offers — e.g. {'Subject to satisfactory Year 6 SATs results','Subject to SEND assessment outcome'}), conditions_met BOOLEAN nullable (null until conditions are evaluated), conditions_evaluated_at DATE nullable, offer_letter_s3_key TEXT nullable (generated PDF offer letter), issued_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, response_deadline TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL (family must respond by this date), family_response ENUM(ACCEPTED,DECLINED,DEFERRED) nullable (null until family responds), family_responded_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable, deferral_target_year_id UUID FK(sis_academic_years) nullable (for DEFERRED — which academic year the family wants to defer to), status ENUM(ISSUED,ACCEPTED,DECLINED,EXPIRED,WITHDRAWN,CONDITIONS_NOT_MET) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ISSUED'. INDEX(school_id, status). INDEX(response_deadline) WHERE status = 'ISSUED' — expiry sweep.
enr_waitlist_entriesStructured waitlist management for oversubscribed grade levels. id UUID PK(v7), application_id UUID FK(enr_applications) NOT NULL UNIQUE, enrollment_period_id UUID FK(enr_enrollment_periods) NOT NULL, grade_level TEXT NOT NULL, queue_position INT NOT NULL, priority_score NUMERIC(8,2) nullable (from enr_application_scores — used to order the waitlist), waitlisted_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, offered_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable (when a place became available and was offered to this family), offer_expires_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable (family has until this time to accept the waitlist offer), offer_accepted_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable, offer_declined_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable, status ENUM(WAITING,OFFERED,ACCEPTED,DECLINED,EXPIRED,REMOVED) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'WAITING'. UNIQUE(enrollment_period_id, grade_level, queue_position) WHERE status = 'WAITING'. INDEX(enrollment_period_id, grade_level, queue_position) WHERE status = 'WAITING' — next in queue query. On offer DECLINED or EXPIRED: EnrollmentWorker advances next WAITING entry; enr_capacity_summary updated.
enr_onboarding_checklistsSchool-level template defining the tasks that must be completed before a new student starts. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, name TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'Standard New Student Checklist', admission_type ENUM(STANDARD_INTAKE,MID_YEAR_ADMISSION,TRANSFER_IN,RETURNING_STUDENT,INTERNATIONAL) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'STANDARD_INTAKE' (different checklist templates for different admission types), is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true. UNIQUE(school_id, name, admission_type).
enr_onboarding_tasksIndividual tasks within a new student onboarding checklist. id UUID PK(v7), checklist_id UUID FK(enr_onboarding_checklists) NOT NULL, task_name TEXT NOT NULL (e.g. 'Uniform ordered', 'Bus route assigned', 'Medical form returned', 'Locker allocated', 'IT account created', 'Library card issued'), task_category ENUM(ADMINISTRATIVE,HEALTH,IT,FACILITIES,TRANSPORT,COMMUNICATIONS,FINANCE) NOT NULL, is_mandatory BOOLEAN DEFAULT true, responsible_role TEXT nullable (e.g. 'Enrollment Officer', 'School Nurse', 'IT Admin' — informational, not system-enforced), sort_order INT NOT NULL, due_days_before_start INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 (0 = due on start date; negative = due N days before start). UNIQUE(checklist_id, task_name). INDEX(checklist_id, sort_order).
enr_student_onboarding_progressPer-student tracking of onboarding checklist completion. Created when an offer is accepted. id UUID PK(v7), application_id UUID FK(enr_applications) NOT NULL, checklist_id UUID FK(enr_onboarding_checklists) NOT NULL, student_id UUID FK(sis_students) nullable (populated when sis_students record is created), started_date DATE NOT NULL, target_start_date DATE NOT NULL, overall_status ENUM(IN_PROGRESS,COMPLETE,OVERDUE) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'IN_PROGRESS', tasks_total INT NOT NULL, tasks_completed INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0. UNIQUE(application_id, checklist_id).
enr_student_onboarding_task_completionsPer-task completion tracking within a student's onboarding checklist. id UUID PK(v7), progress_id UUID FK(enr_student_onboarding_progress) NOT NULL, task_id UUID FK(enr_onboarding_tasks) NOT NULL, status ENUM(PENDING,COMPLETED,WAIVED,OVERDUE) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDING', completed_by UUID FK(platform_users) nullable, completed_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable, notes TEXT nullable. UNIQUE(progress_id, task_id). INDEX(progress_id, status) WHERE status != 'COMPLETED'.
enr_reenrollment_confirmationsReturning student confirmation of place for the following academic year. Replaces the need for a full new application for continuing students. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, student_id UUID FK(sis_students) NOT NULL, academic_year_id UUID FK NOT NULL (the year being confirmed for), submitted_by UUID FK(platform_users) NOT NULL (guardian), confirmed_continuing BOOLEAN NOT NULL (true = family confirms student will continue; false = family notifies of withdrawal), withdrawal_reason TEXT nullable (required when confirmed_continuing=false), submitted_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, processed_by UUID FK(platform_users) nullable, processed_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable. UNIQUE(student_id, academic_year_id). INDEX(school_id, academic_year_id, confirmed_continuing). On confirmed_continuing=false: EnrollmentWorker initiates enr_withdrawal_requests automatically.
enr_mid_year_admission_requestsLightweight intake process for students joining outside the standard enrollment period. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, requested_by UUID FK(platform_users) NOT NULL (guardian or EO), student_first_name TEXT NOT NULL, student_last_name TEXT NOT NULL, student_date_of_birth DATE NOT NULL, applying_for_grade_level TEXT NOT NULL, requested_start_date DATE NOT NULL, admission_reason ENUM(FAMILY_RELOCATION,TRANSFER_FROM_OTHER_SCHOOL,RETURNING_FROM_ABROAD,HOME_EDUCATION_ENDING,LOOKED_AFTER_CHILD,OTHER) NOT NULL, previous_school_name TEXT nullable, previous_school_country TEXT nullable, records_requested BOOLEAN DEFAULT false (has EO requested transfer records from previous school), status ENUM(RECEIVED,CAPACITY_CHECKED,OFFER_MADE,ENROLLED,DECLINED,WITHDRAWN) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'RECEIVED', capacity_available BOOLEAN nullable (set by EO after checking enr_capacity_summary), linked_application_id UUID FK(enr_applications) nullable (created when capacity is confirmed and formal application is started), notes TEXT nullable, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ. INDEX(school_id, status, requested_start_date).
enr_withdrawal_requestsFormal student withdrawal record — initiated by family or school. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, student_id UUID FK(sis_students) NOT NULL, initiated_by ENUM(FAMILY,SCHOOL) NOT NULL, requested_by UUID FK(platform_users) NOT NULL, withdrawal_reason_category ENUM(FAMILY_RELOCATION,TRANSFER_TO_OTHER_SCHOOL,HOME_EDUCATION,EXCLUSION,MEDICAL,FEE_DEFAULT,SAFEGUARDING,GRADUATION,DECEASED,OTHER) NOT NULL, withdrawal_reason_detail TEXT nullable, last_attendance_date DATE NOT NULL, requested_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, destination_school_name TEXT nullable (for TRANSFER_TO_OTHER_SCHOOL), destination_school_country TEXT nullable, records_release_consented BOOLEAN DEFAULT false (family has consented to sending records to receiving school), records_sent_at DATE nullable, status ENUM(REQUESTED,IN_PROGRESS,COMPLETED,CANCELLED) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'REQUESTED', completed_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable, completed_by UUID FK(platform_users) nullable, re_enrollment_hold_placed BOOLEAN DEFAULT false (set to true by EO if school wishes to prevent future re-enrollment — e.g. outstanding fees, exclusion), re_enrollment_hold_reason TEXT nullable. INDEX(school_id, status). INDEX(student_id). On COMPLETED: sis_students.enrollment_status = WITHDRAWN, withdrawal_id set, sis_family_school_links.is_active = false, all active transport assignments cancelled, active tech device assignments flagged for return, lunch account balance transfer prompted.
enr_withdrawal_exit_tasksChecklist of tasks that must be completed as part of a student withdrawal process. Parallel to enr_student_onboarding_tasks but for offboarding. id UUID PK(v7), withdrawal_id UUID FK(enr_withdrawal_requests) NOT NULL, task_name TEXT NOT NULL (e.g. 'Library books returned', 'Device returned', 'Locker cleared', 'Outstanding fees resolved', 'Records package prepared', 'Bus assignment cancelled', 'Lunch account closed'), task_category ENUM(ADMINISTRATIVE,FINANCE,IT,FACILITIES,TRANSPORT,RECORDS) NOT NULL, status ENUM(PENDING,COMPLETED,WAIVED,NOT_APPLICABLE) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDING', completed_by UUID FK(platform_users) nullable, completed_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable, notes TEXT nullable. INDEX(withdrawal_id, status) WHERE status = 'PENDING'.
enr_tour_slotsPublished school tour availability slot. Admin creates slots that prospective families can book. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, tour_date DATE NOT NULL, start_time TIME NOT NULL, end_time TIME NOT NULL, max_bookings INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1 (1 = individual family tour; >1 = group tour with multiple families), current_bookings INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, tour_type ENUM(GENERAL_OPEN_DAY,INDIVIDUAL_FAMILY_TOUR,VIRTUAL_TOUR,SPECIALIST_TOUR) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'INDIVIDUAL_FAMILY_TOUR', led_by UUID FK(hr_employees) nullable (the staff member leading the tour), meeting_point TEXT nullable, notes TEXT nullable (shown to prospective families at booking), is_published BOOLEAN DEFAULT false (when false: visible to staff only — allows preparing slots before opening), is_cancelled BOOLEAN DEFAULT false. UNIQUE(school_id, tour_date, start_time). INDEX(school_id, tour_date, is_published) WHERE is_published = true AND is_cancelled = false — public availability query.
enr_tour_bookingsA prospective family's booking of a school tour slot. id UUID PK(v7), slot_id UUID FK(enr_tour_slots) NOT NULL, booked_by UUID FK(iam_person) NOT NULL (the human booking the tour — a prospective parent; iam_person is created at account provisioning per ADR-055; may not have a sis_guardians record yet), family_name TEXT NOT NULL (denormalised — captured at booking for confirmation emails), contact_email TEXT NOT NULL, contact_phone TEXT nullable, status ENUM(CONFIRMED,CANCELLED,NO_SHOW,COMPLETED) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'CONFIRMED', booked_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, cancelled_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable, cancellation_reason TEXT nullable, linked_application_id UUID FK(enr_applications) nullable (populated if the family later submits an application — links the tour inquiry to the admissions pipeline), notes TEXT nullable (family-provided — e.g. special access requirements). UNIQUE(slot_id, booked_by). INDEX(slot_id, status). INDEX(booked_by, booked_at DESC). On INSERT: slot current_bookings incremented; confirmation notification sent to contact_email. On INSERT with current_bookings = max_bookings: slot marked full.
enr_tour_booking_guestsPeople attending the tour with the primary booker. id UUID PK(v7), booking_id UUID FK(enr_tour_bookings) NOT NULL, guest_type ENUM(ADULT,CHILD,PROSPECTIVE_STUDENT) NOT NULL, first_name TEXT NOT NULL, last_name TEXT NOT NULL, age INT nullable (for PROSPECTIVE_STUDENT — helps tour leader prepare appropriate talking points), notes TEXT nullable. INDEX(booking_id).
pay_family_accountsid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, account_holder_id UUID FK(iam_person) NOT NULL (the human account holder — the adult whose name is on the account; iam_person per ADR-055 and whose approval is required for payments initiated by others), family_id UUID (SOFT INTEGRITY to sis_families.id nullable — links the billing account to the family unit; null for accounts created before the family model was adopted), display_name TEXT nullable (e.g. 'Johnson Family Account' — defaults to account holder name if null), payment_authorisation_policy ENUM(HOLDER_ALWAYS,HOLDER_ABOVE_THRESHOLD,TRUST_ALL_AUTHORISED) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'HOLDER_ALWAYS' (HOLDER_ALWAYS: any payment by a non-account-holder requires account holder approval; HOLDER_ABOVE_THRESHOLD: auto-approve payments below auto_approve_threshold, require approval above; TRUST_ALL_AUTHORISED: any user in pay_family_account_access may pay without approval), auto_approve_threshold NUMERIC(8,2) nullable (for HOLDER_ABOVE_THRESHOLD policy — payments below this amount are auto-approved). UNIQUE(school_id, account_holder_id).
pay_family_account_studentsUNIQUE(family_account_id, student_id). Links students to family account for billing. student_id UUID FK(sis_students) NOT NULL, added_by UUID FK(platform_users) nullable, added_at TIMESTAMPTZ.
pay_invoicesid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID, family_account_id UUID FK, title TEXT NOT NULL, total_amount NUMERIC(10,2), due_date DATE, status ENUM(DRAFT,SENT,PARTIAL,PAID,OVERDUE,CANCELLED). INDEX(school_id, status). INDEX(family_account_id, due_date).
pay_invoice_line_itemsid UUID PK(v7), invoice_id UUID FK, description TEXT NOT NULL, quantity NUMERIC(6,2) DEFAULT 1, unit_price NUMERIC(10,2), total NUMERIC(10,2), fee_schedule_id UUID FK.
pay_paymentsid UUID PK(v7), invoice_id UUID FK, family_account_id UUID FK, amount NUMERIC(10,2) NOT NULL, payment_method ENUM(CARD,BANK_TRANSFER,CASH,CHEQUE,WAIVER), stripe_payment_intent_id TEXT, status ENUM(PENDING,COMPLETED,FAILED,REFUNDED), paid_at TIMESTAMPTZ, receipt_s3_key TEXT nullable (S3 key for the generated PDF receipt — populated asynchronously by the Receipt Generation Worker on payment.received Kafka event; parent can download via signed URL in portal). INDEX(family_account_id, paid_at DESC).
pay_refundsid UUID PK(v7), payment_id UUID FK NOT NULL, family_account_id UUID FK NOT NULL, amount NUMERIC(10,2) NOT NULL, refund_category ENUM(OVERPAYMENT,WITHDRAWAL,PROGRAMME_CANCELLED,ERROR_CORRECTION,GOODWILL,OTHER) NOT NULL, reason TEXT NOT NULL, stripe_refund_id TEXT nullable (Stripe refund reference — null for non-card refunds), status ENUM(PENDING,COMPLETED,FAILED) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDING', authorised_by UUID FK(platform_users) NOT NULL (the admin who authorised the refund — mandatory audit requirement), authorised_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ. INDEX(family_account_id, created_at DESC).
pay_family_account_accessCo-authorised payers on a family account. Persons listed here may initiate payments against the account, subject to the account's payment_authorisation_policy. id UUID PK(v7), family_account_id UUID FK(pay_family_accounts) NOT NULL, authorised_person_id UUID FK(iam_person) NOT NULL (the human granted co-payer access — iam_person per ADR-055), access_level ENUM(FULL_TRUST,STANDARD) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'STANDARD' (FULL_TRUST: this person pays without requiring approval regardless of the account-level policy; STANDARD: subject to the account-level payment_authorisation_policy), granted_by UUID FK(platform_users) NOT NULL (must be the account holder), granted_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, revoked_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable, is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true. UNIQUE(family_account_id, authorised_person_id) WHERE is_active = true. INDEX(authorised_person_id, is_active) WHERE is_active = true.
