pay_payment_authorisation_requestsTwo-party authorisation request raised when a non-account-holder or non-FULL_TRUST co-payer initiates a payment and the account policy requires approval. id UUID PK(v7), family_account_id UUID FK(pay_family_accounts) NOT NULL, invoice_id UUID FK(pay_invoices) NOT NULL, requested_by UUID FK(iam_person) NOT NULL (the human initiating the payment — iam_person per ADR-055), amount NUMERIC(10,2) NOT NULL, payment_method ENUM(CARD,BANK_TRANSFER,CASH,CHEQUE) NOT NULL, status ENUM(PENDING,APPROVED,REJECTED,EXPIRED,CANCELLED) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDING', requested_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, expires_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT (requested_at + INTERVAL '48 hours') (authorisation offer expires if account holder does not respond), account_holder_notified_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable, responded_by UUID FK(platform_users) nullable (must be account_holder_id), responded_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable, rejection_reason TEXT nullable. INDEX(family_account_id, status) WHERE status = 'PENDING'. INDEX(invoice_id). On INSERT: push notification to account_holder_id with payment details and APPROVE/REJECT action. On APPROVED: Payments Worker proceeds with payment processing using payment_method and amount. On EXPIRED: status set to EXPIRED; requester notified that authorisation was not received.
pay_ledger_entriesIMMUTABLE — no UPDATE or DELETE. id UUID PK(v7), family_account_id UUID FK NOT NULL, entry_type ENUM(CHARGE,PAYMENT,REFUND,CREDIT,ADJUSTMENT) NOT NULL, amount NUMERIC(10,2) NOT NULL, reference_id UUID, description TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ. INDEX(family_account_id, created_at DESC). BRIN on created_at. Balance = SELECT SUM(amount) WHERE family_account_id=$1, cached in Redis ledger:balance:{id} TTL=30s. Route reads to primary for 500ms after write (ADR-009). RANGE partition by created_at ANNUAL via pg_partman (ADR-048 — annual partitioning enables archival of entries >7 years to S3 Parquet via Archive API; online migration via pg_partman).
pay_ledger_balance_checkpointsid UUID PK(v7), family_account_id UUID FK UNIQUE, balance_as_of TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, balance NUMERIC(10,2) NOT NULL, entry_count_at_checkpoint INT. Nightly job: recompute checkpoint for accounts with >50 new entries. Balance query: checkpoint.balance + SUM(entries WHERE created_at > checkpoint.balance_as_of). Checkpoint validated against independent SUM on creation — mismatch triggers alert.
pay_debt_writeoffsFormal bad debt write-off record. Provides an immutable audit trail when an outstanding invoice balance is formally written off as uncollectible. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, invoice_id UUID FK(pay_invoices) NOT NULL, family_account_id UUID FK NOT NULL, writeoff_amount NUMERIC(10,2) NOT NULL, writeoff_reason ENUM(UNCOLLECTIBLE,FAMILY_HARDSHIP,ADMINISTRATIVE_ERROR,STUDENT_LEFT,LEGAL_SETTLEMENT,OTHER) NOT NULL, notes TEXT, authorised_by UUID FK(platform_users) NOT NULL (the principal or finance administrator authorising the write-off), authorised_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL. IMMUTABLE. On INSERT: pay_invoices.status set to CANCELLED, pay_ledger_entries row created with entry_type=ADJUSTMENT and negative amount equal to outstanding balance. INDEX(school_id, authorised_at DESC). INDEX(family_account_id).
pay_lunch_accountsid UUID PK(v7), student_id UUID FK UNIQUE, school_id UUID, balance NUMERIC(8,2) DEFAULT 0, low_balance_threshold NUMERIC(6,2), auto_replenish_enabled BOOLEAN.
pay_lunch_transactionsid UUID PK(v7), lunch_account_id UUID FK, amount NUMERIC(6,2), transaction_type ENUM(MEAL_CHARGE,DEPOSIT,REFUND,ADJUSTMENT), meal_date DATE, pos_device_id UUID FK. INDEX(lunch_account_id, meal_date DESC).
pay_fee_categoriesid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID, name TEXT NOT NULL, is_mandatory BOOLEAN. UNIQUE(school_id, name).
pay_fee_schedulesid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID, fee_category_id UUID FK, academic_year_id UUID FK, name TEXT, amount NUMERIC(10,2), due_date DATE, frequency ENUM(ONE_TIME,MONTHLY,TERM,ANNUAL), grade_level TEXT nullable (when set: this fee schedule only applies to students in this grade level — e.g. 'Year 10' for a GCSE exam fee; null = applies to all grades), applies_to_student_ids UUID[] nullable (for bespoke per-student fee schedules — rare override; null = applies to all eligible students).
pay_payment_plansid UUID PK(v7), invoice_id UUID FK, total_instalments INT, installment_amount NUMERIC(10,2), next_due_date DATE, status ENUM(ACTIVE,COMPLETED,DEFAULTED). Stripe Subscriptions used for recurring instalment charging.
pay_financial_aid_programsid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID, name TEXT NOT NULL, reduction_type ENUM(PERCENTAGE,FIXED_AMOUNT), reduction_value NUMERIC(8,2), total_fund_amount NUMERIC(12,2) nullable (total pool available — null = uncapped; when set: FinancialAidWorker tracks SUM(award_amount) across active awards and blocks new awards when fund is exhausted), fund_remaining NUMERIC(12,2) nullable (materialised: total_fund_amount - SUM of active award amounts — updated on each award INSERT/UPDATE; null when total_fund_amount is null).
pay_financial_aid_awardsUNIQUE(student_id, program_id, academic_year_id). award_amount NUMERIC(10,2), approved_by UUID FK, effective_from DATE, effective_to DATE.
pay_financial_aid_applicationsParent-submitted application for financial aid or fee reduction. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, student_id UUID FK(sis_students) NOT NULL, program_id UUID FK(pay_financial_aid_programs) NOT NULL, guardian_id UUID FK(sis_guardians) NOT NULL, academic_year_id UUID FK NOT NULL, household_income_band ENUM(BAND_A,BAND_B,BAND_C,BAND_D,BAND_E) nullable (school-defined income bands — exact thresholds configured in pay_financial_aid_programs), supporting_documents JSONB nullable (array of {document_type, s3_key} — e.g. proof of income, tax return reference), application_statement TEXT nullable, status ENUM(DRAFT,SUBMITTED,UNDER_REVIEW,APPROVED,REJECTED,WITHDRAWN) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'DRAFT', submitted_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable, reviewed_by UUID FK(platform_users) nullable, reviewed_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable, reviewer_notes TEXT nullable, award_id UUID FK(pay_financial_aid_awards) nullable (populated when status=APPROVED and an award record is created). INDEX(school_id, academic_year_id, status). INDEX(guardian_id, academic_year_id). On APPROVED: Finance Administrator creates pay_financial_aid_awards row and links via award_id.
pay_stripe_accountsid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID UNIQUE, stripe_account_id TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, onboarding_complete BOOLEAN, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ. Stripe Connect — school-level managed accounts.
pay_discount_rulesConfigurable discount rules applied to invoices at generation time. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, name TEXT NOT NULL, discount_type ENUM(SIBLING,EARLY_PAYMENT,LOYALTY,BURSARY,STAFF_CHILD,CUSTOM) NOT NULL, calculation_method ENUM(PERCENTAGE,FIXED_AMOUNT) NOT NULL, value NUMERIC(8,2) NOT NULL, applies_to_fee_category_id UUID FK(pay_fee_categories) nullable (when set: discount only applies to invoices containing this fee category; null = applies to all), sibling_order INT nullable (for SIBLING type: which child in enrolment order gets this discount — e.g. 2 = second child, 3 = third child; NULL = any sibling), minimum_invoice_amount NUMERIC(8,2) nullable (discount only applied when invoice total meets or exceeds this threshold), academic_year_id UUID FK nullable (null = applies to all years), is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true. UNIQUE(school_id, name).
pay_late_payment_policiesConfigures automatic late fee generation for overdue invoices. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL UNIQUE, is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, grace_period_days INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 7 (number of days past due_date before late fee applies), fee_type ENUM(FIXED,PERCENTAGE_MONTHLY) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'FIXED', fee_amount NUMERIC(8,2) nullable (for FIXED type), fee_percentage NUMERIC(5,4) nullable (for PERCENTAGE_MONTHLY type — e.g. 0.015 = 1.5% per month), max_late_fee_amount NUMERIC(8,2) nullable (cap on total late fees per invoice), applies_to_fee_category_id UUID FK(pay_fee_categories) nullable (null = applies to all overdue invoices). LateFeesWorker runs nightly — creates pay_invoice_line_items rows for newly overdue invoices meeting the policy.
pay_auto_invoice_rulesTrigger-based automatic invoice generation rules. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, name TEXT NOT NULL, trigger_type ENUM(ENROLMENT_CONFIRMED,TERM_START,DATE_OF_MONTH,ACADEMIC_YEAR_START) NOT NULL (ENROLMENT_CONFIRMED: invoice generated when student enrolment is confirmed; TERM_START: invoice generated at start of each term; DATE_OF_MONTH: invoice generated on a fixed day each month; ACADEMIC_YEAR_START: once per academic year), fee_schedule_id UUID FK(pay_fee_schedules) NOT NULL (the fee schedule to use for the generated invoice), trigger_day_of_month INT nullable (for DATE_OF_MONTH trigger), trigger_term_offset_days INT nullable (for TERM_START: days before term start to generate invoice — e.g. 14 = generate 2 weeks before term), applies_to_grade_level TEXT nullable (null = all grade levels), is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true. UNIQUE(school_id, name). On trigger condition met: AutoInvoiceWorker calls pay_invoice_generation_runs to batch-create invoices.
pay_invoice_generation_runsBatch invoice generation record — tracks a bulk invoice creation operation. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, run_type ENUM(MANUAL_BATCH,AUTO_RULE_TRIGGERED,FEE_SCHEDULE_BULK) NOT NULL, fee_schedule_id UUID FK(pay_fee_schedules) nullable, auto_rule_id UUID FK(pay_auto_invoice_rules) nullable, academic_year_id UUID FK NOT NULL, initiated_by UUID FK(platform_users) NOT NULL, target_grade_level TEXT nullable, total_families_targeted INT nullable, invoices_created INT nullable, invoices_skipped INT nullable (families with existing invoice for this fee in this period), invoices_failed INT nullable, status ENUM(QUEUED,RUNNING,COMPLETED,FAILED) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'QUEUED', started_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable, completed_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable, error_log_s3_key TEXT nullable. INDEX(school_id, status). INDEX(school_id, completed_at DESC).
pay_credit_notesCredit note issued to reverse part or all of an invoice line. Creates an equal and opposite ledger entry. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, invoice_id UUID FK(pay_invoices) NOT NULL, line_item_id UUID FK(pay_invoice_line_items) nullable (null = credit against full invoice), credit_amount NUMERIC(10,2) NOT NULL, reason TEXT NOT NULL, issued_by UUID FK(platform_users) NOT NULL, issued_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL. IMMUTABLE. On INSERT: pay_ledger_entries row created with entry_type=CREDIT and negative amount; invoice total adjusted; if invoice was PAID and credit creates an overpayment, a REFUND may be required. INDEX(invoice_id). INDEX(school_id, issued_at DESC).
pay_payment_allocationsMaps a payment to one or more invoices when a single payment covers multiple outstanding invoices. id UUID PK(v7), payment_id UUID FK(pay_payments) NOT NULL, invoice_id UUID FK(pay_invoices) NOT NULL, allocated_amount NUMERIC(10,2) NOT NULL. UNIQUE(payment_id, invoice_id). SUM(allocated_amount) WHERE payment_id=$1 must equal pay_payments.amount — validated by application layer. INDEX(payment_id). INDEX(invoice_id).
pay_payment_reversalsReversal of a payment due to bounced cheque, recalled bank transfer, or chargeback. Reinstates the original invoice and creates offsetting ledger entries. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, payment_id UUID FK(pay_payments) NOT NULL UNIQUE (one reversal per payment), reversal_type ENUM(BOUNCED_CHEQUE,RECALLED_TRANSFER,CHARGEBACK,DUPLICATE_PAYMENT,OTHER) NOT NULL, reversal_reason TEXT NOT NULL, bank_reference TEXT nullable (bank notification reference for bounced/recalled payments), reversed_by UUID FK(platform_users) NOT NULL, reversed_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL. IMMUTABLE. On INSERT: pay_payments.status set to FAILED; affected pay_invoices.status reinstated to SENT or OVERDUE as appropriate; pay_ledger_entries ADJUSTMENT row created to reverse the original PAYMENT entry; guardian notified of reversal and outstanding balance.
pay_lunch_account_balance_transfersEnd-of-year or inter-student lunch account balance transfer. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, from_account_id UUID FK(pay_lunch_accounts) NOT NULL, to_account_id UUID FK(pay_lunch_accounts) nullable (null for REFUND transfers — balance returned to family rather than moved to another account), transfer_type ENUM(SIBLING_TRANSFER,NEXT_YEAR_ROLLOVER,REFUND_TO_FAMILY) NOT NULL, amount NUMERIC(8,2) NOT NULL, reason TEXT nullable, processed_by UUID FK(platform_users) NOT NULL, processed_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL. IMMUTABLE. On INSERT: pay_lunch_transactions REFUND created on from_account; DEPOSIT created on to_account (if not REFUND type); for REFUND_TO_FAMILY: pay_ledger_entries CREDIT created on family account.
fin_suppliersSupplier/vendor master — the complete address book for all companies the school does business with (ADR-038, ADR-051). Pulled forward from Wave 4 to Wave 2 because operational vendor management cannot wait for the full GL. fin_suppliers is the canonical financial supplier record; tkt_vendors remains the lean operational dispatch registry. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, legal_name TEXT NOT NULL, trading_name TEXT nullable, supplier_category ENUM(TEXTBOOKS,FOOD_SERVICE,MAINTENANCE,TECHNOLOGY,PROFESSIONAL_SERVICES,UTILITIES,INSURANCE,TRANSPORT,OTHER) NOT NULL, tax_id TEXT nullable (EIN/TIN — encrypted at rest), payment_terms ENUM(NET_15,NET_30,NET_45,NET_60,ON_RECEIPT) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'NET_30', preferred_payment_method ENUM(ACH,CHECK,WIRE,CARD) nullable, bank_account_reference TEXT nullable (ACH routing reference — encrypted at rest), default_gl_account_code TEXT nullable (placeholder for Wave 4 GL integration), w9_s3_key TEXT nullable (W-9 document for 1099 reporting), is_1099_required BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, website TEXT nullable, notes TEXT nullable, is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true, tkt_vendor_id UUID FK(tkt_vendors) nullable (SOFT INTEGRITY bridge — links to operational vendor record when same company is in both contexts; a textbook publisher has no tkt_vendor_id; a plumbing contractor has both), created_by UUID FK(platform_users) NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ. UNIQUE(school_id, legal_name). INDEX(school_id, supplier_category, is_active).
fin_supplier_contactsMultiple points of contact for a supplier. id UUID PK(v7), supplier_id UUID FK(fin_suppliers) NOT NULL, contact_name TEXT NOT NULL, contact_role TEXT nullable (e.g. 'Account Manager', 'Invoicing', 'Technical Support'), email TEXT nullable, phone TEXT nullable, is_primary BOOLEAN DEFAULT false (only one primary contact per supplier enforced at application layer), notes TEXT nullable. INDEX(supplier_id, is_primary).

### Kafka Events — M81 Enrollment & Payments

EventConsumersNotes
pay.invoice.createdM81 PaymentsM83 Finance (GL posting), M110 Analytics
pay.payment.receivedM81 PaymentsM83 Finance (GL posting), M110 Analytics, M40 Communications
pay.refund.issuedM81 PaymentsM83 Finance (GL posting)
pay.credit_note.issuedM81 PaymentsM83 Finance (GL posting)
pay.debt.written_offM81 PaymentsM83 Finance (GL posting)
pay.lunch_account.low_balanceM81 PaymentsM40 Communications (push notification to guardian)
pay.payment_authorisation.requestedM81 PaymentsM40 Communications (push to account holder with APPROVE/REJECT action)
enr.application.submittedM81 EnrollmentM40 Communications (acknowledgement), M1 Task Worker (admin review task)
enr.offer.issuedM81 EnrollmentM40 Communications (offer letter + deadline notification)
enr.offer.acceptedM81 EnrollmentM20 SIS (student record creation), M40 Communications, M1 Task Worker (onboarding checklist creation)
enr.withdrawal.completedM81 EnrollmentM20 SIS (status update), M61 Transport (cancel assignments), M62 Technology (flag device return), M63 Food Service (close lunch account)
enr.reenrollment.declinedM81 EnrollmentM81 (withdrawal initiation — self-loop)
M82Sub Marketplaceprefix: sub_9 tablesWave 2

Platform tables: platform_substitute_profiles, platform_sub_credentials, platform_sub_availability (documented in M0). Three platform tables + 11 tenant tables = 14 total.

TableDefinition
fin_chart_of_accountsGeneral Ledger chart of accounts — the complete account hierarchy for the school. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, account_code TEXT NOT NULL (e.g. '1000', '4100-01'), account_name TEXT NOT NULL (e.g. 'Cash and Cash Equivalents', 'Tuition Revenue'), account_type ENUM(ASSET,LIABILITY,EQUITY,REVENUE,EXPENSE) NOT NULL, account_subtype TEXT nullable (e.g. 'CURRENT_ASSET', 'OPERATING_REVENUE', 'PAYROLL_EXPENSE' — school-configured), parent_account_id UUID FK(fin_chart_of_accounts) nullable (enables account hierarchy — e.g. 4100 is parent of 4100-01), fund_id UUID FK(fin_funds) nullable (for fund-restricted accounts — null for unrestricted general fund), is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true, is_system BOOLEAN DEFAULT false (system accounts like ACCOUNTS_RECEIVABLE_CONTROL, ACCOUNTS_PAYABLE_CONTROL are protected — cannot be deactivated), normal_balance ENUM(DEBIT,CREDIT) NOT NULL (ASSET/EXPENSE = DEBIT normal; LIABILITY/EQUITY/REVENUE = CREDIT normal), created_by UUID FK(platform_users) NOT NULL. UNIQUE(school_id, account_code). INDEX(school_id, account_type, is_active).
fin_fundsFund accounting classification for schools with restricted and unrestricted funds. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, fund_code TEXT NOT NULL (e.g. 'GEN', 'TITLE1', 'CAPITAL'), fund_name TEXT NOT NULL (e.g. 'General Fund', 'Title I Federal', 'Capital Projects'), fund_type ENUM(GENERAL,SPECIAL_REVENUE,CAPITAL_PROJECTS,DEBT_SERVICE,PERMANENT,ENTERPRISE) NOT NULL, is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true, notes TEXT nullable. UNIQUE(school_id, fund_code). INDEX(school_id, fund_type).
fin_journal_batchesA batch of balanced GL journal entries posted together as an atomic unit. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, batch_reference TEXT NOT NULL (human-readable reference — e.g. 'INV-2026-03-001', 'PAYROLL-2026-03'), batch_type ENUM(AR_INVOICE,AR_PAYMENT,AR_REFUND,AR_CREDIT_NOTE,AR_WRITEOFF,AP_VOUCHER,AP_PAYMENT,PAYROLL,MANUAL_JOURNAL,PERIOD_CLOSE,OPENING_BALANCE) NOT NULL, source_module TEXT NOT NULL (the module that generated this batch — e.g. 'pay', 'hr', 'manual'), source_event_id UUID nullable (the Kafka event_id that triggered this batch — populated for event-driven batches; null for manual journals), period_id UUID FK(fin_accounting_periods) NOT NULL, status ENUM(DRAFT,PENDING,POSTED,REVERSED,VOID) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'DRAFT', posted_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable (set when status=POSTED — immutable thereafter), posted_by UUID FK(platform_users) nullable, reversal_of_batch_id UUID FK(fin_journal_batches) nullable (for REVERSED batches — links to the original), created_by UUID FK(platform_users) NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ. BALANCE ENFORCEMENT: balance is validated by the validate_batch_balance(batch_id) DB procedure which aggregates SUM(amount) WHERE entry_type=DEBIT and SUM(amount) WHERE entry_type=CREDIT from fin_gl_entries and asserts they are equal before setting status=POSTED. The PostingService calls this procedure inside the same transaction as the status update — if it fails the transaction rolls back. Removing header-level total_debits/total_credits avoids the false confidence of a generated column that checks application-maintained aggregates rather than actual entries. UNIQUE(school_id, batch_reference). INDEX(school_id, period_id, status). INDEX(source_event_id) WHERE source_event_id IS NOT NULL — idempotency check: prevents duplicate GL posting from replayed Kafka events.
fin_gl_entriesIndividual debit or credit line within a journal batch. Double-entry: every batch has at least two entries that sum to zero. id UUID PK(v7), batch_id UUID FK(fin_journal_batches) NOT NULL, account_id UUID FK(fin_chart_of_accounts) NOT NULL, entry_type ENUM(DEBIT,CREDIT) NOT NULL, amount NUMERIC(14,2) NOT NULL CHECK(amount > 0), fund_id UUID FK(fin_funds) nullable (overrides account-level fund when an entry spans fund boundaries), description TEXT NOT NULL (line-level narrative — e.g. 'Tuition invoice INV-2026-001 — Ahmed Al-Farsi'), reference_id UUID nullable (SOFT INTEGRITY — the source record: pay_invoices.id, pay_payments.id, hr_paystub.id etc.), reference_type TEXT nullable (table name of reference_id — DISPLAY-ONLY per ADR-028), period_id UUID FK(fin_accounting_periods) NOT NULL (links to the accounting period this entry belongs to), period_start DATE NOT NULL (DENORMALISED from fin_accounting_periods.period_start — set at INSERT time; used as the RANGE partition key because PostgreSQL requires an ordered type; period_start is immutable once set because GL entries cannot move between periods after posting). IMMUTABLE once batch.status=POSTED — DB trigger sets a posted_at flag and application role loses UPDATE permission on posted rows. RANGE partition by period_start ANNUAL via pg_partman (partitions align with fiscal years — the natural audit and reporting boundary). INDEX(account_id, period_start) — account balance query. INDEX(batch_id). INDEX(reference_id) WHERE reference_id IS NOT NULL — source traceability.
fin_accounting_periodsFiscal accounting periods controlling which batches can be posted. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, period_name TEXT NOT NULL (e.g. 'March 2026'), period_start DATE NOT NULL, period_end DATE NOT NULL, fiscal_year INT NOT NULL, status ENUM(OPEN,CLOSED,LOCKED) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'OPEN' (OPEN: batches can be created and posted; CLOSED: period is finalised but can be reopened by Finance Admin; LOCKED: period is audited and permanently sealed — no further posting possible without CFO override), closed_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable, closed_by UUID FK(platform_users) nullable. UNIQUE(school_id, period_start). CHECK(period_end > period_start). INDEX(school_id, status) WHERE status = 'OPEN'.
fin_budgetsAnnual budget header per fund per fiscal year. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, fiscal_year INT NOT NULL, fund_id UUID FK(fin_funds) NOT NULL, budget_name TEXT NOT NULL (e.g. 'FY2026 General Fund Operating Budget'), status ENUM(DRAFT,APPROVED,ACTIVE,CLOSED) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'DRAFT', total_budgeted_revenue NUMERIC(14,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, total_budgeted_expense NUMERIC(14,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, approved_by UUID FK(platform_users) nullable, approved_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable. UNIQUE(school_id, fiscal_year, fund_id). INDEX(school_id, fiscal_year, status).
fin_budget_linesAccount-level budget allocation within a budget. id UUID PK(v7), budget_id UUID FK(fin_budgets) NOT NULL, account_id UUID FK(fin_chart_of_accounts) NOT NULL, period_id UUID FK(fin_accounting_periods) nullable (null = full-year allocation; set for monthly/quarterly budgets), budgeted_amount NUMERIC(12,2) NOT NULL, notes TEXT nullable. UNIQUE(budget_id, account_id, period_id). INDEX(budget_id, account_id). Actuals computed on demand: SELECT SUM(amount) FROM fin_gl_entries WHERE account_id=$1 AND period_id IN (periods for this fiscal year) — cached in Redis budget:actuals:{budget_id}:{account_id} TTL=5min.
sub_school_poolUNIQUE(substitute_id, school_id). id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID, substitute_id UUID FK(platform_entity_cache), status ENUM(PENDING,APPROVED,SUSPENDED,REMOVED), added_at TIMESTAMPTZ, avg_rating_at_this_school NUMERIC(3,2) (computed by background job from sub_ratings for this school — used as primary ranking signal). Partial index: (substitute_id, status) WHERE status='APPROVED' for matching engine.
sub_job_postingsid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID, created_by UUID FK, date DATE NOT NULL, start_time TIME, end_time TIME, status ENUM(OPEN,FILLED,CANCELLED), reason ENUM(SICK,PERSONAL,PD,VACANCY,OTHER), urgent BOOLEAN DEFAULT false. INDEX(school_id, date, status). INDEX(status, date) for matching engine discovery. Note: class_ids UUID[] REMOVED — replaced by sub_job_classes junction table (no ghost references).
sub_job_classesUNIQUE(job_id, class_id). INDEX(class_id). FK to cls_classes.id enforces referential integrity — cascade DELETE when job cancelled. Replaces the former class_ids UUID[] array (no FK enforcement possible on arrays).
sub_job_notificationsid UUID PK(v7), job_id UUID FK, substitute_id UUID FK, notified_at TIMESTAMPTZ, response ENUM(PENDING,ACCEPTED,DECLINED,EXPIRED) DEFAULT 'PENDING', responded_at TIMESTAMPTZ, acceptance_window_expires_at TIMESTAMPTZ. INDEX(job_id, response, acceptance_window_expires_at). Partial index: (acceptance_window_expires_at) WHERE response='PENDING' for expiry sweep.
sub_assignmentsid UUID PK(v7), job_id UUID FK UNIQUE, substitute_id UUID FK, confirmed_at TIMESTAMPTZ, check_in_at TIMESTAMPTZ, check_out_at TIMESTAMPTZ, status ENUM(CONFIRMED,CHECKED_IN,CHECKED_OUT,NO_SHOW,CANCELLED) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'CONFIRMED', cancelled_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable (set when status=CANCELLED), cancelled_by_type ENUM(SCHOOL,SUBSTITUTE) nullable (who initiated the cancellation), cancellation_reason TEXT nullable, is_late_cancellation BOOLEAN DEFAULT false (set to true by CancellationPolicyWorker if cancellation occurs within sub_cancellation_policies.late_window_hours of the assignment start — triggers policy consequences such as temporary pool suspension or rating penalty), late_cancellation_consequence_applied BOOLEAN DEFAULT false. INDEX(substitute_id, date) WHERE status IN ('CONFIRMED','CHECKED_IN') — matching engine 'already booked today' check. On status=CANCELLED by SUBSTITUTE: check sub_cancellation_policies for the school; if within late_window_hours, set is_late_cancellation=true and emit sub.assignment.late_cancelled event — SubCancellationPolicyWorker applies configured consequence.
sub_ratingsUNIQUE(assignment_id, rater_type). rater_type ENUM(SCHOOL_RATES_SUB,SUB_RATES_SCHOOL). Allows one rating in each direction per assignment. overall_score NUMERIC(2,1) (1.0–5.0), professionalism NUMERIC(2,1), punctuality NUMERIC(2,1), comments TEXT.
sub_session_notesSubstitute teacher handover notes for the returning permanent teacher. Written by the substitute at the end of their assignment. id UUID PK(v7), assignment_id UUID FK(sub_assignments) NOT NULL UNIQUE, notes_text TEXT NOT NULL (what was covered, how the class went, any incidents or concerns), homework_set TEXT nullable (any homework or tasks set during the session), is_visible_to_teacher BOOLEAN DEFAULT true (substitute can mark private — defaults to visible so returning teacher sees the handover immediately), submitted_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL. On INSERT: if is_visible_to_teacher=true, Task Worker creates a notification task for the original teacher. INDEX(assignment_id).
sub_cancellation_policiesPer-school configurable policy governing substitute late cancellations. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL UNIQUE, late_window_hours INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 2 (cancellations within this many hours of assignment start are flagged as late), consequence ENUM(WARNING_ONLY,TEMPORARY_POOL_SUSPENSION,PERMANENT_POOL_REMOVAL,RATING_PENALTY) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'WARNING_ONLY', suspension_duration_days INT nullable (for TEMPORARY_POOL_SUSPENSION: how many days the sub is suspended from this school's pool), repeat_offence_threshold INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 3 (number of late cancellations before consequence escalates to the next severity — e.g. 3 warnings then suspension), updated_by UUID FK(platform_users) NOT NULL, updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ.
sub_pay_ratesid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID, substitute_id UUID NOT NULL DEFAULT '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000' (sentinel UUID for school default rate), job_type TEXT, rate NUMERIC(8,2), rate_type ENUM(HOURLY,DAILY,HALF_DAY), effective_from DATE, effective_to DATE. EXCLUDE USING gist (school_id WITH =, substitute_id WITH =, job_type WITH =, daterange(effective_from, COALESCE(effective_to,'infinity'),'[)') WITH &&). Clean exclusion constraint.
M83Finance & Accountingprefix: fin_9 tablesWave 4 — 9 fin_ tables documented under M81 per ADR-051/058
M83 Finance — GL Backbone Tables Documented Under M81 (ADR-051 / ADR-058) The 9 fin_ tables (fin_suppliers, fin_supplier_contacts, fin_chart_of_accounts, fin_funds, fin_accounting_periods, fin_journal_batches, fin_gl_entries, fin_budgets, fin_budget_lines) are physically documented in the M81 section above, per ADR-051 and ADR-058. They live there because fin_suppliers was pulled forward to Wave 2 (ADR-051) and the minimal GL backbone was designed alongside the M81 AR layer to validate the M81→M83 event integration contract. M81→M83 integration contract: M81 emits Kafka events (pay.invoice.created, pay.payment.received, pay.refund.issued, pay.credit_note.issued, pay.debt.written_off); M83 consumes them and posts double-entry GL entries via fin_journal_batches. M81 never writes to fin_* tables directly. Wave 4 remaining scope (not yet designed): fin_ap_vouchers, fin_ap_payments, fin_reconciliation_runs, fin_board_report_snapshots, fin_grants. These will be added here at Wave 4 commencement, at which point all fin_ tables will move from the M81 section to this section.
M90Visitor Managementprefix: vis_9 tablesWave 2

M90 also handles volunteer physical sign-in on campus (ADR-032). Volunteers sign in as visitors with a VOLUNTEER visitor type, and their background check status is sourced from platform_volunteer_profiles rather than run fresh at the kiosk.

TableDefinition
vis_visitor_typesid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID, name TEXT NOT NULL, requires_safeguarding_check BOOLEAN DEFAULT true, badge_color TEXT. UNIQUE(school_id, name).
vis_visitorsid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID, first_name TEXT, last_name TEXT, company TEXT, email_encrypted TEXT, email_hash TEXT NOT NULL (HMAC blind index — equality lookup: SELECT WHERE email_hash=hmac($email,$secret)), phone_encrypted TEXT, phone_hash TEXT, visitor_type_id UUID FK. UNIQUE(school_id, email_hash). Index on email_hash enables returning-visitor lookup at kiosk — plaintext encrypted columns retained for display only.
vis_sign_insid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID, visitor_id UUID FK, signed_in_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, signed_out_at TIMESTAMPTZ, host_id UUID FK, purpose TEXT, safeguarding_check_status ENUM(PASSED,FLAGGED,BYPASSED_BY_ADMIN,NOT_REQUIRED), safeguarding_check_ref TEXT (third-party reference ID only — registry data is transient, never persisted — ADR-015), bypass_admin_id UUID FK, bypass_reason TEXT. CHECK: WHEN safeguarding_check_status='BYPASSED_BY_ADMIN' THEN bypass_admin_id IS NOT NULL AND bypass_reason IS NOT NULL AND length(trim(bypass_reason)) > 10. Partial index: (school_id, signed_in_at) WHERE signed_out_at IS NULL — emergency muster query instantaneous. BRIN on signed_in_at for historical compliance reports.
vis_pre_registrationsid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID, visitor_id UUID FK, expected_at TIMESTAMPTZ, purpose TEXT, host_id UUID FK, qr_code_token TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, expires_at TIMESTAMPTZ, used_at TIMESTAMPTZ. Partial index: (expires_at) WHERE used_at IS NULL. Cleanup: DELETE WHERE expires_at < now() AND used_at IS NULL.
vis_recurring_visitorsid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID, visitor_id UUID FK, access_schedule JSONB (days/times), valid_from DATE, valid_to DATE, approved_by UUID FK, is_active BOOLEAN. GIN index on access_schedule for JSONB array membership. INDEX(visitor_id, valid_from, valid_to). Design note: access_schedule as JSONB is acceptable for read-only scheduling rules. If this becomes write-heavy, a junction table can be introduced — but JSONB is the correct initial design for a reference-only schedule pattern.
vis_banned_personsSchool-specific list of individuals who must never be admitted regardless of safeguarding check status. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, first_name TEXT NOT NULL, last_name TEXT NOT NULL, name_hash TEXT NOT NULL (HMAC blind index for kiosk lookup at sign-in — computed from normalised full name + DOB), date_of_birth DATE nullable, photo_s3_key TEXT nullable (signed URL for reception staff identification), ban_reason TEXT NOT NULL, ban_type ENUM(COURT_ORDER,SCHOOL_DECISION,SAFEGUARDING,RESTRAINING_ORDER,OTHER) NOT NULL, ban_order_s3_key TEXT nullable (copy of court order or supporting document), added_by UUID FK(platform_users) NOT NULL, reviewed_by UUID FK(platform_users) nullable (periodic review recommended annually), last_reviewed_at DATE nullable, is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true, effective_from DATE NOT NULL, effective_to DATE nullable (null = indefinite ban). INDEX(school_id, name_hash) WHERE is_active = true — kiosk real-time lookup. Kiosk check: on visitor sign-in, compute HMAC of entered name + DOB, compare against name_hash for active bans. On match: block sign-in and alert safeguarding officer immediately. FERPA/data sensitivity: this table requires the highest access restriction — safeguarding_ban:read permission required.
vis_emergency_musterid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID, incident_id UUID FK(inc_incidents) UNIQUE, created_by UUID FK, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ, total_on_site_at_snapshot INT. Snapshot creation: INSERT INTO vis_muster_entries SELECT from vis_sign_ins WHERE signed_out_at IS NULL AND school_id=$1 — single batch INSERT. vis_emergency_muster row created first, entries inserted in single statement.
vis_muster_entriesUNIQUE(muster_id, sign_in_id). id UUID PK(v7), muster_id UUID FK, sign_in_id UUID FK, visitor_name TEXT (snapshot), visitor_type TEXT (snapshot), building TEXT (snapshot), status ENUM(UNKNOWN,ACCOUNTED_FOR,EVACUATED,ASSISTANCE_NEEDED). INDEX(muster_id, status). INDEX(muster_id, visitor_type). INDEX(muster_id, building). Standard UPDATE for status changes — no JSONB deserialisation.
vis_invited_contractorsid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID, visitor_id UUID FK, contractor_company TEXT, work_type TEXT, scheduled_from TIMESTAMPTZ, scheduled_to TIMESTAMPTZ, approved_by UUID FK, status ENUM(PENDING,APPROVED,ON_SITE,COMPLETED,CANCELLED).
M91Incident & Emergencyprefix: inc_10 tablesWave 2
TableDefinition
inc_incident_typesid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID, code TEXT NOT NULL, name TEXT NOT NULL, severity ENUM(LOW,MEDIUM,HIGH,CRITICAL), requires_lockdown BOOLEAN, notification_template TEXT. UNIQUE(COALESCE(school_id,'00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000'), code) — prevents two LOCKDOWN types per school causing ambiguous dashboard.
inc_incidentsid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, incident_type_id UUID FK, declared_by UUID FK(platform_users), declared_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, title TEXT, description TEXT, status ENUM(ACTIVE,RESOLVED,CANCELLED), resolved_at TIMESTAMPTZ, resolution_notes TEXT. INDEX(school_id, status) WHERE status='ACTIVE' — emergency dashboard polling. Orchestration state removed — see inc_declaration_outbox.
inc_emergency_proceduresSchool emergency response procedures and contact escalation documentation. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, procedure_type ENUM(FIRE_EVACUATION,LOCKDOWN,SHELTER_IN_PLACE,MEDICAL_EMERGENCY,BOMB_THREAT,HAZMAT,MISSING_STUDENT,SAFEGUARDING_CRISIS,GENERAL) NOT NULL, title TEXT NOT NULL, procedure_steps JSONB NOT NULL (ordered array of {step_number, action, responsible_role, time_target_seconds}), primary_contact_id UUID FK(platform_users) NOT NULL (first person notified when this procedure is triggered), secondary_contact_id UUID FK(platform_users) nullable, external_contacts JSONB nullable (array of {name, role, phone, organisation} — e.g. local police, fire service, district safety officer), assembly_points JSONB nullable (array of {name, location_description, capacity}), last_reviewed_at DATE NOT NULL, reviewed_by UUID FK(platform_users) NOT NULL, next_review_date DATE NOT NULL, is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true, procedure_document_s3_key TEXT nullable (full procedure document for download). UNIQUE(school_id, procedure_type). INDEX(school_id, is_active). Procedures are surfaced during active inc_incidents to guide the admin response.
inc_declaration_outboxid UUID PK(v7), incident_id UUID FK(inc_incidents) UNIQUE. Created atomically with inc_incidents (same transaction). Each nullable TIMESTAMPTZ column = one fan-out step: tasks_created_at, muster_taken_at, alert_sent_at. Outbox worker queries WHERE tasks_created_at IS NULL. Each step sets its own column. New fan-out steps = add a nullable TIMESTAMPTZ column — zero impact on existing code. Alert: any step NULL > 5 minutes after incident declared.
inc_incident_timelineIMMUTABLE — no UPDATE or DELETE. RLS enforced. id UUID PK(v7), incident_id UUID FK, recorded_by UUID FK, event_type TEXT, description TEXT, metadata JSONB, recorded_at TIMESTAMPTZ. INDEX(incident_id, recorded_at). BRIN on recorded_at. Legal record of emergency response. Post-incident report auto-generated from this table.
inc_accountability_recordsid UUID PK(v7), incident_id UUID FK, person_id UUID FK(iam_person) NOT NULL (the human being accounted for during an incident — covers students, staff, and visitors uniformly per ADR-055), person_type ENUM(STUDENT,STAFF,VISITOR), status ENUM(UNKNOWN,ACCOUNTED_FOR,EVACUATED,MEDICAL_ASSISTANCE,MISSING), last_updated_by UUID FK, last_updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ, notes TEXT. UNIQUE(incident_id, person_id).
inc_accountability_summaryUNIQUE(incident_id). total_people INT, accounted_for INT, unknown INT, missing INT, medical_assistance INT, last_updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ. Materialised by worker as inc_accountability_records are updated.
inc_reunification_recordsid UUID PK(v7), incident_id UUID FK, student_id UUID FK, released_to_id UUID FK(vis_visitors), released_by UUID FK(platform_users), released_at TIMESTAMPTZ, notes TEXT. UNIQUE(incident_id, student_id).
inc_reunification_correctionsid UUID PK(v7), reunification_record_id UUID FK, corrected_by UUID FK, correction_reason TEXT, corrected_at TIMESTAMPTZ. Audit trail for reunification corrections.
inc_drillsid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID, incident_type_id UUID FK, scheduled_at TIMESTAMPTZ, completed_at TIMESTAMPTZ, duration_seconds INT, participation_rate NUMERIC(5,4), notes TEXT, status ENUM(SCHEDULED,COMPLETED,CANCELLED).
M100Parent Engagementprefix: eng_5 tablesWave 2

Module 100 (ADR-021): extracted from Meetings. eng_ prefix for all tables.

TableDefinition
eng_ptc_conference_periodsid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID, academic_year_id UUID FK, name TEXT NOT NULL, start_date DATE, end_date DATE, booking_opens_at TIMESTAMPTZ, booking_closes_at TIMESTAMPTZ, status ENUM(UPCOMING,BOOKING_OPEN,ACTIVE,COMPLETED). UNIQUE(school_id, academic_year_id, name).
eng_ptc_teacher_slotsid UUID PK(v7), period_id UUID FK, teacher_id UUID FK(hr_employees), start_at TIMESTAMPTZ, end_at TIMESTAMPTZ, is_booked BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, is_blocked BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, block_reason TEXT. Composite partial index: (period_id, teacher_id, is_booked) WHERE is_blocked=false. Atomic booking: UPDATE SET is_booked=true WHERE id=$1 AND is_booked=false. 0 rows = 409 Conflict.
eng_ptc_bookingsid UUID PK(v7), slot_id UUID FK UNIQUE, parent_id UUID FK(iam_person) NOT NULL (the guardian attending the conference — human identity reference per ADR-055), student_id UUID FK(sis_students), booked_at TIMESTAMPTZ, cancelled_at TIMESTAMPTZ, notes TEXT, virtual_meeting_id UUID (DISPLAY-ONLY → mtg_meetings.id — advisory reference; Module 100 may create a Meeting but FK direction would create a compile-time dependency on Module 41). INDEX(parent_id, booked_at DESC).
eng_ptc_booking_preferencesUNIQUE(parent_id, period_id). preferred_times JSONB, interpreter_required BOOLEAN, interpreter_language TEXT, avoid_teacher_ids UUID[], last_updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ.
eng_ptc_waitlistid UUID PK(v7), slot_id UUID FK, parent_id UUID FK, student_id UUID FK, waitlist_position INT, added_at TIMESTAMPTZ, notified_at TIMESTAMPTZ, status ENUM(WAITING,OFFERED,ACCEPTED,EXPIRED,CANCELLED). UNIQUE(slot_id, parent_id) — parent cannot waitlist same slot twice. INDEX(slot_id, waitlist_position).
M101Events & Ticketingprefix: evt_6 tablesWave 3
TableDefinition
evt_eventsid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID, title TEXT NOT NULL, description TEXT, event_date DATE, start_time TIME, venue TEXT, total_capacity INT, total_tier_quantity INT DEFAULT 0, status ENUM(DRAFT,ON_SALE,SOLD_OUT,COMPLETED,CANCELLED). CHECK(total_capacity IS NULL OR total_tier_quantity <= total_capacity). Trigger updates total_tier_quantity on evt_ticket_tiers INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE — prevents venue-level oversell even when tier locking succeeds.
evt_ticket_tiersid UUID PK(v7), event_id UUID FK, name TEXT, price NUMERIC(8,2), quantity INT, quantity_sold INT DEFAULT 0, sale_starts_at TIMESTAMPTZ, sale_ends_at TIMESTAMPTZ, is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true. Partial index: (event_id, sale_starts_at, sale_ends_at) WHERE is_active=true. CRITICAL: Atomic sale: UPDATE SET quantity_sold=quantity_sold+$qty WHERE id=$1 AND quantity_sold+$qty<=quantity. 0 rows = sold out. Never SELECT-then-UPDATE.
evt_ordersid UUID PK(v7), event_id UUID FK, purchaser_id UUID FK, status ENUM(PENDING,CONFIRMED,CANCELLED,REFUNDED), total_amount NUMERIC(8,2), expires_at TIMESTAMPTZ (PENDING orders expire — cleanup job every 5 min: find PENDING WHERE expires_at
evt_ticketsid UUID PK(v7), order_id UUID FK, tier_id UUID FK, holder_name TEXT, qr_code_token TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, status ENUM(VALID,USED,CANCELLED,REFUNDED), scanned_at TIMESTAMPTZ. Door scan atomic: UPDATE SET status='USED', scanned_at=now() WHERE qr_code_token=$1 AND status='VALID'. 0 rows = already used or invalid. Rate-limited per event per IP.
evt_volunteersUNIQUE(event_id, user_id). role TEXT, status ENUM(REGISTERED,CONFIRMED,ATTENDED,NO_SHOW).
evt_event_updatesid UUID PK(v7), event_id UUID FK, update_type ENUM(CANCELLATION,VENUE_CHANGE,TIME_CHANGE,GENERAL), message TEXT NOT NULL, notify_ticket_holders BOOLEAN DEFAULT true, sent_at TIMESTAMPTZ. notify_ticket_holders=true triggers fan-out to all ticket holders via Communications module.
M102Alumniprefix: alm_8 tablesWave 3
TableDefinition
alm_alumni_profilesid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID, person_id UUID FK(iam_person) NOT NULL (the alumni's human identity — iam_person is the universal identity record per ADR-055; platform_students.person_id links to same iam_person row), graduation_year INT NOT NULL, degree_programme TEXT, current_employer TEXT, current_role TEXT, linkedin_url TEXT, contact_email TEXT, contact_phone TEXT, is_opted_in BOOLEAN DEFAULT true. INDEX(school_id, graduation_year). RLS: alumni can only read/update their own row. Self-maintained contact data (ADR-019).
alm_alumni_tagsUNIQUE(alumni_id, tag). tag TEXT NOT NULL. GIN index on tag. Tags used for segmentation (e.g. STEM_MENTOR, INTERNATIONAL, DONOR).
alm_campaignsid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID, title TEXT NOT NULL, description TEXT, goal_amount NUMERIC(10,2), reporting_currency CHAR(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'USD', start_date DATE, end_date DATE, status ENUM(DRAFT,ACTIVE,COMPLETED,CANCELLED). reporting_currency enables correct SUM across multi-currency donations.
alm_donationsid UUID PK(v7), campaign_id UUID FK, donor_alumni_id UUID FK, amount NUMERIC(10,2) NOT NULL, currency CHAR(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'USD', fx_rate_at_donation NUMERIC(10,6), amount_in_reporting_currency NUMERIC(10,2), payment_ref TEXT, donated_at TIMESTAMPTZ, is_anonymous BOOLEAN. SUM query: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount_in_reporting_currency),0) WHERE campaign_id=$1 — cached in Redis campaign:raised:{id} TTL=5min. FX rate sourced from payment processor at charge time — not a live lookup on read.
alm_campaign_recipientsUNIQUE(campaign_id, alumni_id). outreach_status ENUM(PENDING,SENT,OPENED,RESPONDED,DONATED,UNSUBSCRIBED).
alm_alumni_newsid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID, author_id UUID FK, title TEXT NOT NULL, body TEXT, published_at TIMESTAMPTZ, category ENUM(ACHIEVEMENT,EVENT,OPPORTUNITY,GENERAL). INDEX(school_id, published_at DESC).
alm_reunion_groupsid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID, graduation_year INT, name TEXT, organiser_id UUID FK, event_date DATE, rsvp_deadline DATE, status ENUM(PLANNING,CONFIRMED,COMPLETED,CANCELLED).
alm_eventsid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID, title TEXT NOT NULL, description TEXT, event_date DATE, venue TEXT, rsvp_url TEXT, evt_event_id UUID (DISPLAY-ONLY → evt_events.id — FK constraint removed; Alumni module must compile and run regardless of Events module status). If evt_event_id IS NOT NULL: resolve from Events module API, fall back to rsvp_url if Events not enabled.
M110Analyticsprefix: rpt_34 tablesWave 2

Analytics module follows strict CQRS. All rpt_* read models are materialised by the analytics worker consuming domain events. No domain module serves analytics queries directly. rpt_* tables are read-only to Analytics module and Reporting API — no other module reads rpt_* tables (CI enforced).

TableDefinition
rpt_analytics_worker_checkpointsUNIQUE(consumer_group, topic, partition). committed_offset BIGINT NOT NULL, log_end_offset BIGINT, lag BIGINT, recorded_at TIMESTAMPTZ. Stores (topic, partition, offset) — NEVER timestamps as Kafka checkpoints.
rpt_at_risk_configurationsid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID, name TEXT, trigger_conditions JSONB (attendance_threshold, grade_threshold, missed_assignments...), alert_recipients TEXT[], is_active BOOLEAN.
rpt_daily_attendance_summaryUNIQUE(school_id, class_id, summary_date). present_count INT, absent_count INT, late_count INT, total_enrolled INT, attendance_rate NUMERIC(5,4). RANGE partition by created_at monthly, 3-year retention (pg_partman).
rpt_student_academic_summaryUNIQUE(student_id, academic_year_id). current_gpa NUMERIC(4,3), credits_earned NUMERIC(5,1), credits_attempted NUMERIC(5,1), attendance_rate NUMERIC(5,4), at_risk_flags JSONB. RANGE partition by created_at monthly, 3-year retention. NOTE: current-year snapshot only. For term-by-term trend, see rpt_student_term_summary.
rpt_student_term_summaryTerm-by-term academic and attendance trend. One row per student per term. Materialised by Analytics Worker from grade.posted and attendance.confirmed Kafka events at term close. id UUID PK(v7), student_id UUID FK(sis_students) NOT NULL, academic_year_id UUID FK NOT NULL, term_id UUID FK(sis_terms) NOT NULL, gpa_this_term NUMERIC(4,3), attendance_rate_this_term NUMERIC(5,4), assignments_submitted INT, assignments_total INT, submission_rate NUMERIC(5,4), absences_authorised INT, absences_unauthorised INT. UNIQUE(student_id, term_id). INDEX(student_id, academic_year_id). RANGE partition by created_at monthly, 5-year retention. Parent portal displays this as a term-by-term sparkline trend — read-only, never updated after term closes.
rpt_class_performance_summaryUNIQUE(class_id, term_id). class_average NUMERIC(5,2), passing_rate NUMERIC(5,4), assignment_count INT, graded_count INT, pending_grade_count INT.
rpt_staff_summaryUNIQUE(employee_id, academic_year_id). classes_taught INT, pd_hours_completed NUMERIC(5,1), leave_days_taken NUMERIC(5,1), observations_count INT.
rpt_school_summaryUNIQUE(school_id, academic_year_id). total_enrolled INT (must be INTEGER — SMALLINT max 32,767 is too small for large US districts), total_staff INT, average_attendance_rate NUMERIC(5,4), average_gpa NUMERIC(4,3).
compliance_ferpa_requestsLog of formal FERPA education records disclosure requests from parents or eligible students. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, student_id UUID FK(sis_students) NOT NULL, requestor_id UUID FK(iam_person) NOT NULL (the human who submitted the request — guardian or eligible student; human identity per ADR-055), requestor_relationship ENUM(PARENT,GUARDIAN,ELIGIBLE_STUDENT,LEGAL_REPRESENTATIVE) NOT NULL, request_date DATE NOT NULL, request_description TEXT NOT NULL (what records were requested), response_due_date DATE NOT NULL (FERPA requires response within 45 days of request), status ENUM(RECEIVED,IN_PROGRESS,FULFILLED,PARTIALLY_FULFILLED,DENIED,WITHDRAWN) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'RECEIVED', fulfilled_at DATE nullable, fulfilled_by UUID FK(platform_users) nullable (the admin who produced the records), records_provided_description TEXT nullable (description of what was provided), denial_reason TEXT nullable (if status=DENIED: the legal basis for denial), response_document_s3_key TEXT nullable (the compiled records package provided to the requestor — signed URL on access, access logged in audit_log), created_at TIMESTAMPTZ. INDEX(school_id, status) WHERE status NOT IN ('FULFILLED','DENIED','WITHDRAWN'). INDEX(student_id, request_date DESC). Retention: 7 years minimum (FERPA).
rpt_student_support_timelineUnified chronological student support event timeline for counselors and administrators. Materialised by the Analytics Worker from events across SIS, Student Services, and Health. id UUID PK(v7), student_id UUID FK(sis_students) NOT NULL, school_id UUID NOT NULL, event_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, event_type ENUM(DISCIPLINE_INCIDENT,COUNSELOR_REFERRAL,MTSS_TIER_CHANGE,COUNSELING_SESSION,WELLBEING_FLAGGED,PASTORAL_NOTE,HEALTH_EXCLUSION,ABSENCE_PATTERN) NOT NULL, event_summary TEXT NOT NULL (human-readable one-line description), source_module TEXT NOT NULL (e.g. 'M20_SIS', 'M27_STUDENT_SERVICES'), source_record_id UUID NOT NULL (the primary key of the originating record — used to deep-link to the full record), severity ENUM(INFO,NOTICE,WARNING,CRITICAL) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'INFO'. RANGE partition by event_at monthly, 5-year retention. INDEX(student_id, event_at DESC). INDEX(school_id, event_type, event_at DESC). Access restricted: student_counseling_record:read required for counseling session events; all other events visible to TEACHER, COUNSELOR, and ADMIN roles.
rpt_counselor_wellbeing_summaryPer-counselor wellbeing trend summary across their active caseload. Materialised nightly. id UUID PK(v7), counselor_id UUID FK(hr_employees) NOT NULL, school_id UUID NOT NULL, academic_year_id UUID FK NOT NULL, summary_date DATE NOT NULL (the date this snapshot was computed), total_caseload INT NOT NULL, checkins_completed_this_week INT NOT NULL, checkins_flagged_this_week INT NOT NULL, checkins_unresolved_flags INT NOT NULL (flagged check-ins without a completed counseling session response), avg_wellbeing_score_academic NUMERIC(3,2) nullable, avg_wellbeing_score_social NUMERIC(3,2) nullable, avg_wellbeing_score_emotional NUMERIC(3,2) nullable, avg_wellbeing_score_safety NUMERIC(3,2) nullable. UNIQUE(counselor_id, summary_date). INDEX(counselor_id, summary_date DESC). RANGE partition by summary_date monthly, 2-year retention.
rpt_library_usageMaterialised library collection usage read model. Nightly. One row per catalogue item per academic year. id UUID PK(v7), catalogue_item_id UUID FK(lib_catalogue_items) NOT NULL, school_id UUID NOT NULL, academic_year_id UUID FK NOT NULL, title TEXT NOT NULL (denormalised snapshot), author TEXT nullable, resource_type TEXT NOT NULL, total_checkouts INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, total_checkout_days INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 (cumulative days on loan — proxy for reading engagement), total_holds_placed INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, total_reading_log_entries INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 (times this item appeared in lib_reading_logs), avg_rating NUMERIC(3,2) nullable (mean rating from lib_reading_logs), times_renewed INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, times_lost INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, last_checkout_date DATE nullable. UNIQUE(catalogue_item_id, academic_year_id). INDEX(school_id, academic_year_id, total_checkouts DESC) — most-borrowed query. INDEX(school_id, academic_year_id, last_checkout_date) WHERE last_checkout_date IS NULL OR last_checkout_date < current_date - 365 — unused items query for deselection review.
rpt_department_summaryAggregated department-level academic summary. Materialised nightly per department per academic year. id UUID PK(v7), department_id UUID FK(sis_departments) NOT NULL, school_id UUID NOT NULL, academic_year_id UUID FK NOT NULL, term_id UUID FK(sis_terms) nullable (null = full-year rollup), course_count INT NOT NULL, class_count INT NOT NULL, total_enrollment INT NOT NULL, avg_class_performance NUMERIC(5,2) nullable (mean of rpt_class_performance_summary.class_average across all department classes), passing_rate NUMERIC(5,4) nullable (mean passing rate across department classes), avg_attendance_rate NUMERIC(5,4) nullable, at_risk_student_count INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, staff_count INT NOT NULL, observations_completed INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, pd_hours_avg NUMERIC(5,1) nullable. UNIQUE(department_id, academic_year_id, COALESCE(term_id, '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000')). INDEX(school_id, academic_year_id). INDEX(department_id, academic_year_id).
rpt_department_standards_coverageCross-class curriculum standards coverage at department level. Shows which standards are being covered, partially covered, or missed across all classes in a department for a given academic year. Materialised nightly from cur_delivery_gaps aggregated across all classes belonging to courses in the department. id UUID PK(v7), department_id UUID FK(sis_departments) NOT NULL, school_id UUID NOT NULL, academic_year_id UUID FK NOT NULL, standard_id UUID NOT NULL (SOFT INTEGRITY → cur_standards.id or cur_standards_platform.id — application-layer resolution), standard_code TEXT NOT NULL (denormalised snapshot for display), standard_description TEXT NOT NULL (denormalised snapshot), total_classes_teaching INT NOT NULL (number of classes in the department that have a unit covering this standard), classes_complete INT NOT NULL (gap_type=COMPLETE), classes_partial INT NOT NULL (gap_type=PARTIAL), classes_not_started INT NOT NULL (gap_type=NOT_STARTED), overall_coverage ENUM(COMPLETE,PARTIAL,NOT_STARTED,NOT_MAPPED) NOT NULL (derived: COMPLETE when classes_complete=total_classes_teaching; NOT_MAPPED when total_classes_teaching=0). UNIQUE(department_id, academic_year_id, standard_id). INDEX(department_id, academic_year_id, overall_coverage). INDEX(school_id, overall_coverage) WHERE overall_coverage IN ('NOT_STARTED','PARTIAL') — gap identification query.
rpt_aged_debtorsMaterialised aged debtor analysis for Finance Administrator AR dashboard. Nightly. One row per family account with any outstanding balance. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, family_account_id UUID FK(pay_family_accounts) NOT NULL UNIQUE, account_holder_name TEXT NOT NULL (denormalised snapshot), total_outstanding NUMERIC(10,2) NOT NULL, current_amount NUMERIC(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 (invoices not yet due), days_1_30 NUMERIC(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 (1-30 days overdue), days_31_60 NUMERIC(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, days_61_90 NUMERIC(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, days_over_90 NUMERIC(10,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, oldest_invoice_date DATE nullable, invoice_count_outstanding INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, last_payment_date DATE nullable, last_payment_amount NUMERIC(10,2) nullable. INDEX(school_id, total_outstanding DESC) WHERE total_outstanding > 0. INDEX(school_id, days_over_90 DESC) WHERE days_over_90 > 0. Cleared nightly: accounts with total_outstanding = 0 are removed from this table.
rpt_receptionist_dashboardReal-time front-desk dashboard read model. Updated on relevant events (visitor sign-in, attendance event, no-show alert). One row per school — single fast read for the reception screen. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL UNIQUE, generated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, visitors_on_site_count INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, visitors_on_site JSONB NOT NULL (array of {visitor_id, visitor_name, host_name, signed_in_at, purpose, safeguarding_status} — the live visitor list; populated from vis_sign_ins WHERE signed_out_at IS NULL), open_no_show_alerts_count INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, students_late_today_count INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, open_helpdesk_tickets_count INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 (tickets in OPEN status assigned to reception category), active_incidents_count INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0 (inc_incidents WHERE status=ACTIVE), scheduled_visitors_today JSONB NOT NULL (array of vis_pre_registrations for today that have not yet signed in). Updated by: VisitorSignInWorker, AttendanceWorker, NoShowWorker, IncidentWorker on relevant Kafka events. Never rebuilt in full — delta-updated per event (ADR-013 pattern).
dpo_subject_access_requestsData subject rights request — an individual's request to access all personal data the school holds about them. Covers both FERPA (US, 45-day deadline) and GDPR/UK GDPR (30-day deadline) depending on jurisdiction. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, requestor_id UUID FK(iam_person) NOT NULL (the human making the request — iam_person per ADR-055; may be the data subject themselves or a parent/guardian), data_subject_id UUID FK(iam_person) NOT NULL (the human whose data is requested), data_subject_type ENUM(STUDENT,EMPLOYEE,GUARDIAN) NOT NULL, request_type ENUM(ACCESS,RECTIFICATION,ERASURE,RESTRICTION,PORTABILITY,OBJECTION) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ACCESS', request_description TEXT NOT NULL, jurisdiction ENUM(FERPA,GDPR_UK,GDPR_EU,BOTH) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'FERPA', received_date DATE NOT NULL, response_due_date DATE NOT NULL (automatically set: received_date + 45 days for FERPA, + 30 days for GDPR; DPO can extend by 60 further days for GDPR complexity — must notify requestor), extension_granted BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, extension_reason TEXT nullable, status ENUM(RECEIVED,IN_PROGRESS,COMPLETED,DENIED,WITHDRAWN,OVERDUE) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'RECEIVED', completed_at DATE nullable, completed_by UUID FK(platform_users) nullable, response_document_s3_key TEXT nullable (the compiled data package), denial_reason TEXT nullable. INDEX(school_id, status). INDEX(data_subject_id, received_date DESC). INDEX(response_due_date, status) WHERE status IN ('RECEIVED','IN_PROGRESS') — overdue alert query. On INSERT: Task Worker creates URGENT task for DPO with deadline. Retention: 7 years minimum.
dpo_erasure_requestsRight to erasure (right to be forgotten) request under GDPR Article 17. Schools must comply unless legal obligation to retain overrides. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, sar_id UUID FK(dpo_subject_access_requests) nullable (when erasure is part of a broader SAR), data_subject_id UUID FK(iam_person) NOT NULL (the human whose data is to be erased — iam_person per ADR-055), erasure_scope TEXT NOT NULL (what data the subject wants erased — e.g. 'All marketing communications', 'Behavioural incident records older than 3 years'), erasure_reason ENUM(CONSENT_WITHDRAWN,LEGITIMATE_INTERESTS_OVERRIDE,UNLAWFUL_PROCESSING,LEGAL_OBLIGATION_TO_ERASE,OTHER) NOT NULL, status ENUM(RECEIVED,UNDER_REVIEW,APPROVED_PARTIAL,APPROVED_FULL,DENIED,COMPLETED) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'RECEIVED', denial_basis TEXT nullable (the legal ground for refusal — e.g. 'Statutory retention requirement under FERPA', 'Legal proceedings ongoing'), approved_deletions JSONB nullable (array of {table_name, record_count, deleted_at} documenting what was actually erased), denied_categories JSONB nullable (what was retained and why), decided_by UUID FK(platform_users) nullable, decided_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable, legal_hold_checked BOOLEAN DEFAULT false (DPO must verify platform_legal_holds before approving any deletion). INDEX(school_id, status). INDEX(data_subject_id).
dpo_processing_restrictionsA flag placed on a data subject's records restricting automated processing. Under GDPR Article 18 — data may still be held but not used. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, data_subject_id UUID FK(iam_person) NOT NULL (per ADR-055), restriction_reason ENUM(ACCURACY_CONTESTED,PROCESSING_UNLAWFUL,LEGAL_CLAIM_PENDING,OBJECTION_PENDING) NOT NULL, restriction_scope TEXT NOT NULL (which processing activities are restricted — e.g. 'AI-driven features', 'Automated decision-making', 'Third-party data sharing'), placed_by UUID FK(platform_users) NOT NULL, placed_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, lifted_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable, lifted_by UUID FK(platform_users) nullable, lift_reason TEXT nullable. UNIQUE(school_id, data_subject_id) WHERE lifted_at IS NULL — one active restriction per subject. INDEX(school_id, lifted_at) WHERE lifted_at IS NULL. On INSERT: platform flags data_subject_id in Redis restriction_flags:{user_id} TTL=indefinite — checked by application layer before AI processing, export operations, and third-party data sharing.
dpo_portability_requestsData portability request — provide personal data in machine-readable format for transfer to another controller. GDPR Article 20. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, data_subject_id UUID FK(iam_person) NOT NULL (per ADR-055), requested_data_categories TEXT[] NOT NULL (what data categories to export — e.g. {'academic_records','attendance','communications'}), output_format ENUM(JSON,CSV,PDF) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'JSON', status ENUM(RECEIVED,IN_PROGRESS,READY,DOWNLOADED,EXPIRED) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'RECEIVED', export_s3_key TEXT nullable (signed URL expiring in 7 days), export_ready_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable, downloaded_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable, expires_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable, requested_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, completed_by UUID FK(platform_users) nullable. INDEX(school_id, status). INDEX(data_subject_id, requested_at DESC).
dpo_data_breach_recordsPersonal data breach record — documents the breach, risk assessment, and regulatory notifications. GDPR requires supervisory authority notification within 72 hours of discovery. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, breach_title TEXT NOT NULL, breach_type ENUM(UNAUTHORISED_ACCESS,ACCIDENTAL_DISCLOSURE,RANSOMWARE,THEFT,LOSS_OF_DEVICE,SYSTEM_MISCONFIGURATION,THIRD_PARTY_BREACH,OTHER) NOT NULL, discovery_date TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, breach_start_date DATE nullable (when the breach began — may predate discovery), personal_data_categories_involved TEXT[] NOT NULL (e.g. {'student_academic_records','health_data','contact_details'}), estimated_affected_individuals INT nullable, risk_level ENUM(LOW,MEDIUM,HIGH,VERY_HIGH) NOT NULL, risk_to_individuals ENUM(UNLIKELY,POSSIBLE,LIKELY,VERY_LIKELY) NOT NULL, supervisory_authority_notification_required BOOLEAN NOT NULL, supervisory_authority_notified_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable (must be within 72 hours of discovery for reportable breaches), supervisory_authority_reference TEXT nullable, data_subjects_notification_required BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT false (required when HIGH risk to individuals), data_subjects_notified_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable, notification_method TEXT nullable, breach_cause TEXT NOT NULL, remediation_actions TEXT NOT NULL, is_resolved BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, resolved_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable, reported_by UUID FK(hr_employees) NOT NULL, status ENUM(UNDER_INVESTIGATION,NOTIFIED,CONTAINED,RESOLVED) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'UNDER_INVESTIGATION'. INDEX(school_id, status). INDEX(school_id, discovery_date DESC). On INSERT: Task Worker creates URGENT task for DPO; if supervisory_authority_notification_required=true, 72-hour countdown task created.
dpo_processing_activitiesRegister of Processing Activities (ROPA) — GDPR Article 30 mandatory record of every data processing activity. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, activity_name TEXT NOT NULL (e.g. 'Student academic record management', 'AI-powered lesson summarisation', 'Staff payroll processing'), purpose TEXT NOT NULL, legal_basis ENUM(LEGAL_OBLIGATION,PUBLIC_TASK,LEGITIMATE_INTERESTS,VITAL_INTERESTS,CONTRACT,CONSENT) NOT NULL, data_categories TEXT[] NOT NULL (e.g. {'educational_records','health_data','biometric_data'}), data_subjects TEXT[] NOT NULL (e.g. {'students','parents','employees'}), retention_policy_id UUID FK(dpo_retention_policies) nullable (links to the school's documented retention decision), transfers_outside_uk_eea BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, transfer_safeguards TEXT nullable (adequacy decision, SCCs, BCRs — required when transfers_outside_uk_eea=true), automated_decision_making BOOLEAN DEFAULT false (does this activity involve automated decisions with legal effects — GDPR Article 22), profiling BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, high_risk_processing BOOLEAN DEFAULT false (triggers DPIA requirement), dpia_id UUID FK(dpo_dpias) nullable, is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true, last_reviewed_at DATE nullable, reviewed_by UUID FK(platform_users) nullable. INDEX(school_id, is_active). INDEX(school_id, high_risk_processing) WHERE high_risk_processing = true.
dpo_retention_policiesDocumented data retention decisions per data category. The DPO's record of why data is kept and for how long — feeds the ROPA and demonstrates accountability. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, data_category TEXT NOT NULL (e.g. 'Student academic records', 'HR payroll records', 'CCTV footage', 'Health records'), retention_period TEXT NOT NULL (e.g. '7 years from end of enrolment', 'Indefinite for safeguarding records'), legal_basis_for_retention TEXT NOT NULL (the specific legal obligation — e.g. 'FERPA 34 CFR 99', 'Limitation Act 1980', 'Safeguarding duty of care'), review_frequency ENUM(ANNUAL,BIENNIAL,ON_CHANGE) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ANNUAL', last_reviewed_at DATE nullable, next_review_date DATE NOT NULL, reviewed_by UUID FK(platform_users) nullable, links_to_archive_tier TEXT nullable (which ADR-026 tier applies — T1/T2/T3/T4). UNIQUE(school_id, data_category). INDEX(school_id, next_review_date).
dpo_privacy_noticesPublished privacy notice version control. Schools must keep families informed of how data is used and must update the notice when processing changes. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, notice_version TEXT NOT NULL (e.g. '2026.1'), notice_type ENUM(STUDENT_PARENT,EMPLOYEE,VOLUNTEER,WEBSITE_VISITOR) NOT NULL, effective_from DATE NOT NULL, superseded_at DATE nullable (null = currently active), document_s3_key TEXT NOT NULL (the published privacy notice PDF), summary_of_changes TEXT nullable (what changed from the previous version — displayed to users on re-consent prompt), requires_re_acknowledgement BOOLEAN DEFAULT false (when true: all data subjects of this type are prompted to acknowledge the updated notice), acknowledgement_count INT nullable (materialised: count of platform_users who have acknowledged this version), published_by UUID FK(platform_users) NOT NULL. UNIQUE(school_id, notice_type, notice_version). INDEX(school_id, notice_type, effective_from DESC).
dpo_processing_consent_recordsDocumented consent for specific data processing activities where consent is the legal basis. Distinct from platform_signature_requests (which covers document signatures) — this records informed consent to a specific processing activity. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, data_subject_id UUID FK(iam_person) NOT NULL (per ADR-055), consent_given_by UUID FK(iam_person) NOT NULL (the human giving consent — may differ from data_subject_id when parent consents on behalf of under-13 child), processing_activity_id UUID FK(dpo_processing_activities) nullable (the specific activity this consent covers), activity_description TEXT NOT NULL (plain-language description of what they are consenting to), consent_version TEXT NOT NULL (version of the consent wording — ties to dpo_privacy_notices.notice_version), consented BOOLEAN NOT NULL, consented_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable (null when consented=false — explicit refusal), withdrawn_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable (when consent is later withdrawn), collection_method ENUM(PORTAL_CHECKBOX,PAPER_FORM,VERBAL_RECORDED,EMAIL_REPLY) NOT NULL. INDEX(data_subject_id, consented). INDEX(school_id, processing_activity_id, consented).
dpo_third_party_processorsRegister of all third-party organisations that process personal data on the school's behalf — GDPR Article 28 requirement. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, processor_name TEXT NOT NULL (e.g. 'Amazon Web Services', 'Stripe Inc', 'OpenAI', 'Google Workspace'), processor_type ENUM(CLOUD_INFRASTRUCTURE,PAYMENT_PROCESSOR,AI_PROVIDER,MDM_PROVIDER,VIDEO_CONFERENCING,EMAIL_PROVIDER,IDENTITY_PROVIDER,ANALYTICS,OTHER) NOT NULL, registered_country TEXT NOT NULL, data_categories_processed TEXT[] NOT NULL, dpa_in_place BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT false (Data Processing Agreement signed), dpa_id UUID FK(dpo_data_processing_agreements) nullable, adequacy_decision_applicable BOOLEAN DEFAULT false (for non-UK/EU processors: is there an adequacy decision covering their country), transfer_mechanism ENUM(ADEQUACY_DECISION,SCCs,BCRs,DEROGATION,NONE) nullable, last_reviewed_at DATE nullable, next_review_date DATE NOT NULL. UNIQUE(school_id, processor_name). INDEX(school_id, dpa_in_place) WHERE dpa_in_place = false — gaps in DPA coverage.
dpo_data_processing_agreementsData Processing Agreements (DPAs) with third-party processors — GDPR Article 28 requirement. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, processor_id UUID FK(dpo_third_party_processors) NOT NULL, agreement_reference TEXT NOT NULL (the DPA reference number or version), effective_from DATE NOT NULL, effective_to DATE nullable (null = ongoing), document_s3_key TEXT NOT NULL (signed DPA document), sub_processors_disclosed BOOLEAN DEFAULT false (processor has disclosed their sub-processors), sub_processor_list_s3_key TEXT nullable, review_date DATE NOT NULL, signed_by UUID FK(platform_users) NOT NULL (school signatory), status ENUM(DRAFT,ACTIVE,EXPIRED,TERMINATED) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ACTIVE'. INDEX(processor_id, status). INDEX(school_id, review_date).
dpo_pseudonymisation_logImmutable record of every field-level pseudonymisation operation performed on audit_log.metadata in response to a GDPR erasure request (ADR-059). id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, erasure_request_id UUID FK(dpo_erasure_requests) NOT NULL, data_subject_id UUID FK(iam_person) NOT NULL, target_table TEXT NOT NULL (currently always 'audit_log'), target_field TEXT NOT NULL (currently always 'metadata'), rows_pseudonymised INT NOT NULL, pseudonymisation_token TEXT NOT NULL (the opaque token that replaced the data subject's identifiers in the metadata JSONB — stored here so the DPO can verify replacement and, if legally required, reverse pseudonymisation), pseudonymised_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, pseudonymised_by UUID FK(platform_users) NOT NULL. IMMUTABLE. INDEX(erasure_request_id). INDEX(data_subject_id). DESIGN NOTE: GL entries (fin_gl_entries.description) and ledger entries (pay_ledger_entries) are retained on legal obligation grounds (FERPA 7-year minimum, financial record retention requirements) per the denial_basis field on dpo_erasure_requests. Only audit_log.metadata — which may contain arbitrary JSONB PII payloads — receives field-level pseudonymisation because it is the highest-risk free-form field and not a financial record.
dpo_dpiasData Protection Impact Assessment — required before high-risk processing activities (GDPR Article 35). id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, processing_activity_id UUID FK(dpo_processing_activities) nullable, dpia_title TEXT NOT NULL (e.g. 'AI-powered lesson summarisation DPIA', 'Biometric attendance system DPIA'), trigger_reason TEXT NOT NULL (why a DPIA is required — e.g. 'Systematic processing of student data', 'New AI processing activity', 'Large-scale health data processing'), status ENUM(SCOPING,IN_PROGRESS,COMPLETED,APPROVED,REJECTED) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'SCOPING', description_of_processing TEXT NOT NULL, necessity_proportionality_assessment TEXT nullable (is the processing necessary and proportionate to the purpose), risks_identified JSONB nullable (array of {risk_description, likelihood, severity, mitigation}), residual_risk_level ENUM(LOW,MEDIUM,HIGH) nullable, dpo_opinion TEXT nullable (DPO's formal opinion — required by GDPR), supervisory_authority_consultation_required BOOLEAN DEFAULT false (required when residual risk remains HIGH after mitigation), completed_at DATE nullable, completed_by UUID FK(platform_users) nullable, approved_by UUID FK(platform_users) nullable, document_s3_key TEXT nullable (full DPIA report). INDEX(school_id, status).
rpt_scheduled_reportsConfiguration record for a report that should be automatically generated and delivered on a schedule. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, report_name TEXT NOT NULL, template_name TEXT NOT NULL (references a registered template in platform_archive_query_templates or a built-in operational report type), report_params JSONB nullable (parameters to pass to the report template — e.g. date_range_offset_days, grade_level_filter), schedule_cron TEXT NOT NULL (standard cron expression — e.g. 0 8 * * 1 for every Monday 8am), timezone TEXT NOT NULL, delivery_channel ENUM(EMAIL,IN_APP,BOTH) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'EMAIL', recipient_ids UUID[] NOT NULL (array of platform_users.id to receive the report), output_format ENUM(PDF,CSV,XLSX) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PDF', is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true, last_run_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable, next_run_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable (computed from schedule_cron + timezone at creation and after each run), last_run_status ENUM(SUCCESS,FAILED) nullable, last_run_error TEXT nullable, created_by UUID FK(platform_users) NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ. INDEX(school_id, is_active). INDEX(next_run_at) WHERE is_active = true — Scheduled Report Worker polls this index.
rpt_district_summaryUNIQUE(organisation_id, academic_year_id). school_count INT, total_enrolled INTEGER (INTEGER — not SMALLINT), total_staff INT, avg_attendance_rate NUMERIC(5,4). Populated from school summaries.
rpt_district_school_comparisonid UUID PK(v7), organisation_id UUID, academic_year_id UUID, school_id UUID, rank_by_attendance INT, rank_by_performance INT, metrics JSONB, generated_at TIMESTAMPTZ.
rpt_report_definitionsid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID, name TEXT NOT NULL, report_type TEXT, template_config JSONB, is_state_report BOOLEAN. UNIQUE(school_id, name).
rpt_report_runsid UUID PK(v7), report_definition_id UUID FK, run_by UUID FK, status ENUM(PENDING,RUNNING,COMPLETE,FAILED), output_s3_key TEXT, generated_at TIMESTAMPTZ, row_count INT. INDEX(report_definition_id, generated_at DESC).
rpt_state_report_templatesid UUID PK(v7), state_code TEXT, report_type TEXT, schema_version TEXT, template_config JSONB. UNIQUE(state_code, report_type, schema_version).
rpt_state_report_submissionsid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID, template_id UUID FK, academic_year_id UUID FK, status ENUM(DRAFT,SUBMITTED,ACCEPTED,REJECTED), submitted_at TIMESTAMPTZ, submission_ref TEXT.

Wave 4 Modules

M26Portfolioprefix: pfl_5 tablesWave 3
TableDefinition
pfl_portfoliosid UUID PK(v7), student_id UUID FK(platform_entity_cache), school_id UUID, title TEXT, visibility ENUM(PRIVATE,TEACHER,PARENT,PUBLIC) DEFAULT 'PRIVATE', share_link_enabled BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ. On student transfer or graduation: visibility → PRIVATE, ownership transitions with platform_students.
pfl_portfolio_itemsid UUID PK(v7), portfolio_id UUID FK, item_type ENUM(SUBMISSION,GRADE,ACHIEVEMENT,REFLECTION,EXTERNAL_FILE,CERTIFICATE), source_ref_id UUID (DISPLAY-ONLY — polymorphic: cls_submissions, cls_grades, or pfl_achievements), title TEXT, description TEXT, is_featured BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, added_at TIMESTAMPTZ. INDEX(portfolio_id, is_featured, added_at DESC).
pfl_portfolio_sharesid UUID PK(v7), portfolio_id UUID FK, share_token TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE (32-byte random hex), expires_at TIMESTAMPTZ, recipient_email TEXT, viewed_at TIMESTAMPTZ, status ENUM(ACTIVE,EXPIRED,REVOKED). Partial index: (expires_at) WHERE expires_at IS NOT NULL. Cleanup job: UPDATE status='EXPIRED' WHERE expires_at < now(). Expired tokens return 410 Gone.
pfl_achievementsid UUID PK(v7), student_id UUID FK(platform_entity_cache), school_id UUID, title TEXT NOT NULL, achievement_type ENUM(ACADEMIC,SPORTING,MUSICAL,LEADERSHIP,COMMUNITY,CUSTOM), source_module TEXT (DISPLAY-ONLY), source_ref_id UUID (DISPLAY-ONLY), awarded_at DATE, awarded_by UUID FK, description TEXT, badge_image_url TEXT. INDEX(student_id, school_id). Achievements intentionally portable and independent of source module — no DB FK on source_ref_id.
pfl_achievement_sharesid UUID PK(v7), achievement_id UUID FK, shared_by UUID FK, platform ENUM(EMAIL,SOCIAL,PORTFOLIO), shared_at TIMESTAMPTZ.
M25Curriculumprefix: cur_11 tablesWave 3

Platform tables cur_standards_frameworks_platform and cur_standards_platform are documented in M0.

TableDefinition
cur_school_framework_adoptionsUNIQUE(school_id, platform_framework_id, academic_year_id). Indicates which national curriculum frameworks the school follows in a given year. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID, platform_framework_id UUID FK(cur_standards_frameworks_platform), academic_year_id UUID FK. Schools also retain tenant-schema cur_standards_frameworks for custom bespoke curricula.
cur_standards_frameworksSchool-created custom curriculum frameworks only (school_id NOT NULL ENFORCED). Platform-seeded frameworks (CCSS, NGSS, etc.) live in cur_frameworks_platform in the platform schema — they are never in this tenant table. UNIQUE(school_id, name, version).
cur_standardsSchool-created custom standards only. Platform standards (CCSS, NGSS) are in cur_standards_platform.
cur_curriculum_mapsid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID, framework_id UUID (resolved by application from either tenant cur_standards_frameworks or platform cur_standards_frameworks_platform via cur_school_framework_adoptions), academic_year_id UUID FK, subject TEXT, grade_level TEXT.
cur_unitsid UUID PK(v7), curriculum_map_id UUID FK, title TEXT NOT NULL, sequence_order INT, estimated_weeks INT, start_date DATE, end_date DATE.
cur_unit_standardsUNIQUE(unit_id, standard_id). standard_id UUID (SOFT INTEGRITY → cur_standards.id or cur_standards_platform.id — application-layer resolution).
cur_unit_lessonsUNIQUE(unit_id, cls_lesson_id). cls_lesson_id UUID (SOFT INTEGRITY → cls_lessons.id — application-layer check only, registered in platform_reference_health, ADR-028).
cur_delivery_gapsUNIQUE(unit_id, standard_id). gap_type ENUM(NOT_STARTED,PARTIAL,COMPLETE), lessons_planned INT, lessons_delivered INT, last_assessed_at TIMESTAMPTZ. Materialised nightly (ADR-018). Never computed on demand.
cur_resource_linksid UUID PK(v7), unit_id UUID FK, resource_type ENUM(FILE,URL,VIDEO,TEXTBOOK), url TEXT, title TEXT, is_teacher_only BOOLEAN.
M85Accreditationprefix: acc_8 tablesWave 3

Platform tables acc_frameworks_platform and acc_standards_platform are documented in M0.

TableDefinition
acc_school_framework_adoptionsUNIQUE(school_id, platform_framework_id). Replaces former acc_frameworks rows where school_id IS NULL. id UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID, platform_framework_id UUID FK(acc_frameworks_platform), adopted_at DATE, is_active BOOLEAN.
acc_frameworksSchool-created custom accreditation frameworks only (school_id NOT NULL ENFORCED). Platform-standard frameworks (AdvancED, IB, CIS, etc.) live in acc_frameworks_platform in the platform schema — never in this tenant table.
acc_evidence_itemsid UUID PK(v7), standard_id UUID (SOFT INTEGRITY — resolved to platform or tenant standard), school_id UUID, evidence_type ENUM(DOCUMENT,URL,METRIC,OBSERVATION,SURVEY), title TEXT, s3_key TEXT, status ENUM(DRAFT,SUBMITTED,APPROVED,REJECTED), submitted_at TIMESTAMPTZ. INDEX(standard_id, school_id, status). INDEX(school_id, status).
acc_self_study_ratingsUNIQUE(standard_id, school_id, cycle_id). rating ENUM(EXEMPLARY,ACCOMPLISHED,DEVELOPING,NOT_MET), rationale TEXT, rated_by UUID FK, rated_at TIMESTAMPTZ.
acc_action_plansid UUID PK(v7), standard_id UUID, school_id UUID, goal TEXT NOT NULL, actions JSONB, responsible_party UUID FK(hr_employees), target_date DATE, status ENUM(PLANNED,IN_PROGRESS,COMPLETE,OVERDUE).
acc_site_visit_prepid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID, visit_date DATE, accreditor_org TEXT, lead_contact_name TEXT, status ENUM(PREPARING,READY,VISIT_COMPLETE), readiness_score NUMERIC(3,0), notes TEXT.

Kafka Topics — Complete Register (v11)

All topics follow the ADR-057 Platform Event Model convention: {env}.{domain}.{entity}.{verb}. Topic owner is the listed producer module.

TopicProducerPrimary ConsumersNotes
platform.student.updatedPlatform Core (M0)platform_entity_cache consumers*Triggers cache refresh in all tenant schemas.*
platform.substitute.updatedPlatform Core (M0)platform_entity_cache consumers*Triggers cache refresh in enrolled schools.*
platform.volunteer.updatedPlatform Core (M0)platform_entity_cache consumers*Triggers VOLUNTEER cache refresh.*
student.enrolledSIS (M20)Classroom, Communications, Payments*student.enrolled → gradebook entry, portal access, welcome email.*
student.transferredSIS (M20)Platform, Analytics*Updates platform_student_id school linkage.*
