iep.accommodation.updatedHealth (M23)SIS (M20)*Consumer updates sis_student_active_accommodations.*
attendance.confirmedSIS (M20)Analytics, Communications*Feeds rpt_daily_attendance_summary.*
grade.postedClassroom (M21)Communications, SIS, Analytics*Triggers gradebook snapshot debounce (ADR-010).*
assignment.due.reminderClassroom (M21) schedulerCommunications*Dispatched T-24h before due_date.*
video.uploadedClassroom (M21)AI Gateway (Video Worker)*S3 event → Kafka → transcription pipeline.*
lesson.summary.readyAI GatewayClassroom, Communications*Delivers AI artifact to teacher.*
msg.message.postedCommunications (M40)msg_thread_stats consumer, unread counter, notification fan-out*Payload includes thread_message_count_at_send + is_new.*
msg.emission.logCommunications (M40)Replay deduplication only*Kafka compacted topic, retention.ms=-1. Authoritative emission record.*
payment.receivedPayments (M81)Communications, Analytics*Triggers receipt notification.*
invoice.overduePayments (M81) schedulerCommunications*Triggers overdue reminder.*
leave.approvedHR (M80)Communications, HR payroll*leave.approved → substitute need assessment.*
approval.request.resolvedApproval Engine (M2)All source modules*Source module listens for its own reference_id.*
calendar.event.changedCalendar (M3)Calendar delta-update worker*Worker applies targeted cal_personal_calendar_items updates.*
emergency.alert.issuedCommunications (M40)All consumers — broadcast*Highest priority, no lag tolerance.*
ticket.createdHelpdesk (M60)Communications*Acknowledgement notification to requester.*
bus.position.updatedTransportation (M61)Communications (ETA)*trn_vehicle_positions written; ETA notifications triggered.*
device.assignedTechnology (M62)Communications*Assignment notification to assignee.*
sub.job.filledSub Marketplace (M82)M22 (Academic Scheduling), HR (M80)*M22: creates sch_substitution_timetable. HR: sub.assignment.completed.*
sub.assignment.completedSub Marketplace (M82)HR (M80)*HR never reads sub_* tables — consumes this event (ADR-029).*
incident.declaredIncident (M91)Visitor Mgmt (M90), Task Worker (M1), Communications*Fan-out via inc_declaration_outbox: tasks → muster → alert.*
meeting.scheduledMeetings (M41)Communications, Calendar*Calendar item created via delta-update worker.*
sch.timetable.updatedAcad. Scheduling (M22)Calendar (M3) delta-update worker*Calendar delta-update creates/updates teacher cal_personal_calendar_items.*
sch.import.activatedAcad. Scheduling (M22)ImportMetadataCompactionWorker*NULLs raw_source_row in sch_import_slot_metadata.*
tenant.migratedPlatform Core (M0)Analytics, monitoring*Emitted after successful cluster rebalance (ADR-031).*
fac.work_order.createdFacilities (M65)Communications (M40), Calendar (M3)*Notifies assigned custodian; creates calendar item.*
fac.maintenance_task.overdueFacilities (M65)Task Worker (M1)*Auto-creates follow-up task; alerts facilities manager.*
fac.supply.reorder_neededFacilities (M65)Task Worker (M1)*Auto-creates procurement task.*
fac.inspection.failedFacilities (M65)Task Worker (M1), Communications (M40)*Creates urgent resolution tasks; notifies principal.*
fac.inspection_violation.overdueFacilities (M65)Task Worker (M1), Communications (M40)*Escalation alert when violation due_date passes unresolved.*
pub.publication.submitted_for_reviewPublications (M42)Approval Workflows (M2), Communications (M40)*Triggers approval request; notifies approver.*
pub.publication.approvedPublications (M42)Task Worker (M1)*Auto-creates scheduled publish task if applicable.*
pub.publication.publishedPublications (M42)Communications (M40)*Fan-out delivery to all recipients.*
pub.publication.rejectedPublications (M42)Communications (M40)*Notifies creator with reviewer feedback.*

Appendix A — Partition Strategy Summary (v11)

All partitioned tables are monitored in partition_mgmt_health. Alert threshold: retention_drift_days outside ±2 days = SRE page.

TableStrategyGranularityRetentionNotes
sis_attendance_recordsRANGE(school_year) → HASH(class_id)Annual / 8 bucketsIndefinite*BRIN on date. Pre-provision current + 2 years.*
msg_threadsHASH(school_id)16 bucketsIndefinite*Partition pruning on all inbox queries.*
msg_messagesRANGE(created_at) pg_partmanMonthly24 months T1 → T2*BRIN on created_at. school_id denormalised.*
msg_thread_participantsHASH(school_id)16 bucketsIndefinite*Follows msg_threads partition key.*
tsk_tasksRANGE(created_at) pg_partmanMonthlyActive tasks only*Archiver moves DONE/CANCELLED >30 days nightly.*
tsk_tasks_archiveRANGE(created_at)Annual3 years T2*>**3yr → T3. INDEX(owner_id, completed_at DESC).*
audit_logRANGE(created_at) pg_partmanMonthly12m T1 → 7yr T2 → T3*FERPA 7-year minimum.*
platform_kafka_consumer_healthRANGE(recorded_at) pg_partmanMonthly3 months*Operational monitoring only.*
trn_vehicle_positionsRANGE(recorded_at) pg_partmanDaily90 days*BRIN on recorded_at.*
trn_ridership_recordsRANGE(scanned_at) pg_partmanMonthlyIndefinite*INDEX(student_id).*
rpt_daily_attendance_summaryRANGE(created_at) pg_partmanMonthly3 years*Read model — no updates.*
rpt_student_academic_summaryRANGE(created_at) pg_partmanMonthly3 years*Read model — no updates.*
msg_notification_logRANGE(sent_at) pg_partmanMonthly12 months*Audit + delivery tracking.*
lib_checkoutsRANGE(checkout_date) pg_partmanAnnual7 years*FERPA-adjacent — library records.*
cls_ai_usage_logRANGE(created_at) pg_partmanMonthly2 years*AI quota enforcement.*
sch_import_slot_metadataRANGE(import_date)Annual3 years (operational)*raw_source_row NULLed on activation.*
sch_import_slot_metadata_archiveRANGE(import_date)Annual3 years post-supersede*S3 T3 at 500GB or 50k schools.*
fac_maintenance_tasksRANGE(scheduled_date)AnnualIndefinite*Append-heavy operational record.*
fac_supply_transactionsRANGE(created_at) pg_partmanMonthly3 years*Append-only supply audit log.*
pub_distribution_recipientsRANGE(created_at) pg_partmanMonthly2 years*Delivery audit trail.*

Cross-Module Interaction Contract (v11)

These rules govern how modules communicate. They are referenced by ADR-028 (reference taxonomy), ADR-057 (event model), and ADR-055 (identity FK contract). This section centralises them as a single enforcement doctrine.

Rule 1 — No Cross-Module Writes

No module writes to another module's tables. Ever. This is the foundational isolation rule. If Module A needs to cause a state change in Module B, Module A emits a Kafka event and Module B's worker consumes it and writes to its own tables. The only exception is M0 Platform Core — platform_ and iam_ tables are written by platform-level workers that serve all modules (e.g. TenantRoutingCacheWorker, IAMCachePrewarmWorker, FamilyMemberSyncWorker). No domain module writes to platform_ tables directly.

Rule 2 — Event-Driven Propagation Only

Cross-module state changes propagate through Kafka events following ADR-057. Each event type has exactly one owning producer module. The event envelope includes: event_id, event_type, event_version, occurred_at, published_at, tenant_id, source_module, correlation_id, and payload. Topic naming: {env}.{domain}.{entity}.{verb}. Consumer idempotency via platform_event_consumer_idempotency (one row per consumer per event_id). DLQ after three failures.

Rule 3 — Read Models Are Consumer-Owned

rpt_ read models in M110 Analytics are owned by the Analytics module. They are materialised by background workers that read from source module tables (via replica-routed queries) and write to rpt_ tables. Source modules do not write to rpt_ tables. Source modules do not read from rpt_ tables. Read models are eventually consistent and are never the source of truth for operational decisions.

Rule 4 — Reference Taxonomy (ADR-028)

Three types of cross-module references: (1) HARD FK — database-enforced foreign key. Used only within a module or to platform_ tables. (2) SOFT INTEGRITY — application-layer check, registered in platform_reference_health. Used for cross-module references where DB FK would create compile-time coupling. (3) DISPLAY-ONLY — no enforcement, column comment required. Used for labels and snapshots that do not need referential integrity. Platform infrastructure workers may do read-only PK lookups across modules — this is the only permitted cross-module read pattern outside of analytics.

Rule 5 — Identity References (ADR-055)

All domain tables reference iam_person (FK category 1) for human identity. platform_users (FK category 2) is used only for auth/session/audit columns (created_by, reviewed_by, actor_id). Domain projection IDs (hr_employees.id, sis_students.id, sis_guardians.id — FK category 3) are used when the column requires role context. These three categories are mutually exclusive per column.

Module-to-Service Mapping (v11)

At 38 modules and 840 tables, modules must be grouped into a smaller set of deployable service domains for implementation ownership. This mapping defines 10 service domains plus 4 extracted services (already defined in ADR-002). Module boundaries are preserved within each service — this grouping affects deployment and team ownership, not schema isolation.

Deployable Service Domains

Service DomainModulesTablesTeam Ownership Notes
Identity PlatformM0 Platform Core (platform_ + iam_)81Never extracted. Shared schema. Owns tenant routing, IAM, entity cache, import pipeline, vendor accounts, official profiles, district policies, families.
Academic CoreM20 SIS, M21 Classroom, M22 Scheduling, M25 Curriculum, M26 Portfolio139High cohesion. Student records, grades, assignments, scheduling, achievements, hall passes, course selection. Single team owns the student academic lifecycle.
Student SupportM23 Health, M27 Student Services42Sensitive data domain. Health records, counselling, wellbeing, IEP/504, MTSS. Separate team for compliance and access control discipline.
CommunicationsM40 Communications, M41 Meetings, M42 Publications57Messaging, notifications, video meetings, content moderation, publications. Notification Service already extracted (ADR-002).
Campus OperationsM60 Service Tickets, M61 Transportation, M62 IT Infrastructure, M63 Food Service, M65 Facilities145Physical plant operations. Tickets, fleet, devices, food service, buildings. Transport Dispatch already extracted (ADR-002).
Athletics & ActivitiesM64 Clubs & Student Life, M66 Athletics54Sports, clubs, elections, field trips, officials marketplace, game scheduling, streaming.
CommerceM67 School Store, M86 Procurement, M84 Payments & Billing49Money flows. Store orders, purchasing, billing, family accounts. Stripe integration (ADR-003).
WorkforceM80 HR, M82 Sub Marketplace, M87 HR Appraisals64Employment lifecycle. Hiring, employees, leave, payroll, substitutes, appraisals.
EnrolmentM81 Enrolment25Student intake pipeline. Applications, waitlists, offers, onboarding, withdrawals.
Safety & ComplianceM90 Visitor Management, M91 Incident & Emergency, DPO Compliance33Visitors, incidents, emergency management, GDPR/FERPA compliance. Emergency Alert already extracted (ADR-002).
CommunityM100 Parent Engagement, M101 Events & Ticketing, M102 Alumni, M103 Groups29Parent conferences, events, ticketing, alumni, community groups.
FinanceM83 Finance & Accounting9Strict boundary. GL, AP, fund accounting. Wave 4.
AnalyticsM110 Analytics34Read models only. All rpt_ tables. Replica-routed reads.
LibraryM24 Library20Catalogue, circulation, locations, scanning, reading programmes, recommendations.

Extracted Services (ADR-002, unchanged in v11)

ServiceReason for Extraction
Video ProcessingCPU-intensive. Lesson recording, athletic event streaming (ADR-068), highlight clips.
AI InferenceGPU-bound. AI Gateway (ADR-004). Study tool, grading assistance, shelf scanning, recommendations.
Notification / PushFan-out scale. SMS, email, push notifications across all modules.
Scheduling SolverStateless compute. Constraint programming engine (ADR-056).
Transport DispatchReal-time. Driver app, route tracking, delay management.
Emergency AlertLatency-critical. Lockdown, evacuation, reunification.

v11 Module Scope Boundary Definitions

These definitions restate module boundaries affected by v10 restructuring. They are authoritative for implementation and supersede any conflicting descriptions in the carried-forward v9.2 body sections above.

M81 Enrolment / M84 Payments & Billing / M83 Finance Boundary (restated for v10)

Boundary Restatement M81 Enrolment (enr_) owns: the admissions pipeline — applications, waitlists, intake capacities, offers, onboarding checklists, withdrawal requests, exit tasks, transfer packages. M81 is the student lifecycle gate — getting students into and out of the school. M84 Payments & Billing (pay_) owns: the family account, invoices, payment intents, ledger entries, financial aid awards, lunch account balances, fee schedules, payment plans, refunds, credit notes. M84 is Accounts Receivable — families owe the school. M84 emits Kafka events: pay.invoice.created, pay.payment.received, pay.refund.issued, pay.credit_note.issued, pay.debt.written_off. M83 Finance & Accounting (fin_) owns: what those transactions mean financially — GL entries, budget tracking, fund balances, board reports. M83 consumes M84 events and posts double-entry GL entries. M83 is the financial truth-of-record. Hard boundary: M81, M84, and M83 share no tables. M84 and M83 communicate via Kafka events only. M81 and M84 may share the family context (an enrolment creates a family account) but the enrolment table (enr_) does not write to pay_ tables — the EnrolmentActivationWorker emits an enrolment.confirmed event that the PaymentAccountWorker consumes to create the family account. Where does store billing live? str_orders (M67 School Store) reference pay_family_accounts (M84) for family account billing. The store module emits str.order.completed; M84 consumes it to post the charge. The store never writes to pay_ tables directly.

Canonical Finance Ownership (M81 / M84 / M83)

M84 Payments & Billing is Accounts Receivable. It owns: family accounts, invoices, payment intents, ledger entries, fees, financial aid, lunch account balances, refunds, credit notes. M84 is the billing engine — it knows what families owe and what they have paid. M84 emits: pay.invoice.created, pay.payment.received, pay.refund.issued, pay.credit_note.issued, pay.debt.written_off. M84 never writes to fin_ tables. M83 Finance & Accounting is the System of Record for accounting. It owns: the general ledger, chart of accounts, fund balances, budget tracking, AP vouchers, journal batches, and board reporting. M83 consumes M84 events and posts double-entry GL entries. M83 is the financial truth — if M84 says a payment was received, M83 records the debit to cash and the credit to revenue. M83 never reads pay_ tables directly — it acts solely on events. M81 Enrolment is the student lifecycle gate. It owns: applications, waitlists, offers, onboarding, withdrawals. M81 emits enr.student.enrolled when an offer is accepted. M84's PaymentAccountWorker consumes this to create the family account. M81 never writes to pay_ or fin_ tables. M86 Procurement is Accounts Payable (basic scope). It owns: requisitions, purchase orders, receiving, distribution. M86 emits prc.po.issued (consumed by M83 at Wave 4 for encumbrance) and prc.distribution.completed (consumed by operational modules for inventory). M86 reads fin_suppliers and fin_budget_lines but never writes to fin_ tables. M67 School Store is a sales channel. It owns: products, orders, inventory. str.order.completed is consumed by M84 to charge the family account. M67 never writes to pay_ or fin_ tables. The rule is absolute: no module writes to another module's tables. Financial data flows through Kafka events only.

M64 Clubs & Student Life / M66 Athletics Boundary (new for v10)

Boundary Definition M64 Clubs & Student Life (ext_) owns: non-athletic extracurricular activities — clubs, student government, community service activities, field trips, club equipment, elections, club chartering and budgets, participation tracking, awards, and consent records for non-athletic activities. The ext_ prefix is retained from v9.2. 12 athletic tables from v9.2's ext_ scope are NOT built in v10 — they are replaced by purpose-built ath_ tables in M66. M66 Athletics (ath_) owns: sports programmes, seasons, team rosters with eligibility verification, game scheduling (including CampusOS-to-CampusOS proposals), officials marketplace assignments and ratings, game results and player statistics, live streaming and recording, highlight clips, athletic equipment with safety compliance, injury tracking with concussion protocol, medical clearances, and coaching assignments. The ath_ prefix is new in v10. Cross-module pattern: a student who is both in the chess club and on the basketball team appears in ext_activity_members (chess club) AND ath_roster_members (basketball). The two modules do not share tables or events. Eligibility rules (ath_) check sis_ grades; club participation limits (ext_) are independent. Athletic equipment (ath_equipment, ath_equipment_checkouts) is separate from club equipment (ext_equipment_items, ext_equipment_assignments).

M86 Procurement Scope Boundary (new for v10, ADR-061)

Scope Definition — Basic Procurement (Wave 2) M86 Procurement (prc_) in v10 covers basic procurement ONLY. This is explicitly NOT the full Wave 5 scope from ADR-054. BASIC SCOPE (built in Wave 2): (1) Purchase requisitions from any department, routed through M2 Approval Workflows; (2) Purchase orders issued to vendors from the fin_suppliers directory; (3) Budget commitment — when a PO is issued, the amount is reserved against fin_budget_lines (reduces available balance before payment); (4) Receiving — inspect deliveries against POs, log discrepancies; (5) Inventory distribution — hand off received items to operational modules with automatic inventory creation; (6) Returns and warranty claims; (7) Vendor performance tracking. EXPLICITLY NOT IN WAVE 2 SCOPE (deferred to full procurement, post-M83): (A) Three-way matching with tolerance thresholds (PO vs receiving vs invoice automatic reconciliation); (B) Blanket purchase orders (open POs for recurring purchases against a committed annual amount); (C) Catalogue-based purchasing (pre-negotiated vendor catalogues with point-and-click ordering); (D) Encumbrance accounting (formal encumbrance lifecycle tied to M83 general ledger); (E) Competitive bidding workflow (RFQ/RFP process with vendor comparison scoring); (F) Contract lifecycle management (renewal, amendment, termination workflows). DEPENDENCY: M86 depends on fin_suppliers and fin_supplier_contacts (Wave 2 per ADR-051) and fin_budgets/fin_budget_lines (Wave 4 per ADR-058). In Wave 2, budget commitment tracking uses prc_budget_commitments as a lightweight mechanism — it reduces available balance but does not create formal GL encumbrances. At Wave 4/5 when M83 is fully built, prc_budget_commitments will be enhanced or replaced by proper encumbrance entries in the GL. DISTRIBUTION EVENT CONTRACT: When procurement distributes items to a department, prc.distribution.completed Kafka event is emitted. Each destination module has a worker that consumes the event and creates the appropriate inventory record. The event payload includes: destination_module (tech, trn, fds, lib, ath, ext, fac, str), item details, quantity, and cost. The procurement module never writes directly to another module's tables.

Kafka Topic Register — v10/v11 Additions

The v9.2 Kafka Topics Register (carried forward above) defines ~30 topics. v10 adds the following topics for new modules and expanded functionality. All follow the ADR-057 convention: {env}.{domain}.{entity}.{verb}. Topic owner is the listed producer module.

TopicProducerPrimary ConsumersNotes
enr.student.enrolledM81 EnrolmentM84 Payments (create family account), M20 SIS (activate student record)Emitted when enrolment offer is accepted and onboarding is complete.
pay.invoice.createdM84 PaymentsM83 Finance (GL posting)Moved from M81 ownership to M84 after split.
pay.payment.receivedM84 PaymentsM83 Finance (GL posting)Moved from M81 ownership to M84 after split.
pay.refund.issuedM84 PaymentsM83 Finance (GL reversal)Moved from M81 ownership to M84 after split.
pay.credit_note.issuedM84 PaymentsM83 Finance (GL adjustment)Moved from M81 ownership to M84 after split.
pay.debt.written_offM84 PaymentsM83 Finance (GL write-off)Moved from M81 ownership to M84 after split.
prc.po.issuedM86 ProcurementM83 Finance (budget commitment at Wave 4)Budget commitment. In Wave 2, prc_budget_commitments tracks this locally.
prc.distribution.completedM86 ProcurementM62 IT Infrastructure, M61 Transportation, M63 Food Service, M24 Library, M66 Athletics, M64 Clubs, M65 Facilities, M67 School StoreEach consumer creates inventory record in its own tables. Payload includes destination_module, item details, quantity, cost.
str.order.completedM67 School StoreM84 Payments (charge family account)For student/parent orders billed to family account. External orders use Stripe directly (ADR-003).
str.inventory.lowM67 School StoreM86 Procurement (generate replenishment requisition)Emitted when str_product_inventory.quantity_on_hand <= reorder_point.
ath.official.assignment.completedM66 AthleticsM84 Payments (process official fee)Emitted when AD confirms official worked the game.
ath.game.result.enteredM66 AthleticsM110 Analytics (update rpt_game_results)Triggers standings recalculation. For CampusOS-to-CampusOS games, visible to both schools via entity cache.
svc.wellbeing.alert.createdM27 Student ServicesM40 Communications (notify counsellor), M20 SIS (flag student record if SELF_HARM_INDICATOR)SELF_HARM_INDICATOR alerts auto-escalate to administrator simultaneously.
cls.achievement.earnedM21 ClassroomM110 Analytics (update dashboards)Emitted when a student earns a badge or milestone.

Standard naming convention (ADR-057): {env}.{domain}.{entity}.{verb}. Env prefix (dev/staging/prod) is applied at infrastructure level, not in topic names above. Ownership = producing module. Schema evolution: minor version = backward-compatible field addition; major version = new topic with consumer migration plan. DLQ after 3 consumer failures.

ERD v11 — New Module: M66 Athletics (prefix: ath_, 32 tables, Wave 2–3)

New module split from M64 Extracurricular. Athletic programme management: programmes, seasons, rosters with eligibility tracking, game scheduling with CampusOS-to-CampusOS proposals (ADR-069), officials marketplace tenant tables (ADR-063), game results and player statistics, live streaming and recording (ADR-068), highlight clips for student portfolios, equipment inventory with safety compliance, injury tracking with concussion protocol, medical clearances, and coaching assignments.

TableDefinition
ath_programmesid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, sport_name TEXT NOT NULL, season ENUM(FALL, WINTER, SPRING, YEAR_ROUND) NOT NULL, levels_offered TEXT[] NOT NULL, max_roster_size_per_level JSONB, min_gpa NUMERIC(3,2), is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true. UNIQUE(school_id, sport_name).
ath_seasonsid UUID PK(v7), programme_id UUID FK(ath_programmes) NOT NULL, academic_year TEXT NOT NULL, first_practice_date DATE, first_game_date DATE, last_game_date DATE, playoff_cutoff_date DATE, status ENUM(UPCOMING, ACTIVE, POSTSEASON, COMPLETED) DEFAULT 'UPCOMING'. UNIQUE(programme_id, academic_year).
ath_rostersid UUID PK(v7), season_id UUID FK(ath_seasons) NOT NULL, level ENUM(VARSITY, JV, FRESHMAN, CLUB) NOT NULL, head_coach_id UUID FK(hr_employees), is_certified BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, certified_at TIMESTAMPTZ. UNIQUE(season_id, level).
ath_roster_membersid UUID PK(v7), roster_id UUID FK(ath_rosters) NOT NULL, student_id UUID FK(sis_students) NOT NULL, jersey_number TEXT, position TEXT, eligibility_status ENUM(ELIGIBLE, INELIGIBLE, PENDING_PHYSICAL, PENDING_CONSENT, PENDING_TRANSFER_WAIVER, INJURED_NOT_CLEARED) NOT NULL, joined_at DATE NOT NULL, removed_at DATE, removal_reason TEXT. UNIQUE(roster_id, student_id). Eligibility checked from live grade book data (ADR-067).
ath_gamesid UUID PK(v7), season_id UUID FK(ath_seasons) NOT NULL, roster_id UUID FK(ath_rosters) NOT NULL, game_date DATE NOT NULL, game_time TIME NOT NULL, opponent_name TEXT NOT NULL, opponent_school_id UUID (SOFT INTEGRITY — for CampusOS opponents), location ENUM(HOME, AWAY, NEUTRAL) NOT NULL, facility_booking_id UUID (SOFT INTEGRITY fac_space_bookings), transport_request_id UUID (SOFT INTEGRITY trn_), status ENUM(SCHEDULED, CONFIRMED, IN_PROGRESS, COMPLETED, POSTPONED, CANCELLED) DEFAULT 'SCHEDULED', is_conference_game BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, is_ticketed BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, event_id UUID (SOFT INTEGRITY evt_events). INDEX(season_id, game_date).
ath_game_proposalsid UUID PK(v7), proposing_school_id UUID NOT NULL, receiving_school_id UUID NOT NULL, sport TEXT NOT NULL, proposed_date DATE NOT NULL, proposed_time TIME, proposed_location ENUM(HOME_PROPOSING, HOME_RECEIVING, NEUTRAL) NOT NULL, level TEXT NOT NULL, notes TEXT, status ENUM(PROPOSED, ACCEPTED, COUNTER_PROPOSED, DECLINED, CONFIRMED) DEFAULT 'PROPOSED', counter_proposal_data JSONB, confirmed_game_id UUID. Cross-tenant via platform entity cache (ADR-020, ADR-069).
ath_official_assignmentsid UUID PK(v7), game_id UUID FK(ath_games) NOT NULL, official_profile_id UUID (SOFT INTEGRITY platform_official_profiles), role ENUM(HEAD_REFEREE, ASSISTANT_REFEREE, UMPIRE, LINE_JUDGE, SCORER, TIMER, OTHER) NOT NULL, fee NUMERIC(8,2) NOT NULL, status ENUM(POSTED, ACCEPTED, CONFIRMED, COMPLETED, CANCELLED, NO_SHOW) DEFAULT 'POSTED', payment_status ENUM(PENDING, PROCESSED, PAID) DEFAULT 'PENDING'. Kafka: ath.official.assignment.completed. (ADR-063)
ath_official_ratingsid UUID PK(v7), assignment_id UUID FK(ath_official_assignments) NOT NULL, rater_type ENUM(SCHOOL_RATES_OFFICIAL, OFFICIAL_RATES_SCHOOL) NOT NULL, professionalism INT CHECK(1–5), knowledge INT, communication INT, punctuality INT, overall INT, comments TEXT, rated_at TIMESTAMPTZ. UNIQUE(assignment_id, rater_type). (ADR-063)
ath_game_resultsid UUID PK(v7), game_id UUID FK(ath_games) NOT NULL UNIQUE, home_score INT NOT NULL, away_score INT NOT NULL, score_by_period JSONB, outcome ENUM(WIN, LOSS, DRAW, FORFEIT) NOT NULL, entered_by UUID FK(platform_users) NOT NULL, entered_at TIMESTAMPTZ. On INSERT: update ath_season_records.
ath_player_game_statsid UUID PK(v7), game_id UUID FK(ath_games) NOT NULL, student_id UUID FK(sis_students) NOT NULL, stat_category TEXT NOT NULL, stat_value NUMERIC(10,2) NOT NULL, entered_by UUID FK(platform_users) NOT NULL. INDEX(game_id, student_id). Sport-configurable stat categories.
ath_season_recordsid UUID PK(v7), roster_id UUID FK(ath_rosters) NOT NULL UNIQUE, wins INT DEFAULT 0, losses INT DEFAULT 0, draws INT DEFAULT 0, conference_wins INT DEFAULT 0, conference_losses INT DEFAULT 0, conference_draws INT DEFAULT 0. Updated by trigger on ath_game_results INSERT.
ath_all_time_recordsid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, sport TEXT NOT NULL, record_type ENUM(SINGLE_GAME, SEASON, CAREER) NOT NULL, stat_category TEXT NOT NULL, record_value NUMERIC(10,2) NOT NULL, holder_student_id UUID FK(sis_students), set_date DATE, set_season_id UUID FK(ath_seasons). UNIQUE(school_id, sport, record_type, stat_category).
ath_game_streamsid UUID PK(v7), game_id UUID FK(ath_games) NOT NULL UNIQUE, stream_url TEXT, stream_status ENUM(SCHEDULED, LIVE, ENDED, FAILED) DEFAULT 'SCHEDULED', access_level ENUM(PUBLIC, SCHOOL_ONLY, BOTH_SCHOOLS, COACHES_ONLY) DEFAULT 'SCHOOL_ONLY', recording_s3_key TEXT, recording_duration_seconds INT, configured_by UUID FK(platform_users) NOT NULL. Video Processing Service integration (ADR-002, ADR-068).
ath_highlight_clipsid UUID PK(v7), stream_id UUID FK(ath_game_streams) NOT NULL, student_id UUID FK(sis_students) NOT NULL, start_time_seconds INT NOT NULL, end_time_seconds INT NOT NULL, title TEXT, s3_key TEXT NOT NULL, added_to_portfolio BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, portfolio_item_id UUID (SOFT INTEGRITY pfl_items), consent_status ENUM(PENDING, CONSENTED, DECLINED) DEFAULT 'PENDING'. (ADR-068)
ath_equipmentid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, programme_id UUID FK(ath_programmes), item_type ENUM(UNIFORM, PROTECTIVE_GEAR, TRAINING_EQUIPMENT, GAME_EQUIPMENT, MEDICAL_EQUIPMENT, OTHER) NOT NULL, item_name TEXT NOT NULL, quantity INT DEFAULT 0, condition ENUM(EXCELLENT, GOOD, FAIR, POOR, RETIRED) NOT NULL, purchase_date DATE, unit_cost NUMERIC(8,2). INDEX(school_id, programme_id).
ath_equipment_checkoutsid UUID PK(v7), equipment_id UUID FK(ath_equipment) NOT NULL, assigned_to_person_id UUID FK(iam_person) NOT NULL, item_identifier TEXT, checked_out_at DATE NOT NULL, expected_return_date DATE, returned_at DATE, condition_at_return ENUM(GOOD, DAMAGED, LOST), damage_notes TEXT, replacement_charge NUMERIC(8,2). INDEX(assigned_to_person_id, returned_at) WHERE returned_at IS NULL.
ath_safety_equipmentid UUID PK(v7), roster_member_id UUID FK(ath_roster_members) NOT NULL, equipment_type ENUM(HELMET, PADS, MOUTHGUARD, SHIN_GUARDS, GOGGLES, OTHER) NOT NULL, issued BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, meets_safety_standard BOOLEAN DEFAULT true, certification_date DATE, certification_expiry DATE, recall_status BOOLEAN DEFAULT false. UNIQUE(roster_member_id, equipment_type).
ath_injuriesid UUID PK(v7), student_id UUID FK(sis_students) NOT NULL, game_id UUID FK(ath_games), practice_date DATE, injury_date DATE NOT NULL, body_part TEXT NOT NULL, injury_description TEXT NOT NULL, initial_assessment TEXT, action_taken TEXT, severity ENUM(MINOR, MODERATE, SEVERE, EMERGENCY) NOT NULL, health_record_id UUID (SOFT INTEGRITY hlth_), incident_report_id UUID (SOFT INTEGRITY inc_), return_to_play_status ENUM(ACTIVE, SIDELINED, CONCUSSION_PROTOCOL, CLEARED) DEFAULT 'SIDELINED', logged_by UUID FK(platform_users) NOT NULL.
ath_concussion_protocol_stepsid UUID PK(v7), injury_id UUID FK(ath_injuries) NOT NULL, step_number INT CHECK(1–6), step_name TEXT NOT NULL, started_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, minimum_duration_hours INT DEFAULT 24, completed_at TIMESTAMPTZ, symptom_free BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, notes TEXT, cleared_by UUID FK(platform_users). UNIQUE(injury_id, step_number). System enforces: step N+1 cannot start until step N completed and minimum duration elapsed.
ath_medical_clearancesid UUID PK(v7), injury_id UUID FK(ath_injuries) NOT NULL, document_s3_key TEXT NOT NULL, physician_name TEXT, clearance_date DATE NOT NULL, uploaded_by UUID FK(platform_users) NOT NULL, review_status ENUM(PENDING, ACCEPTED, REJECTED) DEFAULT 'PENDING', reviewed_by UUID FK(platform_users), reviewed_at TIMESTAMPTZ. Required before return_to_play_status = CLEARED.
ath_coaching_assignmentsid UUID PK(v7), roster_id UUID FK(ath_rosters) NOT NULL, coach_person_id UUID FK(iam_person) NOT NULL, role ENUM(HEAD_COACH, ASSISTANT_COACH, VOLUNTEER_COACH, SPECIALIST) NOT NULL, stipend_amount NUMERIC(8,2), is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true. UNIQUE(roster_id, coach_person_id).

ERD v11 — New Module: M67 School Store (prefix: str_, 9 tables, Wave 2)

Student store (parent approval, family account billing) and public store (external customers, shipping). ADR-062.

TableDefinition
str_storesid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, store_type ENUM(STUDENT, PUBLIC) NOT NULL, name TEXT NOT NULL, description TEXT, is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true. UNIQUE(school_id, store_type).
str_productsid UUID PK(v7), store_id UUID FK(str_stores) NOT NULL, name TEXT NOT NULL, description TEXT, sku TEXT, category TEXT, price NUMERIC(8,2) NOT NULL, cost NUMERIC(8,2), image_s3_keys TEXT[], is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true, backorder_allowed BOOLEAN DEFAULT false. INDEX(store_id, category, is_active).
str_product_inventoryid UUID PK(v7), product_id UUID FK(str_products) NOT NULL, location_type ENUM(BUILDING, DISTRICT) NOT NULL, location_id UUID NOT NULL, quantity_on_hand INT DEFAULT 0, quantity_reserved INT DEFAULT 0, reorder_point INT DEFAULT 0, reorder_quantity INT DEFAULT 0. UNIQUE(product_id, location_type, location_id). On qty <= reorder_point: generate prc_requisition.
str_ordersid UUID PK(v7), store_id UUID FK(str_stores) NOT NULL, order_type ENUM(STUDENT, PARENT, EXTERNAL) NOT NULL, customer_person_id UUID FK(iam_person), external_customer_id UUID FK(str_external_customers), student_id UUID FK(sis_students), order_date TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, status ENUM(PENDING_APPROVAL, APPROVED, PROCESSING, READY_FOR_PICKUP, SHIPPED, COMPLETED, CANCELLED, BACKORDERED), subtotal NUMERIC(10,2), shipping_cost NUMERIC(8,2) DEFAULT 0, total NUMERIC(10,2), shipping_method ENUM(PICKUP, SHIPPED) DEFAULT 'PICKUP', payment_status ENUM(PENDING, CHARGED, DEFERRED_BACKORDER, REFUNDED) DEFAULT 'PENDING'.
str_order_linesid UUID PK(v7), order_id UUID FK(str_orders) NOT NULL, product_id UUID FK(str_products) NOT NULL, quantity INT NOT NULL, unit_price NUMERIC(8,2) NOT NULL, line_status ENUM(IN_STOCK, BACKORDERED, FULFILLED, CANCELLED) DEFAULT 'IN_STOCK'. INDEX(order_id).
str_order_approvalsid UUID PK(v7), order_id UUID FK(str_orders) NOT NULL UNIQUE, parent_person_id UUID FK(iam_person) NOT NULL, status ENUM(PENDING, APPROVED, DECLINED) DEFAULT 'PENDING', requested_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, responded_at TIMESTAMPTZ, decline_reason TEXT. On APPROVED: order advances to PROCESSING, payment charged. On DECLINED: order CANCELLED, inventory released.
str_external_customersid UUID PK(v7), name TEXT NOT NULL, email TEXT NOT NULL, phone TEXT, shipping_address TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ. INDEX(email). Non-CampusOS customers for public store.
str_shipping_optionsid UUID PK(v7), store_id UUID FK(str_stores) NOT NULL, method_name TEXT NOT NULL, estimated_days INT, flat_rate NUMERIC(8,2) NOT NULL, is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true. INDEX(store_id, is_active).
str_store_revenueid UUID PK(v7), store_id UUID FK(str_stores) NOT NULL, period_start DATE NOT NULL, period_end DATE NOT NULL, total_orders INT, total_revenue NUMERIC(12,2), total_cost NUMERIC(12,2), gross_margin NUMERIC(12,2). Materialised by StoreRevenueWorker.

ERD v11 — New Module: M86 Procurement (prefix: prc_, 12 tables, Wave 2)

Basic procurement scope per ADR-061. Requisitions, POs, receiving, distribution to operational inventories, budget commitments.

TableDefinition
prc_requisitionsid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, requesting_person_id UUID FK(iam_person) NOT NULL, requesting_department TEXT, urgency ENUM(ROUTINE, URGENT, EMERGENCY) DEFAULT 'ROUTINE', status ENUM(DRAFT, SUBMITTED, DEPT_APPROVED, ADMIN_APPROVED, DISTRICT_APPROVED, ORDERED, RECEIVED, DISTRIBUTED, CLOSED, REJECTED), approval_request_id UUID (SOFT INTEGRITY wsk_approval_requests), total_estimated_cost NUMERIC(12,2), budget_line_id UUID (SOFT INTEGRITY fin_budget_lines), justification TEXT NOT NULL, submitted_at TIMESTAMPTZ. INDEX(school_id, status).
prc_requisition_linesid UUID PK(v7), requisition_id UUID FK(prc_requisitions) NOT NULL, item_description TEXT NOT NULL, quantity INT NOT NULL, unit TEXT, estimated_unit_cost NUMERIC(10,2), specifications TEXT, preferred_vendor_id UUID (SOFT INTEGRITY fin_suppliers), destination_module TEXT NOT NULL (tech, trn, fds, lib, ath, ext, fac, str, general). INDEX(requisition_id).
prc_purchase_ordersid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, po_number TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE, vendor_id UUID FK(fin_suppliers) NOT NULL, delivery_address TEXT NOT NULL, expected_delivery_date DATE, payment_terms TEXT, status ENUM(DRAFT, ISSUED, ACKNOWLEDGED, SHIPPED, PARTIALLY_RECEIVED, RECEIVED, CLOSED, CANCELLED) DEFAULT 'DRAFT', total_amount NUMERIC(12,2) NOT NULL, issued_by UUID FK(platform_users) NOT NULL. INDEX(school_id, status). Kafka: prc.po.issued for budget commitment.
prc_po_linesid UUID PK(v7), po_id UUID FK(prc_purchase_orders) NOT NULL, requisition_line_id UUID FK(prc_requisition_lines), item_description TEXT NOT NULL, quantity INT NOT NULL, unit_price NUMERIC(10,2) NOT NULL, budget_line_id UUID (SOFT INTEGRITY fin_budget_lines). INDEX(po_id).
prc_receiving_recordsid UUID PK(v7), po_id UUID FK(prc_purchase_orders) NOT NULL, received_date DATE NOT NULL, received_by UUID FK(iam_person) NOT NULL, delivery_location TEXT, notes TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ. INDEX(po_id).
prc_receiving_linesid UUID PK(v7), receiving_record_id UUID FK(prc_receiving_records) NOT NULL, po_line_id UUID FK(prc_po_lines) NOT NULL, quantity_received INT NOT NULL, condition ENUM(GOOD, DAMAGED, DEFECTIVE) DEFAULT 'GOOD', discrepancy_notes TEXT, photo_s3_key TEXT. INDEX(receiving_record_id).
prc_distribution_recordsid UUID PK(v7), receiving_record_id UUID FK(prc_receiving_records) NOT NULL, destination_module TEXT NOT NULL, destination_school_id UUID NOT NULL, accepted_by UUID FK(iam_person) NOT NULL, distributed_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, status ENUM(DISTRIBUTED, CONFIRMED, DISPUTED) DEFAULT 'DISTRIBUTED', confirmed_at TIMESTAMPTZ. Kafka: prc.distribution.completed emitted per distribution.
prc_distribution_linesid UUID PK(v7), distribution_record_id UUID FK(prc_distribution_records) NOT NULL, receiving_line_id UUID FK(prc_receiving_lines) NOT NULL, quantity_distributed INT NOT NULL, destination_inventory_table TEXT NOT NULL, destination_record_id UUID. INDEX(distribution_record_id).
prc_budget_commitmentsid UUID PK(v7), po_id UUID FK(prc_purchase_orders) NOT NULL, budget_line_id UUID NOT NULL (SOFT INTEGRITY fin_budget_lines), committed_amount NUMERIC(12,2) NOT NULL, committed_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, released_at TIMESTAMPTZ, released_amount NUMERIC(12,2). UNIQUE(po_id, budget_line_id).
prc_returnsid UUID PK(v7), po_line_id UUID FK(prc_po_lines) NOT NULL, return_type ENUM(DAMAGED, DEFECTIVE, INCORRECT, WARRANTY_CLAIM) NOT NULL, description TEXT NOT NULL, photo_s3_keys TEXT[], vendor_response TEXT, resolution ENUM(PENDING, CREDIT_ISSUED, REPLACEMENT_SHIPPED, DENIED) DEFAULT 'PENDING', credit_amount NUMERIC(10,2), created_by UUID FK(platform_users) NOT NULL. INDEX(po_line_id).
prc_vendor_performanceid UUID PK(v7), vendor_id UUID FK(fin_suppliers) NOT NULL, period_start DATE NOT NULL, period_end DATE NOT NULL, total_pos INT, on_time_deliveries INT, order_accuracy_rate NUMERIC(5,2), quality_issues INT, average_lead_time_days NUMERIC(5,1). Materialised monthly by ProcurementAnalyticsWorker.

ERD v11 — Additional New Tables in Existing Modules

M20 SIS Core — +9 tables (Total: 39)

TableDefinition
sis_student_profilesid UUID PK(v7), student_id UUID FK(sis_students) NOT NULL UNIQUE, bio TEXT (max 500), currently_reading TEXT, favourite_song TEXT, interests TEXT[], motto TEXT (max 200), avatar_s3_key TEXT, avatar_status ENUM(PENDING_APPROVAL, APPROVED, REJECTED) DEFAULT 'PENDING_APPROVAL', avatar_reviewed_by UUID FK(platform_users), avatar_reviewed_at TIMESTAMPTZ, updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ. Avatar requires homeroom teacher approval.
sis_graduation_requirementsid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, requirement_type ENUM(CREDIT_TOTAL, SUBJECT_CREDIT, SPECIFIC_COURSE, SERVICE_HOURS, ASSESSMENT, MINIMUM_GPA) NOT NULL, subject_area TEXT, credits_required NUMERIC(4,2), specific_course_id UUID, hours_required INT, assessment_name TEXT, minimum_gpa NUMERIC(3,2), is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true. INDEX(school_id, is_active).
sis_student_graduation_auditsid UUID PK(v7), student_id UUID FK(sis_students) NOT NULL, requirement_id UUID FK(sis_graduation_requirements) NOT NULL, status ENUM(MET, IN_PROGRESS, NOT_MET) NOT NULL, credits_earned NUMERIC(4,2), credits_remaining NUMERIC(4,2), detail TEXT, last_calculated TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL. UNIQUE(student_id, requirement_id). Materialised nightly by GraduationAuditWorker.
sis_service_learning_hoursid UUID PK(v7), student_id UUID FK(sis_students) NOT NULL, organisation_name TEXT NOT NULL, activity_description TEXT NOT NULL, hours NUMERIC(5,2) NOT NULL, service_date DATE NOT NULL, supervisor_name TEXT, supervisor_contact TEXT, evidence_s3_key TEXT, status ENUM(PENDING, APPROVED, REJECTED) DEFAULT 'PENDING', reviewed_by UUID FK(platform_users), reviewed_at TIMESTAMPTZ. INDEX(student_id, status).
sis_service_learning_requirementsid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, grade_level TEXT NOT NULL, required_hours INT NOT NULL, deadline_type ENUM(END_OF_YEAR, BEFORE_GRADUATION, SPECIFIC_DATE) NOT NULL, specific_deadline DATE, is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true. UNIQUE(school_id, grade_level).
sis_lockersid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, locker_number TEXT NOT NULL, location_description TEXT, combination_encrypted TEXT, status ENUM(AVAILABLE, ASSIGNED, OUT_OF_SERVICE) DEFAULT 'AVAILABLE', assigned_to_student_id UUID FK(sis_students), assigned_at DATE, academic_year TEXT. UNIQUE(school_id, locker_number).
sis_locker_historyid UUID PK(v7), locker_id UUID FK(sis_lockers) NOT NULL, student_id UUID FK(sis_students) NOT NULL, assigned_date DATE NOT NULL, released_date DATE, released_reason TEXT. INDEX(locker_id). INDEX(student_id).
sis_parking_permitsid UUID PK(v7), student_id UUID FK(sis_students) NOT NULL, school_id UUID NOT NULL, academic_year TEXT NOT NULL, vehicle_description TEXT, licence_plate TEXT, permit_number TEXT UNIQUE, status ENUM(APPLIED, APPROVED, ACTIVE, SUSPENDED, REVOKED, EXPIRED) DEFAULT 'APPLIED', fee_amount NUMERIC(8,2), fee_paid BOOLEAN DEFAULT false. INDEX(school_id, academic_year, status).
sis_parking_violationsid UUID PK(v7), permit_id UUID FK(sis_parking_permits) NOT NULL, violation_type ENUM(NO_PERMIT, WRONG_SPOT, SPEEDING, RECKLESS, OTHER) NOT NULL, violation_date DATE NOT NULL, description TEXT, consequence TEXT, logged_by UUID FK(platform_users) NOT NULL. INDEX(permit_id).

M21 Classroom — +12 tables (Total: 33)

TableDefinition
cls_ai_study_sessionsid UUID PK(v7), student_id UUID FK(sis_students) NOT NULL, started_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, ended_at TIMESTAMPTZ, subject TEXT, topics_covered TEXT[], interaction_count INT DEFAULT 0. INDEX(student_id, started_at DESC). RANGE-partitioned by started_at, monthly. Retention: 2 years then T2 warm.
cls_ai_study_signalsid UUID PK(v7), student_id UUID FK(sis_students) NOT NULL, subject TEXT NOT NULL, signal_type ENUM(STRUGGLE_AREA, STRENGTH, ENGAGEMENT_DROP, ENGAGEMENT_SPIKE, TOPIC_MASTERY) NOT NULL, signal_data JSONB NOT NULL, generated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, is_visible_to_counsellor BOOLEAN DEFAULT true. Generated by AIStudySignalWorker from session data.
cls_class_momentsid UUID PK(v7), class_id UUID NOT NULL, uploaded_by UUID FK(platform_users) NOT NULL, s3_key TEXT NOT NULL, caption TEXT, uploaded_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, is_approved BOOLEAN DEFAULT true. INDEX(class_id, uploaded_at DESC). RANGE-partitioned by uploaded_at, monthly. Teacher photo feed.
cls_class_moment_facesid UUID PK(v7), moment_id UUID FK(cls_class_moments) NOT NULL, student_id UUID FK(sis_students), bounding_box JSONB NOT NULL, is_blurred BOOLEAN DEFAULT false. INDEX(moment_id). AI-detected faces for privacy management. On student privacy flag change: ClassMomentsPrivacyWorker re-evaluates.
cls_class_moment_engagementid UUID PK(v7), moment_id UUID FK(cls_class_moments) NOT NULL, parent_person_id UUID FK(iam_person) NOT NULL, liked BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, viewed_at TIMESTAMPTZ. UNIQUE(moment_id, parent_person_id). Parent interactions with class photos.
cls_achievement_definitionsid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, name TEXT NOT NULL, description TEXT, icon_s3_key TEXT, category ENUM(ACADEMIC, ATTENDANCE, READING, EXTRACURRICULAR, SERVICE, SOCIAL, CUSTOM) NOT NULL, criteria JSONB NOT NULL, points_value INT DEFAULT 0, is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true. School-configurable. (ADR-070)
cls_student_achievementsid UUID PK(v7), student_id UUID FK(sis_students) NOT NULL, achievement_id UUID FK(cls_achievement_definitions) NOT NULL, earned_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, awarded_by UUID FK(platform_users). UNIQUE(student_id, achievement_id). (ADR-070)
cls_student_pointsid UUID PK(v7), student_id UUID FK(sis_students) NOT NULL, points INT NOT NULL, source_type ENUM(ACHIEVEMENT, TEACHER_AWARD, READING_PROGRAMME, ATTENDANCE_STREAK, STUDY_TOOL, CUSTOM) NOT NULL, source_id UUID, description TEXT, awarded_by UUID FK(platform_users), earned_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL. IMMUTABLE. Append-only ledger. RANGE-partitioned by earned_at, monthly. (ADR-070)
cls_student_streaksid UUID PK(v7), student_id UUID FK(sis_students) NOT NULL, streak_type ENUM(ATTENDANCE, READING, STUDY_TOOL, ASSIGNMENT_COMPLETION, CUSTOM) NOT NULL, current_count INT DEFAULT 0, longest_count INT DEFAULT 0, last_activity_date DATE NOT NULL, started_date DATE NOT NULL. UNIQUE(student_id, streak_type). Updated by StreakWorker on daily events. (ADR-070)
cls_achievement_rewardsid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, name TEXT NOT NULL, description TEXT, points_cost INT NOT NULL, quantity_available INT, is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true. Configurable redeemable rewards. (ADR-070)
cls_reward_redemptionsid UUID PK(v7), student_id UUID FK(sis_students) NOT NULL, reward_id UUID FK(cls_achievement_rewards) NOT NULL, redeemed_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, fulfilled_at TIMESTAMPTZ, fulfilled_by UUID FK(platform_users). On INSERT: decrement quantity_available. (ADR-070)
cls_hall_passesid UUID PK(v7), student_id UUID FK(sis_students) NOT NULL, class_id UUID NOT NULL, requested_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, approved_at TIMESTAMPTZ, approved_by UUID FK(platform_users), destination ENUM(RESTROOM, NURSE, OFFICE, COUNSELLOR, LIBRARY, LOCKER, OTHER) NOT NULL, other_destination TEXT, returned_at TIMESTAMPTZ, status ENUM(REQUESTED, ACTIVE, RETURNED, EXPIRED, DENIED) DEFAULT 'REQUESTED', duration_limit_minutes INT DEFAULT 10. INDEX(class_id, status) WHERE status = 'ACTIVE'.

M22 Academic Scheduling — +4 tables (Total: 31)

TableDefinition
sch_course_catalogue_entriesid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, academic_year TEXT NOT NULL, course_name TEXT NOT NULL, course_code TEXT, description TEXT, subject_area TEXT NOT NULL, credit_value NUMERIC(3,1) NOT NULL, grade_levels_eligible TEXT[] NOT NULL, prerequisites JSONB, max_sections INT, section_capacity INT DEFAULT 30, requires_recommendation BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, lab_fee NUMERIC(8,2), is_published BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, published_by UUID FK(platform_users). UNIQUE(school_id, academic_year, course_code). (ADR-067)
sch_teacher_recommendationsid UUID PK(v7), student_id UUID FK(sis_students) NOT NULL, catalogue_entry_id UUID FK(sch_course_catalogue_entries) NOT NULL, recommending_teacher_id UUID FK(hr_employees), department_head_id UUID FK(hr_employees), status ENUM(PENDING, APPROVED, DENIED, ALTERNATE_SUGGESTED) DEFAULT 'PENDING', decision_reason TEXT. UNIQUE(student_id, catalogue_entry_id). AP/honours course recommendations. (ADR-067)
sch_student_course_selectionsid UUID PK(v7), student_id UUID FK(sis_students) NOT NULL, academic_year TEXT NOT NULL, catalogue_entry_id UUID FK(sch_course_catalogue_entries) NOT NULL, priority ENUM(PRIMARY, ALTERNATE_1, ALTERNATE_2) NOT NULL, parent_approval_status ENUM(PENDING, APPROVED, DECLINED, NOT_REQUIRED) DEFAULT 'PENDING', counsellor_review_status ENUM(PENDING, REVIEWED, FLAG_RESOLVED) DEFAULT 'PENDING', placement_result ENUM(PLACED, ALTERNATE_PLACED, MANUAL_RESOLUTION, CANCELLED). UNIQUE(student_id, academic_year, catalogue_entry_id, priority). (ADR-067)
sch_add_drop_requestsid UUID PK(v7), student_id UUID FK(sis_students) NOT NULL, academic_year TEXT NOT NULL, drop_section_id UUID, add_catalogue_entry_id UUID FK(sch_course_catalogue_entries), reason TEXT NOT NULL, status ENUM(PENDING, APPROVED, DENIED) DEFAULT 'PENDING', reviewed_by UUID FK(platform_users). Start-of-year schedule changes. (ADR-067)

M24 Library — +4 tables (Total: 20)

TableDefinition
lib_locationsid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, name TEXT NOT NULL, location_type ENUM(SHELF, DISPLAY, BOOK_DROP, PROCESSING, REPAIR, STORAGE) NOT NULL, sort_order INT DEFAULT 0, is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true. UNIQUE(school_id, name). Additionally lib_items gains: location_id FK(lib_locations), location_status ENUM(ON_SHELF, IN_BOOK_DROP, IN_PROCESSING, CHECKED_OUT, ON_HOLD_SHELF, IN_REPAIR, LOST).
lib_scan_sessionsid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, librarian_id UUID FK(platform_users) NOT NULL, target_location_id UUID FK(lib_locations) NOT NULL, started_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, completed_at TIMESTAMPTZ, items_identified INT DEFAULT 0, items_confirmed INT DEFAULT 0, items_manual_entry INT DEFAULT 0, status ENUM(IN_PROGRESS, COMPLETED, CANCELLED) DEFAULT 'IN_PROGRESS'. AI-powered shelf scanning.
lib_reviewsid UUID PK(v7), item_id UUID FK(lib_items) NOT NULL, student_id UUID FK(sis_students) NOT NULL, rating INT CHECK(1–5), review_text TEXT, is_approved BOOLEAN DEFAULT true, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ. UNIQUE(item_id, student_id).
lib_recommendationsid UUID PK(v7), student_id UUID FK(sis_students) NOT NULL, recommended_item_id UUID FK(lib_items) NOT NULL, reason_type ENUM(COLLABORATIVE_FILTERING, READING_LEVEL_MATCH, SUBJECT_MATCH, NEW_ARRIVAL, STAFF_PICK) NOT NULL, score NUMERIC(5,3), generated_at TIMESTAMPTZ. Regenerated weekly by LibraryRecommendationWorker.

M27 Student Services — +5 tables (Total: 25)

TableDefinition
svc_wellbeing_surveysid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, name TEXT NOT NULL, frequency ENUM(DAILY, WEEKLY, BIWEEKLY, MONTHLY, CUSTOM) NOT NULL, target_audience ENUM(ALL_STUDENTS, GRADE_LEVEL, SPECIFIC_CLASSES) NOT NULL, target_filter JSONB, questions JSONB NOT NULL, is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true, created_by UUID FK(platform_users) NOT NULL.
svc_wellbeing_responsesid UUID PK(v7), survey_id UUID FK(svc_wellbeing_surveys) NOT NULL, student_id UUID FK(sis_students) NOT NULL, response_data JSONB NOT NULL, responded_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL. RANGE-partitioned by responded_at, monthly. Access restricted to counselling team.
svc_wellbeing_alertsid UUID PK(v7), student_id UUID FK(sis_students) NOT NULL, response_id UUID FK(svc_wellbeing_responses) NOT NULL, alert_type ENUM(FEELS_UNSAFE, WANTS_TO_TALK, SIGNIFICANT_SCORE_DROP, PERSISTENT_LOW_SCORE, SELF_HARM_INDICATOR) NOT NULL, status ENUM(NEW, ACKNOWLEDGED, IN_PROGRESS, RESOLVED) DEFAULT 'NEW'. SELF_HARM_INDICATOR auto-escalates to administrator.
svc_coordinated_care_notesid UUID PK(v7), student_id UUID FK(sis_students) NOT NULL, author_person_id UUID FK(iam_person) NOT NULL, author_role ENUM(NURSE, COUNSELLOR) NOT NULL, note_text TEXT NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ. Shared between nurse and counsellor only.
svc_mandatory_reportsid UUID PK(v7), student_id UUID FK(sis_students) NOT NULL, reporter_person_id UUID FK(iam_person) NOT NULL, report_type ENUM(SUSPECTED_ABUSE, SUSPECTED_NEGLECT, IMMINENT_DANGER, OTHER) NOT NULL, reported_to_authority TEXT NOT NULL, report_date TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, description TEXT NOT NULL, supporting_docs_s3_keys TEXT[], cps_response TEXT, status ENUM(FILED, CPS_CONTACTED, INVESTIGATION_ACTIVE, CLOSED) DEFAULT 'FILED'. IMMUTABLE once past FILED. Retained permanently. Highest access restriction.

M40 Communications — +2 tables (Total: 29)

TableDefinition
msg_moderation_policiesid UUID PK(v7), scope ENUM(PLATFORM, DISTRICT, BUILDING) NOT NULL, scope_id UUID, keywords TEXT[] NOT NULL, keyword_action ENUM(BLOCK, FLAG_FOR_REVIEW, ESCALATE_TO_COUNSELLOR) NOT NULL, sensitivity_threshold NUMERIC(3,2), escalation_rules JSONB, is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true. Three-tier: PLATFORM (non-negotiable) + DISTRICT + BUILDING. Most restrictive action applies.
msg_moderation_logid UUID PK(v7), message_id UUID FK(msg_messages) NOT NULL, policy_id UUID FK(msg_moderation_policies) NOT NULL, flag_type ENUM(BLOCKED, FLAGGED_FOR_REVIEW, ESCALATED_TO_COUNSELLOR, AUTO_APPROVED) NOT NULL, matched_keywords TEXT[], review_outcome ENUM(CONFIRMED_BLOCK, RELEASED, ESCALATED), reviewed_at TIMESTAMPTZ. RANGE-partitioned by created_at, monthly.

M60 Service Tickets — +1 table (Total: 13, renamed from Helpdesk)

TableDefinition
tkt_vendor_updatesid UUID PK(v7), ticket_id UUID FK(tkt_tickets) NOT NULL, vendor_account_id UUID FK(platform_vendor_accounts) NOT NULL, update_text TEXT NOT NULL, attachments_s3_keys TEXT[], updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL. INDEX(ticket_id). Additionally tkt_tickets gains: assigned_vendor_account_id, vendor_sla_deadline, vendor_status.

M61 Transportation — +4 tables (Total: 38)

TableDefinition
trn_vehicle_repairsid UUID PK(v7), vehicle_id UUID FK(trn_vehicles) NOT NULL, repair_date DATE NOT NULL, mileage_at_repair INT NOT NULL, problem_description TEXT NOT NULL, work_performed TEXT NOT NULL, parts_used JSONB, labour_hours NUMERIC(5,2), total_cost NUMERIC(10,2) NOT NULL, performed_by_type ENUM(INTERNAL, EXTERNAL_VENDOR) NOT NULL, vendor_account_id UUID FK(platform_vendor_accounts), warranty_claim BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, invoice_s3_key TEXT. INDEX(vehicle_id, repair_date DESC).
trn_parts_inventoryid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, part_name TEXT NOT NULL, part_number TEXT, quantity_on_hand INT DEFAULT 0, min_stock_level INT DEFAULT 0, unit_cost NUMERIC(8,2), supplier TEXT, last_restocked_at DATE. INDEX(school_id, quantity_on_hand) WHERE quantity_on_hand <= min_stock_level.
trn_vehicle_componentsid UUID PK(v7), vehicle_id UUID FK(trn_vehicles) NOT NULL, component_type ENUM(TYRE, BRAKE, BATTERY, BELT, HOSE, ALTERNATOR, STARTER, TRANSMISSION, OTHER) NOT NULL, installed_date DATE NOT NULL, installed_mileage INT NOT NULL, expected_life_miles INT, expected_life_months INT, warranty_provider TEXT, warranty_expiry_date DATE, status ENUM(ACTIVE, REPLACED, FAILED) DEFAULT 'ACTIVE'. Lifecycle calc: miles_remaining = expected_life_miles - (current_mileage - installed_mileage).
trn_trip_logsid UUID PK(v7), vehicle_id UUID FK(trn_vehicles) NOT NULL, driver_id UUID FK(iam_person) NOT NULL, trip_type ENUM(MORNING_ROUTE, AFTERNOON_ROUTE, MIDDAY_ROUTE, FIELD_TRIP, ATHLETIC_EVENT, MAINTENANCE_TEST, OTHER) NOT NULL, route_id UUID (SOFT INTEGRITY trn_routes), start_odometer INT NOT NULL, end_odometer INT, start_time TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, end_time TIMESTAMPTZ, odometer_photo_start_s3_key TEXT, odometer_photo_end_s3_key TEXT. On end_odometer: update trn_vehicles.current_mileage.

M62 IT Infrastructure — +9 tables (Total: 26, renamed from Technology / Devices)

TableDefinition
tech_credential_vaultid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, service_name TEXT NOT NULL, credential_type ENUM(VENDOR_PORTAL, SERVICE_ACCOUNT, API_KEY, SSL_CERTIFICATE, WIFI_CREDENTIAL, ADMIN_SHARED, OTHER) NOT NULL, username TEXT, encrypted_password TEXT NOT NULL (AES-256 separate key per ADR-065), url TEXT, last_rotated_at TIMESTAMPTZ, rotation_due_at TIMESTAMPTZ, expiry_date DATE, access_tier ENUM(STANDARD, ELEVATED, CRITICAL) DEFAULT 'STANDARD', notes TEXT. Alert: 60/30/14/3 days before expiry.
tech_credential_access_logid UUID PK(v7), credential_id UUID FK(tech_credential_vault) NOT NULL, accessed_by UUID FK(platform_users) NOT NULL, access_type ENUM(VIEW, COPY, MODIFY, CREATE, DELETE) NOT NULL, accessed_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL. IMMUTABLE. RANGE-partitioned by accessed_at, monthly. (ADR-065)
tech_config_documentsid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, title TEXT NOT NULL, document_type ENUM(NETWORK_TOPOLOGY, SERVER_ARCHITECTURE, PHONE_SYSTEM, PRINTER_MAP, CLASSROOM_STANDARD, BACKUP_PROCEDURES, DISASTER_RECOVERY, VENDOR_CONTRACTS, OTHER) NOT NULL, current_version INT DEFAULT 1, latest_s3_key TEXT NOT NULL, description TEXT, created_by UUID FK(platform_users) NOT NULL.
tech_config_document_versionsid UUID PK(v7), document_id UUID FK(tech_config_documents) NOT NULL, version_number INT NOT NULL, s3_key TEXT NOT NULL, change_notes TEXT, changed_by UUID FK(platform_users) NOT NULL, changed_at TIMESTAMPTZ. UNIQUE(document_id, version_number).
tech_system_monitorsid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, name TEXT NOT NULL, system_type ENUM(INTERNET, INTERNAL_NETWORK, EMAIL_SERVICE, PHONE_SYSTEM, CAMPUSOS_PLATFORM, PRINT_SERVICE, SSO_PROVIDER, BACKUP_SYSTEM, CUSTOM) NOT NULL, status ENUM(OPERATIONAL, DEGRADED, DOWN, MAINTENANCE) DEFAULT 'OPERATIONAL', last_checked_at TIMESTAMPTZ, check_interval_seconds INT DEFAULT 300.
tech_system_incidentsid UUID PK(v7), monitor_id UUID FK(tech_system_monitors) NOT NULL, started_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, detected_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, ended_at TIMESTAMPTZ, impact_description TEXT, root_cause TEXT, resolution TEXT, duration_minutes INT. INDEX(monitor_id, started_at DESC).
tech_phone_extensionsid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, extension_number TEXT NOT NULL, assigned_to_person_id UUID FK(iam_person), location TEXT, extension_type ENUM(INDIVIDUAL, SHARED, AUTO_ATTENDANT, HUNT_GROUP, FAX) NOT NULL, voicemail_enabled BOOLEAN DEFAULT true, is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true. UNIQUE(school_id, extension_number).
tech_device_optionsid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, option_name TEXT NOT NULL, device_type TEXT NOT NULL, operating_system TEXT NOT NULL, specifications TEXT, software_available TEXT[], cost_difference NUMERIC(8,2) DEFAULT 0, is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true. School-configurable device choices (ADR-066).
tech_device_selectionsid UUID PK(v7), person_id UUID FK(iam_person) NOT NULL, option_id UUID FK(tech_device_options) NOT NULL, selection_context ENUM(ENROLMENT, REFRESH, NEW_HIRE) NOT NULL, selected_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, approved_by UUID FK(platform_users), approved_at TIMESTAMPTZ, status ENUM(SELECTED, APPROVED, PROVISIONING, PROVISIONED, CANCELLED) DEFAULT 'SELECTED'. INDEX(status) WHERE status IN ('SELECTED', 'APPROVED', 'PROVISIONING'). (ADR-066)

M63 Food Service — +3 tables (Total: 31)

TableDefinition
fds_recipesid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, name TEXT NOT NULL, category ENUM(ENTREE, SIDE, VEGETABLE, FRUIT, GRAIN, DAIRY, BEVERAGE, SNACK, DESSERT) NOT NULL, serving_yield INT NOT NULL, prep_time_minutes INT, cook_time_minutes INT, instructions TEXT, allergens TEXT[] (auto-computed from ingredients), cost_per_serving NUMERIC(6,2) (auto-computed), is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true.
fds_recipe_ingredientsid UUID PK(v7), recipe_id UUID FK(fds_recipes) NOT NULL, ingredient_name TEXT NOT NULL, quantity NUMERIC(8,3) NOT NULL, unit TEXT NOT NULL, allergens TEXT[] DEFAULT '{}', unit_cost NUMERIC(6,3). Recipe allergens = UNION of all ingredient allergens.
fds_production_recordsid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, meal_service_date DATE NOT NULL, meal_type ENUM(BREAKFAST, LUNCH, SNACK, SUPPER) NOT NULL, menu_item_id UUID FK(fds_menu_items) NOT NULL, recipe_id UUID FK(fds_recipes), quantity_prepared INT NOT NULL, quantity_served INT NOT NULL, quantity_leftover INT DEFAULT 0, quantity_wasted INT DEFAULT 0, meets_meal_pattern BOOLEAN NOT NULL. UNIQUE(school_id, meal_service_date, meal_type, menu_item_id). USDA compliance documentation.

M64 Clubs & Student Life — +4 election tables (renamed from Extracurricular, narrowed)

Athletic tables moved to M66. Club governance, student government, and elections remain.

TableDefinition
ext_electionsid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, title TEXT NOT NULL, description TEXT, voting_start TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, voting_end TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, eligible_voters_filter JSONB NOT NULL, status ENUM(DRAFT, OPEN, CLOSED, RESULTS_PUBLISHED) DEFAULT 'DRAFT', created_by UUID FK(platform_users) NOT NULL.
ext_candidatesid UUID PK(v7), election_id UUID FK(ext_elections) NOT NULL, student_id UUID FK(sis_students) NOT NULL, position TEXT NOT NULL, statement TEXT, photo_s3_key TEXT, is_approved BOOLEAN DEFAULT true, registered_at TIMESTAMPTZ. UNIQUE(election_id, student_id, position).
ext_votesid UUID PK(v7), election_id UUID FK(ext_elections) NOT NULL, position TEXT NOT NULL, candidate_id UUID FK(ext_candidates) NOT NULL, voted_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL. NO voter_id column — anonymity is structural.
ext_election_voter_checkelection_id UUID FK(ext_elections) NOT NULL, student_id UUID FK(sis_students) NOT NULL. PRIMARY KEY(election_id, student_id). Records WHO voted without linking to HOW they voted. Separation is the anonymity guarantee.

M65 Facilities — +2 tables (Total: 37)

TableDefinition
fac_energy_readingsid UUID PK(v7), building_id UUID NOT NULL, utility_type ENUM(ELECTRICITY, NATURAL_GAS, WATER, SOLAR_GENERATION) NOT NULL, reading_date DATE NOT NULL, reading_value NUMERIC(12,2) NOT NULL, unit TEXT NOT NULL, cost NUMERIC(10,2). UNIQUE(building_id, utility_type, reading_date).
fac_deferred_maintenanceid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, asset_id UUID (SOFT INTEGRITY fac_assets), space_id UUID (SOFT INTEGRITY fac_spaces), description TEXT NOT NULL, estimated_cost NUMERIC(12,2) NOT NULL, risk_if_deferred ENUM(LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH, CRITICAL) NOT NULL, target_date DATE, status ENUM(IDENTIFIED, BUDGETED, FUNDED, IN_PROGRESS, COMPLETED, CANCELLED) DEFAULT 'IDENTIFIED'.

M80 HR / Workforce — +8 tables (Total: 48)

TableDefinition
hr_job_postingsid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, position_title TEXT NOT NULL, department TEXT, description TEXT NOT NULL, qualifications_required TEXT NOT NULL, qualifications_preferred TEXT, salary_range_low NUMERIC(10,2), salary_range_high NUMERIC(10,2), employment_type ENUM(FULL_TIME, PART_TIME, TEMPORARY, LONG_TERM_SUBSTITUTE) NOT NULL, application_deadline DATE, status ENUM(DRAFT, PENDING_APPROVAL, APPROVED, LIVE, CLOSED, CANCELLED) DEFAULT 'DRAFT'. INDEX(status) WHERE status = 'LIVE'.
hr_applicationsid UUID PK(v7), posting_id UUID FK(hr_job_postings) NOT NULL, person_id UUID FK(iam_person) NOT NULL, status ENUM(SUBMITTED, UNDER_REVIEW, SCREENING, INTERVIEW_SCHEDULED, INTERVIEW_COMPLETED, OFFER_EXTENDED, OFFER_ACCEPTED, OFFER_DECLINED, NOT_SELECTED, WITHDRAWN) DEFAULT 'SUBMITTED', cover_letter_s3_key TEXT, resume_s3_key TEXT, submitted_at TIMESTAMPTZ. UNIQUE(posting_id, person_id).
hr_screening_responsesid UUID PK(v7), application_id UUID FK(hr_applications) NOT NULL, question_text TEXT NOT NULL, response_text TEXT NOT NULL, sort_order INT DEFAULT 0. INDEX(application_id).
hr_interview_panelsid UUID PK(v7), application_id UUID FK(hr_applications) NOT NULL, interview_date TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, interview_format ENUM(IN_PERSON, VIDEO, PHONE) NOT NULL, location TEXT, status ENUM(SCHEDULED, COMPLETED, CANCELLED) DEFAULT 'SCHEDULED'.
hr_interview_panelistsid UUID PK(v7), panel_id UUID FK(hr_interview_panels) NOT NULL, panelist_person_id UUID FK(iam_person) NOT NULL. UNIQUE(panel_id, panelist_person_id).
hr_interview_evaluationsid UUID PK(v7), panel_id UUID FK(hr_interview_panels) NOT NULL, panelist_person_id UUID FK(iam_person) NOT NULL, criteria_ratings JSONB NOT NULL, overall_rating INT CHECK(1–5), strengths TEXT, concerns TEXT, recommendation ENUM(STRONG_HIRE, HIRE, NEUTRAL, DO_NOT_HIRE) NOT NULL. UNIQUE(panel_id, panelist_person_id).
hr_offersid UUID PK(v7), application_id UUID FK(hr_applications) NOT NULL UNIQUE, position_title TEXT NOT NULL, salary NUMERIC(10,2) NOT NULL, start_date DATE NOT NULL, contract_type ENUM(ANNUAL, MULTI_YEAR, AT_WILL, TEMPORARY) NOT NULL, conditions JSONB, acceptance_deadline DATE NOT NULL, status ENUM(PENDING, ACCEPTED, DECLINED, EXPIRED, WITHDRAWN) DEFAULT 'PENDING'.
hr_job_alertsid UUID PK(v7), person_id UUID FK(iam_person) NOT NULL, subject_area TEXT, grade_level TEXT, employment_type ENUM(FULL_TIME, PART_TIME, TEMPORARY, LONG_TERM_SUBSTITUTE), location_radius_km INT, is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true.

M91 Incident & Emergency — +1 table (Total: 11)

TableDefinition
inc_non_discipline_incidentsid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, incident_type ENUM(STUDENT_INJURY, STAFF_INJURY, MEDICAL_EPISODE, PROPERTY_DAMAGE, ENVIRONMENTAL, SECURITY, OTHER) NOT NULL, location TEXT, incident_date TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, description TEXT NOT NULL, students_involved UUID[], staff_involved UUID[], severity ENUM(MINOR, MODERATE, SERIOUS, CRITICAL) NOT NULL, follow_up_required BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, reported_by UUID FK(platform_users) NOT NULL.

M101 Events & Ticketing — +3 tables (Total: 9)

TableDefinition
evt_ticket_scansid UUID PK(v7), ticket_id UUID FK(evt_tickets) NOT NULL, scanned_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, scanned_by UUID FK(platform_users) NOT NULL, scan_result ENUM(VALID, ALREADY_SCANNED, INVALID, EXPIRED) NOT NULL. Gate scan audit log. RANGE-partitioned by scanned_at, monthly.
evt_season_passesid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID NOT NULL, person_id UUID FK(iam_person) NOT NULL, pass_type TEXT NOT NULL, events_included UUID[], price NUMERIC(8,2) NOT NULL, purchased_at TIMESTAMPTZ, status ENUM(ACTIVE, EXPIRED, REVOKED) DEFAULT 'ACTIVE', academic_year TEXT NOT NULL.
evt_comp_listsid UUID PK(v7), event_id UUID FK(evt_events) NOT NULL, comp_type ENUM(ATHLETE, COACH, OFFICIAL, MEDIA, STAFF, STUDENT, VIP, OTHER) NOT NULL, person_id UUID FK(iam_person). UNIQUE(event_id, comp_type, person_id). Complimentary admission by role.

M110 Analytics — +5 read model tables (Total: 34)

TableDefinition
rpt_procurement_summaryProcurement spending by department, vendor, time period. Materialised nightly.
rpt_store_salesSchool store revenue, inventory turnover, product performance. Materialised nightly.
rpt_officials_marketplaceOfficials utilisation, cost per game, fill rate, rating aggregates. Materialised weekly.
rpt_game_resultsAthletic results, standings, statistical leaders. Materialised on game result entry.
rpt_wellbeing_trendsWellbeing check-in score aggregation by school, grade, time period. No individual attribution. Materialised weekly.

ERD v11 — Table Count Summary

Modulev9.2v10Change
M0 Platform Core7481+7 (vendor accounts, district policies, official profiles)
M1 Task Management66—
M2 Approval Workflows77—
M3 Calendar77—
M20 SIS Core3039+9 (student profiles, graduation, service learning, lockers, parking)
M21 Classroom2133+12 (AI study tool, class moments, achievements, hall passes)
M22 Academic Scheduling2731+4 (course selection lifecycle)
M23 Health *(renamed)*1717—
M24 Library1620+4 (locations, scanning, reviews, recommendations)
M25 Curriculum1111—
M26 Portfolio55—
M27 Student Services2025+5 (wellbeing, coordinated care, mandatory reporting)
M40 Communications2729+2 (moderation policies)
M41 Meetings1313—
M42 Publications1515—
M60 Service Tickets *(renamed)*1213+1 (vendor updates)
M61 Transportation3438+4 (repairs, parts, components, trip logs)
M62 IT Infrastructure *(renamed)*1726+9 (credential vault, config docs, monitoring, VOIP, device selection)
M63 Food Service2831+3 (recipes, production records)
M64 Clubs & Student Life *(narrowed, renamed)*3023−11 to M66, +4 (elections)
M65 Facilities3537+2 (energy, deferred maintenance)
M66 Athletics *(NEW)*—32+32 (split from M64 + new)
M67 School Store *(NEW)*—9+9
M80 HR / Workforce4048+8 (applicant tracking)
M81 Enrolment *(narrowed)*62†25pay_ moved to M84
M82 Sub Marketplace99—
M83 Finance & Accounting9‡9‡—
M84 Payments & Billing *(split from M81)*—28Split from M81
M85 Accreditation88—
M86 Procurement *(NEW)*—12+12
M87 HR Appraisals *(renumbered)*77— (was M84)
M90 Visitor Management99—
M91 Incident & Emergency1011+1 (non-discipline incidents)
M100 Parent Engagement55—
M101 Events & Ticketing69+3 (scan log, passes, comp lists)
M102 Alumni88—
M103 Groups & Communities77—
DPO Compliance1313—
M110 Analytics2934+5 (new read models)
TOTAL658803+145 tables

† M81 v9.2 count of 62 included enr_(25) + pay_(28) + fin_(9). In v10: M81 Enrolment = enr_(25), M84 Payments = pay_(28), fin_ remains with M83.

‡ M83 fin_ tables deduplicated from total — physically in M81/M84 per ADR-051/058, relocate at Wave 4.

ERD v11 Total: 840 tables | 38 modules | 76 ADRs | 5 delivery waves

End of CampusOS ERD v11.0 — 840 tables | 38 modules | 76 ADRs | 5 Delivery Waves | March 2026

ERD v11 — Platform Business Schema (37 tables)

New in v11. These tables live in the platform schema and serve CampusOS-the-company (CRM, internal ops, pricing) and the cross-school community exchange (marketplace, forums, profiles, ratings, watch lists, asset exchange, search). No tenant-schema tables are affected. Governed by ADR-071 through ADR-076.

M90 Customer & Subscriptions (prefix: crm_, 9 tables, Pre-Wave 1)

TableDefinition
crm_accountsid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID FK(schools) nullable, organisation_id UUID FK(organisations) nullable, account_name TEXT NOT NULL, pricing_band_id UUID FK(platform_pricing_bands) NOT NULL, status ENUM(PROSPECT,PILOT,ONBOARDING,ACTIVE,CHURNED,SUSPENDED) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PROSPECT', billing_email TEXT NOT NULL, billing_address_json JSONB, stripe_customer_id TEXT UNIQUE nullable, school_champion_person_id UUID FK(iam_person) nullable, signed_date DATE nullable, go_live_date DATE nullable, renewal_date DATE nullable, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ, updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ. CHECK: (school_id IS NOT NULL OR organisation_id IS NOT NULL) AND NOT (school_id IS NOT NULL AND organisation_id IS NOT NULL). INDEX(status). INDEX(renewal_date) WHERE status = 'ACTIVE'. ADR-071.
crm_subscriptionsid UUID PK(v7), account_id UUID FK(crm_accounts) NOT NULL, pricing_band_id UUID FK(platform_pricing_bands) NOT NULL, support_tier_id UUID FK(platform_support_tiers) nullable, billing_cycle ENUM(MONTHLY,ANNUAL) NOT NULL, monthly_amount_cents INT NOT NULL, discount_pct NUMERIC(5,2) DEFAULT 0, effective_monthly_cents INT NOT NULL, stripe_subscription_id TEXT UNIQUE nullable, status ENUM(ACTIVE,PAST_DUE,CANCELLED,PAUSED) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ACTIVE', started_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, current_period_start DATE NOT NULL, current_period_end DATE NOT NULL, cancelled_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable, cancellation_reason TEXT nullable, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ. INDEX(account_id, status). INDEX(current_period_end) WHERE status = 'ACTIVE'. ADR-071.
crm_subscription_historyid UUID PK(v7), subscription_id UUID FK(crm_subscriptions) NOT NULL, change_type ENUM(CREATED,BAND_CHANGE,CYCLE_CHANGE,DISCOUNT_APPLIED,SUPPORT_TIER_CHANGE,CANCELLED,REACTIVATED,PRICE_ADJUSTMENT) NOT NULL, previous_value_json JSONB, new_value_json JSONB, changed_by UUID FK(platform_users) NOT NULL, reason TEXT, changed_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL. INDEX(subscription_id, changed_at DESC). RANGE partition by changed_at MONTHLY, 36-month retention.
crm_invoicesid UUID PK(v7), account_id UUID FK(crm_accounts) NOT NULL, subscription_id UUID FK(crm_subscriptions) NOT NULL, stripe_invoice_id TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL, amount_cents INT NOT NULL, currency CHAR(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'USD', status ENUM(DRAFT,OPEN,PAID,VOID,UNCOLLECTIBLE) NOT NULL, period_start DATE NOT NULL, period_end DATE NOT NULL, pdf_s3_key TEXT nullable, paid_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ. INDEX(account_id, status). RANGE partition by created_at MONTHLY, 84-month retention.
crm_contactsid UUID PK(v7), account_id UUID FK(crm_accounts) NOT NULL, person_id UUID FK(iam_person) NOT NULL, contact_role ENUM(CHAMPION,BILLING,DECISION_MAKER,TECH_LEAD,ADMIN,OTHER) NOT NULL, title TEXT nullable, phone TEXT nullable, email TEXT NOT NULL, is_primary BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, notes TEXT nullable, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ. UNIQUE(account_id, person_id, contact_role). INDEX(account_id, contact_role). ADR-055: person_id for identity.
crm_interactionsid UUID PK(v7), account_id UUID FK(crm_accounts) NOT NULL, contact_id UUID FK(crm_contacts) nullable, interaction_type ENUM(CALL,EMAIL,MEETING,QBR,ONBOARDING_CHECKPOINT,RENEWAL_OUTREACH,SUPPORT_ESCALATION,INTERNAL_NOTE) NOT NULL, subject TEXT NOT NULL, body TEXT, outcome TEXT nullable, performed_by UUID FK(platform_users) NOT NULL, performed_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, next_action TEXT nullable, next_action_date DATE nullable, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ. INDEX(account_id, performed_at DESC). RANGE partition by performed_at MONTHLY, 36-month retention.
crm_onboarding_progressid UUID PK(v7), account_id UUID FK(crm_accounts) NOT NULL UNIQUE, current_phase ENUM(DISCOVERY,DATA_MIGRATION,CONFIGURATION,TRAINING,GO_LIVE,STABILISATION,COMPLETE) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'DISCOVERY', discovery_completed_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable, migration_completed_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable, configuration_completed_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable, training_completed_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable, go_live_date TIMESTAMPTZ nullable, stabilisation_completed_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable, staff_trained_pct NUMERIC(5,2) nullable, dau_pct NUMERIC(5,2) nullable, blocker_notes TEXT nullable, assigned_csm_id UUID FK(platform_users) nullable, updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ. Quality gates enforced by application.
crm_health_scoresid UUID PK(v7), account_id UUID FK(crm_accounts) NOT NULL, score_date DATE NOT NULL, overall_score INT NOT NULL CHECK(overall_score BETWEEN 0 AND 100), dau_score INT NOT NULL, module_adoption_score INT NOT NULL, ticket_volume_score INT NOT NULL, nps_score INT nullable, payment_health_score INT NOT NULL, active_modules_count INT NOT NULL, total_available_modules INT NOT NULL, open_p1_tickets INT DEFAULT 0, computed_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL. UNIQUE(account_id, score_date). RANGE partition by score_date MONTHLY, 24-month retention.
crm_renewal_pipelineid UUID PK(v7), account_id UUID FK(crm_accounts) NOT NULL, renewal_date DATE NOT NULL, status ENUM(UPCOMING,OUTREACH_SENT,USAGE_REPORT_SENT,EXPANSION_DISCUSSED,COMMITTED,AT_RISK,CHURNED,RENEWED) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'UPCOMING', outreach_date DATE nullable, usage_report_sent_date DATE nullable, expansion_modules TEXT nullable, proposed_new_band_id UUID FK(platform_pricing_bands) nullable, outcome_notes TEXT nullable, assigned_csm_id UUID FK(platform_users) nullable, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ, updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ. UNIQUE(account_id, renewal_date). Created automatically 90 days before renewal by RenewalPipelineWorker.

M91 Internal Operations (prefix: ops_, 5 tables, Pre-Wave 1)

ADR-072 CampusOS employees authenticate via the same IdP as school users (platform_users) but are identified by their ops_employees record and granted internal permissions via INTERNAL_ADMIN scope. Tenant data access for support requires an ops_access_grant with mandatory justification, auto-expiry (max 4 hours), and full audit trail.
TableDefinition
ops_employeesid UUID PK(v7), person_id UUID FK(iam_person) NOT NULL UNIQUE, account_id UUID FK(platform_users) NOT NULL UNIQUE, display_name TEXT NOT NULL, department ENUM(ENGINEERING,CUSTOMER_SUCCESS,SALES,PRODUCT,DESIGN,OPERATIONS,EXECUTIVE) NOT NULL, role_title TEXT NOT NULL, hire_date DATE NOT NULL, is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true, manager_id UUID FK(ops_employees) nullable, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ. INDEX(department, is_active). ADR-055: person_id for identity.
ops_employee_permissionsid UUID PK(v7), employee_id UUID FK(ops_employees) NOT NULL, permission_code TEXT NOT NULL, scope ENUM(ALL_ACCOUNTS,ASSIGNED_ACCOUNTS,READONLY) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ASSIGNED_ACCOUNTS', granted_by UUID FK(ops_employees) NOT NULL, granted_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, revoked_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable. UNIQUE(employee_id, permission_code) WHERE revoked_at IS NULL.
ops_account_assignmentsid UUID PK(v7), employee_id UUID FK(ops_employees) NOT NULL, account_id UUID FK(crm_accounts) NOT NULL, assignment_role ENUM(PRIMARY_CSM,SECONDARY_CSM,SALES_OWNER,IMPLEMENTATION_LEAD,EXECUTIVE_SPONSOR) NOT NULL, assigned_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, unassigned_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable, assigned_by UUID FK(ops_employees) NOT NULL. UNIQUE(account_id, assignment_role) WHERE unassigned_at IS NULL.
ops_access_grantsid UUID PK(v7), employee_id UUID FK(ops_employees) NOT NULL, tenant_schema_name TEXT NOT NULL, justification TEXT NOT NULL, linked_ticket_id UUID nullable, access_scope ENUM(READ_ONLY,READ_WRITE_SUPPORT) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'READ_ONLY', granted_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, expires_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, CHECK(expires_at <= granted_at + INTERVAL '4 hours'), revoked_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable, access_actually_used BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, granted_by UUID FK(ops_employees) NOT NULL. RANGE partition by granted_at MONTHLY, 84-month retention (FERPA/GDPR). ADR-072.
ops_internal_ticketsid UUID PK(v7), account_id UUID FK(crm_accounts) nullable, title TEXT NOT NULL, description TEXT NOT NULL, priority ENUM(P1_CRITICAL,P2_HIGH,P3_MEDIUM,P4_LOW) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'P3_MEDIUM', status ENUM(OPEN,IN_PROGRESS,WAITING_ON_CUSTOMER,WAITING_ON_ENGINEERING,RESOLVED,CLOSED) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'OPEN', category ENUM(BUG,PERFORMANCE,DATA_ISSUE,FEATURE_REQUEST,SECURITY,BILLING,ONBOARDING,OTHER) NOT NULL, assigned_to UUID FK(ops_employees) nullable, escalated_from_ticket_id UUID nullable, resolution_notes TEXT nullable, created_by UUID FK(ops_employees) NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ, updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ, resolved_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable. INDEX(status, priority). INDEX(account_id, status).

Platform Pricing (3 tables, Pre-Wave 1)

TableDefinition
platform_pricing_bandsid UUID PK(v7), band_name TEXT NOT NULL, display_name TEXT NOT NULL, student_min INT NOT NULL, student_max INT nullable (NULL for Custom), monthly_price_cents INT NOT NULL (0 for Custom), annual_discount_pct NUMERIC(5,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 15.00, is_custom BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, sort_order INT NOT NULL, is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true, effective_from DATE NOT NULL, effective_to DATE nullable, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ. UNIQUE(band_name, effective_from).
platform_pricing_historyid UUID PK(v7), pricing_band_id UUID FK(platform_pricing_bands) NOT NULL, field_changed TEXT NOT NULL, old_value TEXT, new_value TEXT, changed_by UUID FK(platform_users) NOT NULL, changed_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, reason TEXT. INDEX(pricing_band_id, changed_at DESC).
platform_support_tiersid UUID PK(v7), tier_name ENUM(STANDARD,PRIORITY,PREMIUM) NOT NULL, display_name TEXT NOT NULL, monthly_price_cents INT NOT NULL (0 for STANDARD), response_sla_hours INT NOT NULL, channels TEXT NOT NULL, support_hours TEXT NOT NULL, csm_ratio TEXT NOT NULL, includes_qbr BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, qbr_frequency TEXT nullable, is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true, effective_from DATE NOT NULL, effective_to DATE nullable, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ. UNIQUE(tier_name, effective_from).

Community Exchange — Marketplace (8 tables, Wave 2–3)

ADR-075 Polymorphic listing model with 6 types. SOFT INTEGRITY source refs to tenant tables. Per-listing visibility for assets. Revenue model determined by listing_type. All types through M2 Approval. Student content requires parental consent. Parents can browse/buy but not create listings. ADR-073 Revenue splits: 20/10/70 for content, 5% platform fee for surplus assets.
TableDefinition
platform_marketplace_listingsid UUID PK(v7), listing_type ENUM(EDUCATIONAL_CONTENT,STUDENT_PORTFOLIO,FIELD_TRIP,SURPLUS_ASSET,BOOK_REDISTRIBUTION,KNOWLEDGE_POST) NOT NULL, creator_profile_id UUID FK(platform_community_profiles) NOT NULL, source_school_id UUID FK(schools) NOT NULL, title TEXT NOT NULL, description TEXT NOT NULL, listing_category TEXT NOT NULL, source_ref_type TEXT nullable, source_ref_id UUID nullable (SOFT INTEGRITY), subject_area TEXT nullable, grade_band TEXT nullable, standards_tags JSONB nullable, student_outcome_summary JSONB nullable, asset_condition ENUM(NEW,LIKE_NEW,GOOD,FAIR,POOR) nullable, asset_quantity INT nullable DEFAULT 1, asset_location_text TEXT nullable, preview_s3_key TEXT nullable, full_content_s3_key TEXT nullable, image_s3_keys JSONB nullable, price_cents INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, currency CHAR(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'USD', visibility ENUM(CAMPUSOS_ONLY,OPEN_BROWSE,FULLY_OPEN) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'CAMPUSOS_ONLY', status ENUM(DRAFT,PENDING_APPROVAL,PUBLISHED,SOLD,SUSPENDED,ARCHIVED) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'DRAFT', approval_request_id UUID nullable (SOFT INTEGRITY → wsk_approval_requests.id), parental_consent_id UUID nullable, rating_avg NUMERIC(3,2) nullable, rating_count INT DEFAULT 0, comment_count INT DEFAULT 0, times_purchased INT DEFAULT 0, times_bookmarked INT DEFAULT 0, published_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ, updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ. INDEX(listing_type, status, published_at DESC). Full-text INDEX on (title, description) using tsvector. ADR-075.
platform_marketplace_purchasesid UUID PK(v7), listing_id UUID FK(platform_marketplace_listings) NOT NULL, buyer_person_id UUID FK(iam_person) NOT NULL, buyer_school_id UUID FK(schools) nullable, price_cents INT NOT NULL, currency CHAR(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'USD', stripe_payment_intent_id TEXT nullable, status ENUM(PENDING,COMPLETED,REFUNDED) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDING', imported_to_tenant BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, imported_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable, purchased_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL. RANGE partition by purchased_at MONTHLY, 84-month retention.
