platform_marketplace_revenue_splitsid UUID PK(v7), purchase_id UUID FK(platform_marketplace_purchases) NOT NULL UNIQUE, split_model ENUM(THREE_WAY_20_10_70,ASSET_FEE_5,FREE) NOT NULL, total_amount_cents INT NOT NULL, platform_amount_cents INT NOT NULL, school_amount_cents INT NOT NULL, teacher_amount_cents INT NOT NULL, platform_pct NUMERIC(5,2) NOT NULL, school_pct NUMERIC(5,2) NOT NULL, teacher_pct NUMERIC(5,2) NOT NULL, CHECK(platform_pct + school_pct + teacher_pct = 100.00), school_settlement_status ENUM(PENDING,CREDITED,PAID_OUT) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDING', teacher_settlement_status ENUM(PENDING,TRANSFERRED,PAID_OUT) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDING', teacher_stripe_transfer_id TEXT nullable, settled_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ. ADR-073.
platform_marketplace_payoutsid UUID PK(v7), creator_profile_id UUID FK(platform_community_profiles) NOT NULL, payout_period_start DATE NOT NULL, payout_period_end DATE NOT NULL, total_earnings_cents INT NOT NULL, platform_fees_cents INT NOT NULL, net_payout_cents INT NOT NULL, stripe_payout_id TEXT nullable, status ENUM(CALCULATING,READY,PROCESSING,PAID,FAILED) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'CALCULATING', paid_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ. UNIQUE(creator_profile_id, payout_period_start).
platform_marketplace_watch_listsid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID FK(schools) NOT NULL, created_by UUID FK(platform_community_profiles) NOT NULL, title TEXT NOT NULL, description TEXT nullable, is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true, notify_email TEXT nullable, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ, updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ. INDEX(school_id, is_active).
platform_marketplace_watch_list_itemsid UUID PK(v7), watch_list_id UUID FK(platform_marketplace_watch_lists) NOT NULL, item_description TEXT NOT NULL, target_listing_type ENUM(SURPLUS_ASSET,BOOK_REDISTRIBUTION,EDUCATIONAL_CONTENT) NOT NULL, search_keywords TEXT NOT NULL, max_price_cents INT nullable, quantity_needed INT DEFAULT 1, quantity_fulfilled INT DEFAULT 0, match_notification_sent_count INT DEFAULT 0, status ENUM(ACTIVE,PARTIALLY_FULFILLED,FULFILLED,CANCELLED) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'ACTIVE', created_at TIMESTAMPTZ. INDEX(target_listing_type, status, search_keywords) using GIN.
platform_asset_transactionsid UUID PK(v7), listing_id UUID FK(platform_marketplace_listings) NOT NULL, buyer_type ENUM(SCHOOL,INDIVIDUAL) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'SCHOOL', buyer_school_id UUID FK(schools) nullable, buyer_person_id UUID FK(iam_person) nullable, CHECK((buyer_type = 'SCHOOL' AND buyer_school_id IS NOT NULL) OR (buyer_type = 'INDIVIDUAL' AND buyer_person_id IS NOT NULL)), seller_school_id UUID FK(schools) NOT NULL, quantity INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1, unit_price_cents INT NOT NULL, total_price_cents INT NOT NULL, platform_fee_cents INT NOT NULL (5%), seller_receives_cents INT NOT NULL (95%), CHECK(platform_fee_cents + seller_receives_cents = total_price_cents), stripe_payment_intent_id TEXT nullable, status ENUM(PENDING_PAYMENT,PAID,SHIPPING,DELIVERED,CONFIRMED,DISPUTED,REFUNDED) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDING_PAYMENT', shipping_method ENUM(PICKUP,SCHOOL_DELIVERY,CARRIER) nullable, tracking_number TEXT nullable, delivery_confirmed_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable, dispute_reason TEXT nullable, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ, updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ.
platform_asset_condition_reportsid UUID PK(v7), transaction_id UUID FK(platform_asset_transactions) NOT NULL, reporter_type ENUM(SELLER_LISTING,BUYER_RECEIPT) NOT NULL, condition ENUM(NEW,LIKE_NEW,GOOD,FAIR,POOR) NOT NULL, condition_notes TEXT nullable, photo_s3_keys JSONB nullable, reported_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, reported_by UUID FK(platform_community_profiles) NOT NULL. UNIQUE(transaction_id, reporter_type).

Community Exchange — Profiles, Forums, Ratings, Reputation, Search (12 tables, Wave 2–3)

ADR-074 Platform-level community following ADR-029/ADR-063 pattern. Opt-in benchmarking with 5-school minimum. ADR-076 PostgreSQL tsvector unified search; Elasticsearch deferred post-200 schools.
TableDefinition
platform_community_profilesid UUID PK(v7), person_id UUID FK(iam_person) NOT NULL UNIQUE, account_id UUID FK(platform_users) NOT NULL UNIQUE, school_id UUID FK(schools) NOT NULL, profile_type ENUM(TEACHER,STUDENT,ADMIN,SUPPORT_STAFF,COUNSELOR,LIBRARIAN,IT_STAFF,FACILITIES,PARENT,OTHER) NOT NULL, display_name TEXT NOT NULL, role_title TEXT nullable, grade_level TEXT nullable, department TEXT nullable, subjects JSONB nullable, bio TEXT nullable, avatar_s3_key TEXT nullable, affiliated_school_ids JSONB nullable, can_create_listings BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT true (false for PARENT), stripe_connect_account_id TEXT nullable, total_listings INT DEFAULT 0, total_sales INT DEFAULT 0, total_earnings_cents INT DEFAULT 0, total_comments INT DEFAULT 0, total_forum_posts INT DEFAULT 0, reputation_score INT DEFAULT 0, average_rating NUMERIC(3,2) nullable, show_school BOOLEAN DEFAULT true, show_grade BOOLEAN DEFAULT true, show_email BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ, updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ. INDEX(school_id, profile_type, is_active). INDEX(reputation_score DESC) WHERE is_active = true. ADR-055: person_id for identity. Parent profiles lazy-created on first community visit.
platform_community_forumsid UUID PK(v7), forum_name TEXT NOT NULL, description TEXT, category ENUM(SUBJECT_AREA,GRADE_BAND,ROLE,REGION,GENERAL,ADMIN_OPS) NOT NULL, subject_filter TEXT nullable, grade_filter TEXT nullable, role_filter ENUM(TEACHER,ADMIN,COUNSELOR,IT,FACILITIES,PARENT,ALL) nullable, region_filter TEXT nullable, is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true, moderation_level ENUM(PRE_MODERATE,POST_MODERATE,COMMUNITY_FLAG) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'POST_MODERATE', sort_order INT DEFAULT 0, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ. UNIQUE(forum_name).
platform_community_threadsid UUID PK(v7), forum_id UUID FK(platform_community_forums) NOT NULL, author_id UUID FK(platform_users) NOT NULL, title TEXT NOT NULL, body TEXT NOT NULL, is_pinned BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, is_locked BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, reply_count INT DEFAULT 0, last_activity_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, moderation_status ENUM(VISIBLE,HIDDEN,REMOVED) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'VISIBLE', created_at TIMESTAMPTZ. INDEX(forum_id, is_pinned DESC, last_activity_at DESC). RANGE partition by created_at MONTHLY, 60-month retention.
platform_community_commentsid UUID PK(v7), target_type ENUM(LISTING,FORUM_THREAD,KNOWLEDGE_POST) NOT NULL, target_id UUID NOT NULL, parent_comment_id UUID FK(platform_community_comments) nullable, author_profile_id UUID FK(platform_community_profiles) NOT NULL, body TEXT NOT NULL, is_edited BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, edited_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable, moderation_status ENUM(VISIBLE,HIDDEN,REMOVED,FLAGGED) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'VISIBLE', flagged_count INT DEFAULT 0, helpful_count INT DEFAULT 0, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ. INDEX(target_type, target_id, created_at ASC). RANGE partition by created_at MONTHLY, 60-month retention.
platform_community_ratingsid UUID PK(v7), listing_id UUID FK(platform_marketplace_listings) NOT NULL, rater_profile_id UUID FK(platform_community_profiles) NOT NULL, purchase_id UUID FK(platform_marketplace_purchases) nullable, rating INT NOT NULL CHECK(rating BETWEEN 1 AND 5), review_text TEXT nullable, is_verified_purchase BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, moderation_status ENUM(VISIBLE,HIDDEN,REMOVED) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'VISIBLE', created_at TIMESTAMPTZ, updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ. UNIQUE(listing_id, rater_profile_id). On INSERT/UPDATE: trigger updates listing rating_avg and rating_count.
platform_community_helpful_votesid UUID PK(v7), target_type ENUM(COMMENT,FORUM_POST,KNOWLEDGE_POST) NOT NULL, target_id UUID NOT NULL, voter_profile_id UUID FK(platform_community_profiles) NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ. UNIQUE(target_type, target_id, voter_profile_id).
platform_community_reputation_eventsid UUID PK(v7), profile_id UUID FK(platform_community_profiles) NOT NULL, event_type ENUM(LISTING_PUBLISHED,LISTING_PURCHASED,RATING_RECEIVED_5,RATING_RECEIVED_4,RATING_RECEIVED_3,COMMENT_HELPFUL,FORUM_POST_HELPFUL,KNOWLEDGE_POST_PUBLISHED,FIELD_TRIP_SHARED) NOT NULL, points INT NOT NULL, source_ref_id UUID nullable, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ. INDEX(profile_id, created_at DESC). RANGE partition by created_at MONTHLY, 24-month retention.
platform_community_leaderboardsid UUID PK(v7), leaderboard_type ENUM(GLOBAL,SCHOOL,SUBJECT,REGION,LISTING_TYPE) NOT NULL, dimension_value TEXT NOT NULL, profile_id UUID FK(platform_community_profiles) NOT NULL, rank INT NOT NULL, score INT NOT NULL, period ENUM(ALL_TIME,YEAR,QUARTER,MONTH) NOT NULL, period_start DATE NOT NULL, computed_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL. UNIQUE(leaderboard_type, dimension_value, period, period_start, rank). Top 100 per dimension. Recomputed weekly.
platform_benchmarking_opt_insid UUID PK(v7), school_id UUID FK(schools) NOT NULL, metric_category ENUM(ATTENDANCE,GRADE_DISTRIBUTION,TEACHER_RETENTION,PARENT_ENGAGEMENT,FACILITIES_UTILISATION,FINANCE_BASICS,ENROLMENT_TRENDS) NOT NULL, opted_in BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, opted_in_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable, opted_in_by UUID FK(platform_users) nullable, opted_out_at TIMESTAMPTZ nullable. UNIQUE(school_id, metric_category). Strictly opt-in per category.
platform_benchmarking_aggregatesid UUID PK(v7), metric_category ENUM(ATTENDANCE,GRADE_DISTRIBUTION,TEACHER_RETENTION,PARENT_ENGAGEMENT,FACILITIES_UTILISATION,FINANCE_BASICS,ENROLMENT_TRENDS) NOT NULL, dimension ENUM(BAND_SIZE,REGION,SCHOOL_TYPE,COUNTRY) NOT NULL, dimension_value TEXT NOT NULL, period_start DATE NOT NULL, period_end DATE NOT NULL, sample_size INT NOT NULL, metric_mean NUMERIC(10,4), metric_median NUMERIC(10,4), metric_p25 NUMERIC(10,4), metric_p75 NUMERIC(10,4), metric_min NUMERIC(10,4), metric_max NUMERIC(10,4), computed_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL. UNIQUE(metric_category, dimension, dimension_value, period_start). CHECK(sample_size >= 5) — suppressed below 5 for de-anonymisation protection. Computed weekly.
platform_search_indexid UUID PK(v7), content_type ENUM(LISTING,FORUM_THREAD,FORUM_POST) NOT NULL, content_id UUID NOT NULL, school_id UUID FK(schools) nullable, title TEXT NOT NULL, body_excerpt TEXT NOT NULL (first 500 chars), listing_type TEXT nullable, author_display_name TEXT NOT NULL, author_profile_type TEXT NOT NULL, tags JSONB nullable, search_vector tsvector NOT NULL, rating_avg NUMERIC(3,2) nullable, engagement_score INT DEFAULT 0, published_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL, updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ. INDEX using GIN(search_vector). INDEX(content_type, listing_type, published_at DESC). Maintained by SearchIndexWorker. ADR-076.
CampusOS Design & Architecture Hub · ERD v11 · March 2026
← Back to Design Hub
